Description: Central Rappahannock Regional Library system serves the City of Fredericksburg, and Stafford, Spotsylvania, and Westmoreland counties in Virginia through of ten branches, two satellite locations, and a creative maker facility.

Name: TeachingBooks, an OverDrive Company
Description:
TeachingBooks strives to personalize and enrich every reader's connections to children's and young adult books. Our online service includes more than 275,000 resources about fiction and nonfiction books used in the K–12 environment, with every resource selected to encourage the integration of multimedia author and book materials into reading and library activities.

TeachingBooks.net is our school and academic interface.

BookConnections.org (launched summer 2020) is our public library interface.

TeachingBooks is an OverDrive company.

Enjoy!

Name: IGeLU - The International Group of Ex Libris Users
Description:
IGeLU along with Ex Libris Users of North America (ELUNA), advocates for users of Ex Libris products. We hold more than 400 members institutions representing more than 1600 Libraries or Archives using Ex Libris products in 39 countries around the world.

IGeLU works with our sister organisation, Ex Libris Users of North America (ELUNA), and with over 30 independent National and Regional User Groups, in lobbying for enhancements, development initiatives, and service improvements. We have a strong, positive relationship with Ex Libris, and work in partnership on product enhancements, collaborative testing of new releases, and focus groups.

Our aims are:

(1) To reflect the needs and priorities of the Ex Libris user community
(2) To influence software and services development to the mutual benefit of product users and the company
(3) To offer the community a forum for sharing information
(4) To speak with one voice to Ex Libris to improve customer satisfaction

Name: Libraries Hacked
Description: Libraries Hacked is a project to promote open data, to help libraries to publish their data, and to showcase projects using library data.

Name: Australian Law Librarians' Association
Description:
Established in 1969, the Association has grown from an informal group of six interested law librarians to a national association with over 500 members in all states and territories. ALLA represents librarians and information professionals working in courts, universities, government departments, law firms and professional associations.

In September 2006 members voted on a special resolution to change the name of the then Australian Law Librarians' Group (ALLG) to the Australian Law Librarians' Association (ALLA) - this became official on October 26th, 2006.

We are a national association with Divisions in Australian Capital Territory, New South Wales, Northern Territory, South Australia, Victoria and Western Australia. The national entity is a company limited by guarantee registered in 2012 as Australian Law Librarians' Association Ltd.

Name: Illinois Heartland Library System
Description:
At Illinois Heartland Library System, we're here to help our member libraries provide exceptional library services to the residents they serve. From providing delivery services between libraries for resource sharing, to seeking legal advice on state orders, to seeking and providing continuing education opportunities for library staff, we're here to serve YOU.

Illinois Heartland Library System is a quasi-governmental agency that serves public, school, academic, and special libraries of southern and parts of central Illinois.

HOW WE SUPPORT OUR MEMBER LIBRARIES
Resources Sharing
Member Engagement and Networking
Continuing Education and Consulting
Advocacy
Leadership and Innovation

Name: The Old Library, Dubai
Description:
The Old Library is Dubai's leading English Language Lending Library with over 1800 family and individual members. It is a not-for-profit organisation which is run entirely by volunteers as a service to the Dubai community. The Library is located at Gold & Diamond Park, Building 7, Dubai, UAE. 

As the oldest English Language Library in the country, predating even the establishment of the UAE, the Old Libary has a significant place in Dubai's history. It was founded in 1969 during the trucial states times with a gift of books from Lady Verney of Eaton Square in London. Originally operating under the name- Dubai Lending Library, donations of books from commercial companies and members of the expatriate community enabled the library to flourish.

The Library today has a collection of over 26,000 books for Adults, Teenagers and Children; ranging from General Fiction, General Reference, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Romance, Classics and the Middle East.

Name: Jozef Pilsudski Institute of America
Description: The Pilsudski Institute of America is one of the most outstanding Polish institutions outside of Poland. It has earned that designation through its invaluable collection of documents on the modern history of Poland, and its distinguished record of defending historical truth about Poland against successive adversaries: German occupiers during World War II (1939-1945) and subsequently during almost fifty years of communist rule imposed by the Soviet Union (1945-1989).This mission was undertaken in 1943 by a group of Polish diplomats, politicians, veterans of Polish Legions from World War I and associates of Marshal Jozef Pilsudski, himself a symbol of Polish independence since 1914.

Name: RAZRBOOKS
Description: RAZRBOOKS is designed to help meet financial needs for students around the world by making college and graduate education more affordable one book at a time! Visit our website to learn more

Name: Bibliotheek Hilversum
Description:
De Bibliotheek Hilversum is een laagdrempelige organisatie voor kennis, informatie en educatie en een eigentijdse ontmoetingsplaats voor cultuur, inspiratie en ontspanning voor alle inwoners.

De Bibliotheek Hilversum biedt ruimte om fysiek en digitaal kennis en informatie te verkrijgen en zo volwaardig deel te kunnen nemen aan de maatschappij. De bibliotheek bevordert lezen, leren en zelfredzaamheid door leesplezier te stimuleren en nieuwsgierigheid op te wekken. Waar mogelijk werkt de bibliotheek samen met lokale partners. De bibliotheek is een fysiek en digitaal informatieknooppunt maar ook makkelijk toegankelijk; de favoriete ontmoetingsplaats in Hilversum.

Name: Warren-Newport Public Library
Description:
The Library mission is to enrich, empower, and enlighten the people of the Warren-Newport Public Library District. 

The Warren-Newport Public Library District, founded in 1973, serves a population of approximately 68,000 within a 55-square mile area that covers all or most of Warren and Newport Townships, including Gurnee, Wadsworth, Park City, Wildwood, Grandwood Park, Old Mill Creek, and portions of Grayslake, Millburn, Lake Villa, Libertyville and Waukegan.

Name: CEDOC UNMSM
Description: El Centro de Documentación de la Biblioteca Central de la UNMSM, adscrito a la Dirección General de Biblioteca y Publicaciones (DGBP) y al Vice Rectorado de Investigación y Posgrado (VRIP), está dedicado a la recopilación, catalogación, digitalización y difusión de colecciones documentales, impresas y visuales, vinculadas a la historia y la cultura del Perú desde el siglo XX hasta el presente. Busca promover la difusión, la investigación y el debate público de los estudios en dicha área y poner al servicio de la ciudadanía parte de nuestra memoria e historia nacional reciente.

Name: Park Ridge Public Library
Description: The Park Ridge Public Library serves residents and businesses of the city of Park Ridge, Illinois. The library serves a population of 37,775 residents and is located at 20 S. Prospect Ave, Park Ridge, Illinois, in the Uptown neighborhood. The Park Ridge Library is a trusted and valued community partner that engages and strengthens its community by fostering personal growth in learning, providing opportunities to connect, inform, innovate and grow.

Name: Yonkers Public Library
Description:
Founded in 1893, Yonkers Public Library is a three-branch public library system serving the residents of Yonkers and surrounding communities; it is also a member of the Westchester Library System. The main branch is the Riverfront Library, a modern four-story public library that includes a 450-seat theater, multiple meeting and study rooms, a local history collection, and a community art gallery.  The Riverfront Library is also the location of the agency’s administrative offices. It's located across from the Yonkers train station featuring beautiful views of the Hudson River.

The library has two additional branches serving the community. The Grinton I. Will branch serves Eastern Yonkers, while our Crestwood Branch serves the Northeast neighborhoods. All locations offer hundreds of programs and events throughout the year. Our collection is diverse and offers formats in multiple languages.

Name: James V. Brown Library
Description:
The James V. Brown Library is the public library for Williamsport and the center of the Lycoming County Library System.  Built and opened in 1907 as the result of a bequest from lumber baron James VanDuzee Brown, the Library has grown and changed with the times.

Today, the James V. Brown Library is finding a balance between books and technology. Our customers value both the traditional services, and readily use the new technology based services. Hundreds of people a week use the web while at the library. The library’s website receives thousands of visits per month.

Hundreds of babies, toddlers and preschool children enjoy a story time and select books -- either in the Youth Services Department or from one of the Lycoming County Library System's three outreach vehicles: Storymobile, Book's Bus and the Bookmobile.  

Today about half the people who visit the James V. Brown Library come for a good book or to read. The other half come for other reasons: seeking information for work, school, or personal development.

In the face of many changes, the library remains true to its original mission: to enable people to be the best they can be, to grow, to learn and to enjoy their lives while learning!

Name: PALCI - Partnership for Academic Library Collaboration and Innovation
Description:
PALCI has a new name! The Partnership for Academic Library Collaboration and Innovation, formerly the Pennsylvania Academic Library Consortium, Inc. — was formed in 1996 and incorporated in 1998 as a grassroots federation of 35 academic libraries in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania. 

Today, the PALCI membership consists of more than 70 academic and research libraries, private and public, in Pennsylvania, New Jersey, West Virginia, New York, and Delaware. Member institutions range from small liberal arts colleges to publicly funded universities to ARL institutions to the State Library of Pennsylvania. Libraries in PALCI have holdings in excess of 144 million and a combined FTE of more than 500,000 students.

Name: Mechanics' Institute
Description: Mechanics’ Institute is a thriving hub of culture, curiosity, and community that has been at the heart of San Francisco life since 1854. We’re home to America’s oldest continuously operating chess club, an expertly curated membership library, and a dynamic lineup of author talks and cultural performances. More than a historic Beaux-Arts landmark, Mechanics’ Institute is a place where ideas spark, history lives, and every day offers the chance to be inspired.

Name: Counting Opinions
Description:
Counting Opinions provides organizations with innovative, comprehensive, cost-effective ways to capture, manage and measure performance data, including open-ended customer feedback, qualitative and quantitative data, trends, benchmarks, outcomes and peer comparisons.

Counting Opinions web-based solutions:

- Are delivered in real-time and provide organizations with valid, immediate, 24x7x365 results.
- Include powerful "click-only" reports that clearly identify actionable opportunities for improvement.
- Are fully hosted in a secure professionally managed facility, require minimal or no IT involvement and work across all browsers and platforms.
 
Our services are robust, comprehensive and integrated on a single platform. This enables organizations to overcome the “Babel” effect – namely, having multiple solutions (data silos), none of which can communicate with the other, whlle achieving significantly improved data integrity and productivity.

If you would like more information please contact us at info@countingopinions.com.

Name: Bansa Community Library & Resource Centre
Description:
Bansa Community Library and Resource Centre is an initiative of Aruna Mithlesh Foundation to cultivate an interest in reading and provide quality books and reading materials to learners from Bansa and 36 surrounding villages. The library is situated near Ram Janki Mandir in Bansa village (District Hardoi, Uttar Pradesh). Since its opening in November 2020, the library has witnessed overwhelming support and participation from learners of all age groups. Apart from attracting readers, it has also become a space for e-learning where volunteers from across India have engaged educational sessions on a variety of subjects. Bansa Community Library imbibes a feeling of empowerment, strength and awareness among the children and the adults through the books that have always been everyone’s friends. The library has always offered a sense of belongingness and inclusivity to all irrespective of gender, class or community.

Bansa Community Library provides the means to open doors of opportunity for young people. The main highlight of the library is its vast collection of books that would help young aspirants in preparing for different government examinations and getting onto the jobs they have dreamt of.

The library is run by a small team of youngsters from the community – and supported by a larger back-end team of volunteers, teachers, and patrons who work remotely and take care of the library’s requirements.

Name: Kantonsbibliothek Thurgau
Description: Die Kantonsbibliothek Thurgau ist eine öffentliche Bibliothek mit einem vielfältigen Medienangebot, das von Büchern, Zeitschriften und Hörbüchern bis hin zu Filmen reicht. Zusätzlich zu unserem physischen Bestand bieten wir ein attraktives digitales Angebot. In unseren ansprechenden Räumlichkeiten profitieren Besucher von WLAN und zahlreichen Arbeitsplätzen. Zudem bereichern wir die Kultur des Kantons durch diverse Veranstaltungen. Die Kantonsbibliothek ist zugleich Sammelstelle für Thurgauer Publikationen (Thurgoviana), welche sie aufbewahrt und zur Benutzung verfügbar macht. Der historische Bestand der Kantonsbibliothek umfasst u.a. die Bestände der ehemaligen Thurgauer Klöster Ittingen, Fischingen und Kreuzlingen.

Name: MidPointe Library System
Description: The MidPointe Library System serves a population of almost 200,000 people in the cities of Middletown, Trenton, and Monroe and the townships of West Chester, Liberty, Lemon, Madison, and Wayne with a collection of nearly half a million materials.

Name: DTU Library - Technical Information Center of Denmark
Description:
DTU Library is a leading, user-oriented and innovative university library that benefits DTU. Our mission is rooted in Open Science and our goal is to promote DTU's research and education and to ensure that DTU openly and transparently profits from and utilizes scientific information.
DTU Findit, DTU Orbit and DTU data - and the integration between them – lie at the very core of DTU Library's digital Open Science infrastructure. By means of this infrastructure, DTU Library delivers streaming, communication, advice and teaching which - DTU Findit, DTU Orbit and DTU data - and the integration between them – lie at the very core of DTU Library's digital Open Science infrastructure.
DTU Findit is DTU's online library service. With DTU Findit you search all the literature that DTU Library provides access to covering the research areas of the university, i.e. natural and technical sciences. You search across the library's collection of books and journals, articles and information from all the major and minor publishers - you only need to go one place to search it all.
https://findit.dtu.dk
DTU Data is DTU's repository for publishing and indexing research data. DTU Data makes it possible to publish and find research data generated in research projects at DTU or by DTU researchers.
https://data.dtu.dk
DTU Orbit is the official Research Database of DTU. All written publications where one or more DTU employees are affiliated as authors are registered in DTU Orbit. It is optional to register projects and activities. Thus, you can search all DTU research publications in DTU Orbit.
https://orbit.dtu.dk
DTU Library also serves as the Danish national technical information center.

Name: Dauphin County Library System
Vikram Sarabhai Library, IIMA
Description:
The Vikram Sarabhai Library (VSL) is named after Dr. Vikram Sarabhai, world renowned physicist and founding Director of IIMA. It was set up in 1962 and is one of the best management libraries in Asia.
The library is open 24x7. Our mission is to facilitate convenient and user friendly access to current, global and relevant information by identifying, acquiring, organizing and retrieving information in various formats (print & non print) to serve the information needs of the academic fraternity of IIMA to meet their teaching, research and learning requirements

Name: Palatine Library District
Description: Palatine Public Library District:  Your Destination for Knowledge, Entertainment, and Community.  Visit us in person or online to experience the many resources and services available. The Library District serves over 90,000 patrons residing primarily in Palatine and north Hoffman Estates.

Name: Association of Christian Librarians
Description: The mission of the Association of Christian Librarians is to strengthen libraries through professional development of evangelical librarians, scholarship, and spiritual encouragement for service in higher education. We are dedicated to being a caring Christian community that integrates faith and academic librarianship, emphasizing ministry and service.

Name: Library Services Centre
Description: LSC is Canada's only not-for-profit library vendor. Founded in 1967 in the Region of Waterloo, LSC is a full service library vendor, offering acquisitions, cataloguing, and processing services on every kind of physical materials.

Name: Linköping University Library
Description: Welcome to Linköping University Library! The posts are focused on research support.

Name: Virtus National
Description:
Enabling Excellence in Library & Information Technology Services Since 2005.
Virtus National takes the pride to be the premier Library Service & Information Technology provider in Kuwait many years of profound experience in providing scholarly electronic resources and information services.
Our vision is to empower Kuwait by transforming insights to reality through cutting edge services and facilitating latest technology for information centers.
Virtus Success story reveals our Dedication & Commitment in facilitating Quality & Reliability Services. We are Recognized and chosen by Government and Private Universities, Research Centers, Medical Institutions, Hospitals and Corporates in Kuwait. Breaking the global boundaries of information resource network, our services are unique and specialized in Library Services, Enterprise Content Management.

Name: Mestna Knjiznica Ljubljana / Ljubljana City Library
Description:
Mestna knjižnica Ljubljana je s 36 knjižnicami in 47 postajališči bibliobusa največja splošna knjižnica v Sloveniji in najbolj omrežena kulturna ustanova v Mestni občini Ljubljana. S približno 1.600.000 obiskovalci na leto in 84.000 aktivnimi člani, ki si letno izposodijo preko 4.700.000 od več kot 1.600.000 enot gradiva, ki ga hranimo. Za vse okuse in želje vsako leto pripravimo več kot 3.500 brezplačnih kulturnih prireditev in izobraževanj.

Naše knjižnice so namenjene vam. V njih lahko najdete in izkoristite možnosti za kreativno ustvarjanje in trajnostno učenje, za sproščeno prebiranje in pomenkovanje ter neomejeno virtualno dostopanje. Omogočamo vam kakovostno preživljanje prostega časa ter možnosti za intenzivno ali lagodno raziskovanje in izobraževanje.

Name: Scottish Poetry Library
Description: The Scottish Poetry Library is a charity with limited company status.  We are core funded by Creative Scotland (Regular Fund) and City of Edinburgh Council (Literature Consortium Culture Grant).  We offer a free lending service, including free postal loans within the UK, and provide spaces in our building for events, workshops, study and reading for pleasure.

Name: Kirstein Business Library & Innovation Center (KBLIC)
Description:
The Kirstein Business Library & Innovation Center (KBLIC) invites media creators, innovators, job seekers, entrepreneurs, nonprofits, investors, coders, and makers to our new space. Business-minded individuals can enjoy an inviting and modern space with over 5,000 square feet of printed resources, flexible seating, innovative technology to conduct business research, and dedicated areas for collaborating on projects with colleagues or developing a new career skill. Drop by KBLIC for access to and courses in the latest video editing and production technologies.  Within the Kirstein Business Library & Innovation Center, the Thomas R. Drey, Jr. Investment Center – named after a generous retired teacher who researched investing at Kirstein – offers up-to-date materials for those seeking information on how to invest wisely.

History:

The Kirstein Business Branch opened on May 7, 1930. Funding for the founding of the branch was donated by Louis Kirstein, a Vice President of Filene’s Dept. Store and Trustee of the Boston Public Library. The Branch was formally named the Edward Kirstein Memorial Library in honor of Louis’ father.

Kirstein was the first public business library in the U.S. to be built as a gift of a businessman and the second library in the country to be built specifically as a public business library. At the time, libraries in about 70 cities in the United States were providing business reference services but only about a dozen had separate business branches. Since 1930, Kirstein has stayed at the forefront of library service for business-related materials.

Name: Freedom To Read Foundation
Description: The Freedom to Read Foundation was established to promote and defend the First Amendment; to foster libraries as institutions wherein every individual's  freedoms are fulfilled; and to support the right of libraries to include in their collections and make available any work which they may legally acquire.

Name: Yuma County Library District
Description:
“Your Information Connection”
Yuma County Library District is your center for information, community enrichment, recreational reading, and lifelong learning.

Name: Infoestratégica
Description:
Infoestratégica es el resultado de las ideas, el trabajo colaborativo y el esfuerzo de un grupo multidisciplinario de profesionales, que están comprometidos en brindar servicios que cumplan las expectativas de nuestros clientes, formar a especialistas y ofrecer soluciones integrales de información estratégica. Para ello, contamos con oficinas de difusión y consultoría en varios países.

Desarrollamos soluciones que combinan los datos que las organizaciones generan internamente y los contenidos que obtienen de fuentes externas, para dotar a sus integrantes de elementos que les permitan fundamentar sus decisiones.

Para satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes, ofrecemos una gama de servicios entre los que se encuentran acceso a bases de datos, software de gestión de procesos y administración de contenidos, capacitación en el uso de tecnologías de información y comunicación, gestión documental, mobiliario, consumibles y consultoría en la aplicación de las nuevas tecnologías.
Nuestros clientes se localizan en los países de América Latina, colaboran en instituciones académicas, oficinas de gobierno, organismos internacionales y empresas de todos los sectores económicos. Desempeñan sus actividades en direcciones generales, áreas de investigación y desarrollo, bibliotecas, centros de documentación, áreas de tecnologías de información, archivos, departamentos de planeación, análisis, desarrollo de nuevos mercados, ventas y mercadotecnia, entre otros

Name: Bibliotheek Veenendaal
Description:
In De Cultuurfabriek aan het Kees Stipplein in hartje Veenendaal is de openbare bibliotheek gevestigd. Een bezoek aan De Cultuurfabriek is om veel redenen de moeite waard: het bijzondere, kleurrijke gebouw (naar een ontwerp van Jos van Eldonk) en de historische plek (daar waar vroeger de Hollandia Wolfabriek stond) bijvoorbeeld. 

Op de begane grond kunt u kiezen uit een royaal aanbod van kranten en tijdschriften en al lezend genieten van lekkers uit het grand café. Ook kunt u een kijkje nemen in de kunstuitleen. Op de eerste verdieping is de unieke boekenberg de grote blikvanger van de jeugdafdeling. Er is een BoekStarthoek voor de jongste lezertjes en een Makkelijk Lezen Plein met materialen speciaal voor kinderen die moeite hebben met (leren) lezen. De tweede verdieping biedt plaats aan de collectie voor volwassenen, met op de studieafdeling een stilteruimte om te studeren. In het hele gebouw is gratis wifi beschikbaar. 

De bibliotheek is van iedereen! Kom dus ook eens een kijkje nemen in De Cultuurfabriek.

Voor mensen die wél graag lezen of muziek luisteren, maar niet (meer) zélf naar de bibliotheek kunnen komen, is er de Boekendienst die bij de mensen thuis komt. De medewerkers van de Boekendienst zijn vrijwilligers. De Boekendienst is een gratis service; u betaalt alleen de normale abonnementskosten en leenvergoedingen die elke lener betaalt.

Name: Bibliothèque des Sciences Humaines - Simone Veil
Description: Dressée au milieu du campus du Solbosch, la Bibliothèque des sciences humaines Simone Veil est un des lieux de référence de l'Université Libre de Bruxelles.

Name: Massachusetts Library Association
Description: The Massachusetts Library Association (MLA) is the Massachusetts, United States professional library association that "advocates for libraries, librarians, and library staff, defends intellectual freedom, and provides a forum for leadership, communication, professional development, and networking to keep libraries vital." MLA publishes standards for library services to Massachusetts children and young adults. MLA sponsors an annual conference, as well as continuing education programs and organizational reports of interest.

Name: Bibliothèque - Académie des sciences d'outre-mer
Description:
La bibliothèque de l’Académie des sciences d’outre-mer possède près de 130 000 documents : 115 000 monographies, 4 600 périodiques dont 100 vivants, plus de 600 cartes historiques, un millier de manuscrits et environ 10 000 brochures et tirés à part. Elle possède un fonds riche, concernant particulièrement l'Afrique sub-saharienne, le pourtour méditerranéen, le Maghreb-Machrek mais aussi le sud-Asie, la péninsule indochinoise et l'Inde. 

Ouverte au public, elle est le principal pôle de référence en région parisienne pour l’outre-mer français et étranger, passé et actuel. Elle est fréquentée, en dehors des académiciens et des membres de la Société des amis, par des professeurs des Universités, des chercheurs, des doctorants, des journalistes, des écrivains et des étudiants de toutes origines.

C’est un fonds vivant de mémoire coloniale, alimenté essentiellement par les services de presse - qui font l'objet de recensions mensuelles - et les achats. Les dons et legs, parmi lesquels les archives d'illustres académiciens, y participent également. Les critères d’enrichissement de la collection sont définis par une charte documentaire depuis 2019. La bibliothèque met, en outre, petit à petit à disposition les 60 000 volumes du fonds patrimonial unique « Afrique, Outre-mer et colonies » de la DILA.
 
La bibliothèque porte depuis le 14 février 2020 le nom de Félix Houphouët-Boigny, après son inauguration par le président de la République de Côte d’Ivoire M. Alassane Ouattara. Médecin, ministre en France puis en Côte d’Ivoire, il y devient ensuite président de 1960 à 1993. 

Membre de l’Académie pendant vingt ans, son parcours exceptionnel et emblématique, bien au-delà de la Côte d’Ivoire et de l’Afrique, a ainsi favorisé le choix de la figure du président Houphouët-Boigny pour baptiser la bibliothèque. Cette dernière porte ainsi désormais un nom qui manifeste sa richesse dans le domaine des pays qui sont au-delà des mers et son ouverture au grand large.

Name: BroLi
Description: La librería que busca democratizar la lectura en Uruguay.

Name: The Penworthy Company
Description:
Penworthy is your exclusive source for Penworthy Prebound Books—the most attractive and durable children’s library books available. We also offer a wide selection of themed educational kits, including Early Start, STEAM, and Stay Sharp Kits.

Everything is in stock—no back orders. Plus, we offer free shipping and cataloging.

Our dedicated representatives are here to deliver time-saving, customer-focused service. At Penworthy, we’re committed to extraordinary quality, expert curation, and exceptional support—because you deserve nothing less.

Name: The Northeast Ohio Regional Library System (NEO-RLS)
Description:

NEO-RLS provides excellent, accessible development opportunities for staff and organizations and dynamic collaborative possibilities to the diverse Northeast Ohio library community.

VALUES

Name: Bibliotheek Velsen
Description:
Welkom op de pagina van Bibliotheek Velsen.

Bibliotheek Velsen speelt een belangrijke rol als maatschappelijke-educatieve voorziening in de gemeente Velsen. Leesplezier, ontmoeten, ontwikkeling en cultuureducatie staan centraal. Bibliotheek Velsen heeft twee vestigingen in IJmuiden en Velserbroek. We werken samen met het onderwijs aan leesbevordering en mediawijsheid. En met vele organisaties aan taal vanuit het Taalhuis IJmond. 

Volg onze berichtgeving of kom langs en doe mee! Zie www.bibliotheekvelsen.nl voor actuele informatie, openingstijden en ons aanbod aan activiteiten.

Name: Filipino Librarians Association - UAE
Description: The association aims to provide a supportive environment for Filipino librarians in the UAE, promoting access to licensure exams, fair compensation, and continuous growth opportunities within the profession.

Name: BAILII (British and Irish Legal Information Institute)
Description:
The British and Irish Legal Information Institute (BAILII) provides access to the most comprehensive set of British and Irish legal materials available for free and in one place on the internet. The service is a major tool for legal research. BAILII makes its website available on a subscription-free basis for the benefit of the public, including pro bono organisations, neighbourhood law centres, students and users in developing companies.

BAILII is legally constituted in the UK as a company limited by guarantee (No. 4131252) and as a charitable trust (Registered Charity No. 1084803). BAILII depends on donations in order to remain in operation. It is supported by a number of major donors and assisted by many other organisations and individuals. BAILII is hosted in the UK and Ireland by the Institute of Advanced Legal Studies, London, and the Law Faculty, University College Cork.

Name: Programa Iberbibliotecas
Description: El Programa Iberoamericano de Bibliotecas Públicas, IBERBIBLIOTECAS es una red de cooperación iberoamericana que busca contribuir a la consolidación del Espacio Cultural Iberoamericano y reafirmar la función social de las bibliotecas públicas.

Name: Lithuanian Audiosensory Library / Lietuvos audiosensorinė biblioteka
Description:
Lithuanian Audiosensory Library for the Blind is the state library the purpose of which is to satisfy the informational and cultural needs of the people who are not able to read the regular printed text.
The library also provides information to Lithuanian publishers about inclusive publishing and accessible publications.

Name: Bibliotheek Hoogeveen / Verhalenwerf
Description: Bibliotheek Hoogeveen is dè plek voor cultuur, kennis en inspiratie, waar je talenten ontwikkelt en waar we belangeloos verbinding maken met elkaar en samen het beste uit Hoogeveen halen. De Bibliotheek staat midden in de samenleving, is volop in ontwikkeling en werkt samen met culturele, educatieve en maatschappelijke organisaties.

Name: Library International Space University
Description: Established in 1995, the Library of the International Space University has grown from a small collection of books into a comprehensive repository of knowledge dedicated to space science and astronautics. Today, we offer a vast collection that spans both print and electronic resources, covering critical areas such as space law, space medicine, earth observation, telecommunication, engineering, and more. Our evolution reflects our commitment to supporting cutting-edge research and fostering academic excellence in a field that continuously pushes the boundaries of exploration.

Name: CSUSM Library
Description:
The University Library’s website provides online 24/7 chat services, access to digital materials, research help, online resources, the CSU system-wide OneSearch catalog, and more than 100 research databases.

Need a book? Search OneSearch. If it is not available online, use the “Request Access” button.  If we can get the book we'll either provide digital access to it or, provide access with our contactless Library Lockers, or mail the physical copy to your preferred address. Note that delivery of physical items to your address may take at least two weeks, so we’ll provide digital access if possible. 

The Library provides access to textbooks and course materials. Before purchasing textbooks, check Library Reserves to see if your course has any reserves materials online. Please note that due to COVID-19 precautions, we are only able to provide access to eBooks, articles, and films at this time.  

The 200,000-square-foot Kellogg Library has more than 300 computers, more than 40 group study rooms, thousands of journals, and a quarter-million books.

The Library is home to the campus Starbucks, computer labs, course reserves, classrooms, group and quiet study areas, student-friendly patios, public art, the Reading Room meeting and event space, special historical collections, and the after-hours 24/5 Zone.

The 2018-19 academic year saw over one million visits from students, staff, faculty, and community members to the Kellogg Library.

In 2018-19, Teaching and Learning librarians delivered 382 information literacy instruction sessions to 12,357 students across all academic departments.

Name: LAW LIBRARY ASSOCIATION OF ST LOUIS
Description: It is the mission of the Law Library Association of St. Louis to operate a Law Library in the Civil Courts Building to provide legal research materials, education, support services and facilities to the bench, bar, its members and the public. The Law Library provides support to other law libraries in the region by acting as a repository of legal materials not otherwise available or accessible. The Law Library strives to acquire, develop and maintain a collection of legal research materials and to offer educational services to meet the needs of our diverse patron community.

Name: Lorain Public Library System
Description:
Lorain Public Library System provides everyone with free, educational, informational and entertainment resources through responsive quality service to support lifelong learning. 

Lorain Public Library System includes:
- Main Library at 351 W. Sixth Street, Lorain
- Avon Branch at 37485 Harvest Drive, Avon
- Columbia Branch at 13824 W. River Road, Columbia
- Domonkas Branch at 4125 E. Lake Road, Sheffield Lake
- North Ridgeville Branch at 35700 Bainbridge Road, North Ridgeville
- South Lorain Branch at 2121 Homewood Drive, Lorain

There is also a robust array of eLibrary resources available at lorainpubliclibrary.org.

Name: Friends of the Multnomah County Library
Description: The Friends of the Multnomah County Library advocate for and support our outstanding public library. We are committed to providing supplemental funding for library programs and services, and sponsoring activities which engage people who value our library.

Name: California Libraries Learn
Description: California Libraries Learn (CALL) fosters learning and growth in California libraries. CALL is a collaborative program of the California Library Association and the California State Library.

Name: BEEM
Description: A BEEM - Biblioteca Escolar e Multiletramentos - trabalha desde 2018 em projetos que buscam aprimorar os conhecimentos de estudantes e educadores nas áreas relacionadas à informação, através da educação midiática, letramento informacional, pesquisa escolar, desenvolvimento de acervo e currículo pedagógico, de forma a orientar as instituições de ensino ao consumo, avaliação e produção de informações de forma crítica e segura.

Name: Københavns Universitetsbibliotek Fiolstræde
Description: Vi gør forskning fra Københavns Universitet relevant for flere. Besøg os i den gamle biblioteksbygning i Fiolstræde til events og udstillinger.

Name: Medad EStores
Description: Market Place

Name: Ypsilanti District Library
Description:
The Ypsilanti District Library builds community through discovery, education, and partnerships.

We envision a thriving, highly-connected community supported by innovative resources and exciting learning opportunities.

Name: Daraj
Description: Bookstore & Publishing house

Name: HomeStyle BOOK
Description:
