però in segreto ti rinviano a te stesso.
Lì c’è tutto ciò di cui hai bisogno, sole stelle luna.
Perché la luce che cercavi vive dentro di te.
La saggezza che hai cercato a lungo in biblioteca
ora brilla in ogni foglio, perché adesso è tua.

Name: Red Deer Public Library
Description: Red Deer Public Library enriches lives and builds community.

Name: Alameda County Library
Description: Alameda County Library provides library services from ten libraries in the cities of Albany, Dublin, Fremont, Newark, and Union City and the unincorporated communities of Castro Valley and the Eden Area, including San Lorenzo and Cherryland. Alameda County Library also provides additional services through our Equitable Libraries Division via Youth and Family Services, Mobile and Outreach Services, Education and Literacy Services, and Social Justice Services. Our team is dedicated to providing a space for everyone to express and embrace our values of Authenticity, Integrity, Creativity, Curiosity, and Empathy.

Name: Artexte
Description:
Artexte favorise la connaissance et le rayonnement des arts visuels contemporains au moyen de ressources documentaires fiables. Sa principale mission vise l’étude et la mise en valeur du matériel documentaire produit dans le champ de l’art.

Artexte réalise des activités de recherche, d’interprétation et de diffusion s’appuyant sur une importante collection documentaire qui touche tous les aspects des arts visuels de 1965 à nos jours, et qui porte une attention particulière aux productions du Québec et du Canada.

Artexte poursuit les objectifs suivants : soutenir le caractère expérimental, novateur et critique des arts visuels contemporains; inscrire ces arts visuels dans un champ de réflexion multidisciplinaire grâce à l’élaboration d’alliances et de partenariats.

---

Artexte promotes the knowledge and influence of contemporary visual arts through reliable documentary resources. Its main mission is the study of the development of documentary material produced in the field of art.

Artexte carries out research, interpretation and dissemination activities based on a large collection of documentaries that relate to aspects of the visual arts from 1965 to the present day, and which pays particular attention to productions from Quebec and Canada.

Artexte has the following objectives: to support the experimental, innovative and critical nature of contemporary visual arts; visual arts enrollment in a multidisciplinary field of reflection through the development of alliances and partnerships.

Name: Middle Country Public Library
Description: Middle Country Public Library is a dynamic center for continuous learning that provides information, resources and programs to reflect a wide range of views and meet the needs of a diverse community.  A skilled, creative and enthusiastic staff demonstrates professional expertise, inviting on-going community dialogue to evaluate and improve services.  Visionary leadership, outstanding facilities and collaborative partnerships enable the Library to deliver model services for individuals, families, children, teens, seniors, businesses and professionals.  Extensive technological resources, collections and innovative services support literacy, economic independence, cultural enrichment, and family health and wellness. The Library is a welcoming place, dedicated to excellence and to enhancing the quality of community life.

Name: Onondaga County Public Libraries
Description: The mission of the Onondaga County Public Library is to make a positive difference in every life we touch by putting the power of ideas and information to work for all.

Name: Frisco Public Library
Description: The Frisco Public Library has been an essential provider of books, information, ideas, and education for all Frisco residents since 1991, with a mission to inspire intellect, curiosity, and imagination. The library supports self-directed education, provides educational assistance, and offers enlightening experiences, through a collection of books and ebooks, staff ready to assist, classes for all ages, and quiet and not so quiet spaces.

Name: Boulder Public Library
Description: A library is more than a place to borrow a free book. It is a vital civic space for people to meet and have conversations, study, hang out with friends, and engage in fun, educational activities and cultural experiences. It is evident from increased usage and requests for expanded programming that the community values its public libraries.

Name: Book Systems, Inc.
Description:
Book Systems is an industry leader and developer of the Atriuum Integrated Library System and Booktracks Asset/Textbook Management System for K-12, public, academic, and special libraries.

With over 30 years of experience, we deliver stress-free, cloud-based solutions with customer-driven features and, hands down, the best support in the industry.

Name: Cook Memorial Public Library District
Description:
The Cook Memorial Public Library District, as an integral part of the community, strives to facilitate the free exchange of information and foster the free expression of creative thought, by providing the resources, services and environment needed for community members to discover the past, understand the present, and imagine the future.

Cook Memorial Public Library District serves the communities of Green Oaks, Indian Creek, Libertyville, Mettawa, parts of Mundelein, and Vernon Hills.

Name: Pustakawan Mendunia
Description: Pustakawan Mendunia (Global Librarian) is for us, the librarians, information workers, literacy activists, and educators who are both willing to continue to learn, think creatively, and forward the love into our community now and for the future.

Name: Boekentoren
Description:
Do you like to study in silence together with others? You are welcome in the open study landscape of the Boekentoren.

The Boekentoren houses an extensive collection of books and heritage. The online library is open 24/7.

The Boekentoren is a modernist masterpiece by architect Henry van de Velde. You can explore the building (online).

Name: Dothan Houston County Library System
Description: The Dothan Houston County Library System’s goal is to provide materials and services which will help the community residents and present and future affiliates of the Wiregrass area to obtain information meeting their personal, educational and professional needs. The library serves residents of the community and surrounding area regardless of age, race, or creed. The library’s collection reflects broad coverage with materials acquired in a variety of formats, and includes the use of outside informational resources. Special emphasis is placed on stimulating young children’s interest and appreciation for reading and learning, and on providing personal-interest materials for our patrons.

Name: University of Kansas Libraries
Description: KU Libraries advance research, teaching and learning at the intersection of people and ideas. We seek to empower all learners through transformative partnerships - opening doors, fueling knowledge creation, and cultivating our communities.

Name: Biblioteksutveckling Region Sörmland
Description: Bibliotek, läsning och litteratur ska vara tillgängligt för alla. Biblioteksutveckling Sörmland vill vidga vyer, väcka engagemang och bidra till att människor har möjlighet att utöva sina mänskliga rättigheter.

Name: Bibliotecas Duoc UC
Description:
Entre los servicios tradicionales: Acceso a recursos digitales (libros digitales, bases de datos, revistas, etc.), Libros de tu asignatura, Sugiere tu libro, Reserva de sala, Contactos, Horarios de bibliotecas, Reserva y Renovación de materiales, entre otros.  Se destacan: Atención virtual:  Su objetivo es ser el primer punto de contacto para aquellos usuarios que tengan alguna consulta. La idea fundamental es que los alumnos practiquen y desarrollen su autonomía.  Aquí podrán encontrar Preguntas frecuentes, tutoriales de servicios, realizar una solicitud de asesoría académica y, por supuesto, un espacio para realizar preguntas a través de un formulario. 
BiblioChat: El nuevo portal de biblioteca incluye un chat que estará presente en toda la navegación. Su objetivo es orientar a los usuarios en el uso de los recursos, dando respuesta oportuna a cada consulta. Este chat funcionará de lunes a viernes de 9:00 a 18:00 horas y será atendido por los propios colaboradores de cada biblioteca fortaleciendo de esta manera el vínculo con su sede. 
Información contextualizada para Alumnos, docentes, investigadores, y titulados: Una de las funciones relevantes del nuevo Portal es la posibilidad de crear y mantener microportales o micrositios, que tienen el objetivo de sugerir contenido a los distintos perfiles, apoyando las diferentes acciones. Por ejemplo, en el caso de los alumnos: Servicios básicos de bibliotecas, reserva de sala, información sobre los préstamos, etc. Tips sobre cómo realizar acciones básicas en Word o Excel, herramientas para trabajar en línea y apoyo para crear y/o redactar un informe, su estructura, normativa APA, entre otros. 
Biblioteca recreativa: En esta sección del portal encontrarán una biblioteca con una moderna interfaz que recopila novelas, audiolibros, películas, podcasts, visitas virtuales de videos, con licenciamiento abierto.

Name: KU Leuven Bibliotheken - Libraries
Description: The twenty-three KU Leuven libraries preserve top collections, manage inspiring learning centres, and offer an extensive list of services to researchers, teachers, students, and external visitors.

Name: Melbourne Art Library
Description:
Melbourne Art Library is a not-for-profit library providing an accessible and specialised collection of art and design books, serials, zines and other publications for the local arts community. It aims to connect emerging practitioners, the art-curious, and established researchers and arts professionals with hard to access resources. As an alternative to traditional research libraries, MAL has an open-door policy, encouraging collaboration, exploration, and tangential research.

MAL is established on the traditional lands of the Wurundjeri People of the Kulin Nations in Naarm, Melbourne.

Name: Mishawaka-Penn-Harris Public Library
Description:
The public library system for Penn and Harris townships in St. Joseph County, Indiana, MPHPL consists of the main library in downtown Mishawaka and two branches (Osceola and Granger areas).

Connecting patrons to literature, information, ideas and new experiences for lifelong enrichment, MPHPL invites the community to browse the sizable print and digital collections, to take advantage of free Wi-Fi, mobile printing and other services, or to participate in our popular programming for all ages.

Mission Statement:
The Mishawaka-Penn-Harris Public Library inspires and empowers our community by connecting patrons to literature, information, ideas and new experiences for lifelong enrichment.

Name: New Haven Free Public Library
Description: The New Haven Free Public Library fosters lifelong learning, inspires curiosity, and builds community through shared access to resources, experiences, and opportunities for all.

Name: Library Bound Inc
Description:
Library Bound is Canada’s largest wholesaler solely dedicated to serving the needs of public libraries. For twenty-eight years, our committed and experienced staff have been striving to develop innovative and cost-effective solutions for the changing needs of Canadian libraries. 

In order to maximize the speed and efficiency of our service to our customers nationally we operate two full service facilities (acquisitions, cataloguing and processing) in Waterloo, ON and Vancouver, BC. We are the only Canadian library wholesaler managing two full service operations across the country.

Name: Indian Trails Public Library District
Description:
We proudly serve 65,500 residents in the communities of Buffalo Grove, Wheeling and Prospect Heights by providing exceptional resources, services and programs.

We have books and
•	More than 100 programs each month for all ages.
•	Strong focus on early literacy skills, beginning at birth.
•	One-on-one technology tutorials.
•	ESL classes for all levels.
•	Downloadable ebooks, movies, music and audiobooks.
•	Materials in English, Spanish, Russian, Polish and Korean.
•	eReaders, iPads and tablets available for check out.
•	Multilingual staff 

Stay connected 24/7 – download the Indian Trails Library app for your phone or tablet. Search indiantrailslibrary at your app store.

Name: Georgia State University Library
Description:
Mission:
Provide resources and services that enhance student learning and success, inspire creative expression, enable the creation of new knowledge, and facilitate informed dialogue.

Vision:
The Georgia State University Library will be looked to as a national model of the innovative research library: the intellectual commons of the University, a valued partner in student success, and an integral component of the University research community.

Values:
Collaboration. We seek partnerships and promote open communication.
Diversity. We value all employees and users regardless of race, color, sex, religion, creed, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, veteran status, or national origin, and strive to create a climate of openness, respect, and appreciation.
Innovation. We are innovative, flexible, and creative.
Integrity. We act with consistency, honesty, fairness, and professionalism.
Learning. We promote the lifelong pursuit of knowledge.
Service. We serve our community in a knowledgeable, receptive, and courteous manner.

Name: de Bibliotheek Veldhoven
Description:
De Bibliotheek Veldhoven is een uitnodigende plek in het centrum van Veldhoven. Een toegankelijke bieb, die zes dagen per week doorlopend geopend is en gemiddeld 500 bezoekers per dag verwelkomt. De medewerkers en vrijwilligers zetten zich vol enthousiasme in om de wereld van alle Veldhovenaren te vergroten en te verrijken. Persoonlijk, sociaal, inspirerend en toegankelijk zijn onze kernwaarden.

Dagelijks bruist de bibliotheek van activiteiten. Van BoekStart tot Boekendienst aan huis, wij bieden voor alle leeftijden een breed scala aan producten, diensten en zo’n 700 activiteiten per jaar. De focus ligt hierbij op de jeugd en Veldhovenaren in een kwetsbare positie, zoals laaggeletterden, digibeten, anderstaligen en ouderen.

Name: Brusselse bibliotheken
Description: 20 Nederlandstalige openbare bibliotheken in het Brusselse Gewest • 1 lidkaart • gratis lidmaatschap en basisdienstverlening • samen 800.000 materialen • ook anderstalige collecties

Name: Miller Business Center
Description:
The Miller Center serves as a regional resource for businesses, independent entrepreneurs, not-for-profit organizations, and individuals. Located within the Middle Country Public Library, the Miller Center offers access to extensive and specialized business resources as well as personalized business research and reference assistance. The goal of the Center is to support regional economic development by meeting the information needs of the business community, promoting a literate and job-ready workforce, and providing employment information and career exploration opportunities. The Center sponsors networking and training events and works in partnership with Long Island business support organizations to provide greater public access to the information and services they offer.

Supported by the efforts of the Library and the Middle Country Library Foundation, the Center is named for John D. Miller, a Long Island philanthropist who knows from personal experience the importance of information resources and business research assistance to small businesses and independent entrepreneurs. The Miller Center establishes partnerships with area businesses and business organizations to extend its usefulness and sustain its continued development.

Name: Muskingum County Library System
Description: The library sparks curious minds, fosters a love of reading, encourages exploration and discovery, enables learning, and inspires creativity by connecting people with information, ideas, and each other.

Name: Dinas Kearsipan dan Perpustakaan Provinsi Jawa Tengah
Description: Dinas Kearsipan dan Perpustakaan Provinsi Jawa Tengah

Name: Fresno State Library
Description: Get links to our services: https://linktr.ee/fresnostatelibrary

Name: State Library of Kansas
Description:
The State Library of Kansas' mission is to provide library and information services to the executive and legislative branches of state government and to provide library extension services to all Kansas residents. By statute, the agency provides leadership and assistance in the development, organization and management of Kansas’ local libraries and provides specialized library services to blind or disabled people. 
The State Library is a catalyst to improve statewide library services through consultation services, local and regional library information services, and administration of grants-in-aid to public libraries and the seven regional systems of cooperating libraries.

Name: Waterford City and County Library Service
Description:
Waterford City and County Council Library Service - providing spaces for books, learning, culture, well-being and community across Waterford City and County.

Waterford City and County Library Service operates 12 branches across Waterford City and County - in the City at Lady Lane, Ardkeen Stores, Carrickphierish and Browns Road and throughout the County at Tramore, Dunmore, Portlaw, Dungarvan, Kilmacthomas, Lismore, Cappoquin and Tallow.

We provide internet access, books, meeting spaces, training and community spaces for Waterford city and county.

Name: BBALP (Bisila Bokoko African Literacy Project)
Description:
As technology evolves rapidly at BBALP we want to promote digital literacy too. Many skills can be built through STEM, such as creativity, critical thinking, innovation, problem-solving, and teamwork, which will help African people to be successful in the future.

STEM is not just about learning science, technology, engineering, and math content, but rather is a way to connect and support learning in all content areas. BBALP has the objective to join forces with other organizations to promote technology literacy skills through learning experiences that will spark empowerment. 

Literacy means the ability to read, write and listen effectively.

Developing literacy is part of our mission.

Launched in 2009, BBALP is a non-profit organization committed to opening libraries in rural areas throughout Africa  We are headquartered in New York City, with current presence in Ghana, Zimbabwe, Kenya, Uganda. Our motto is : “with a book, you are never alone”.  We have also launched a scholarship programmes and open to partnerships and collaborations.

Name: Um Pé de Biblioteca
Description:
Acreditamos que o apoio à implantação de bibliotecas em comunidades vulneráveis é o caminho para a maior e melhor transformação numa sociedade: a educação. Lendo, as pessoas transformam suas vidas!

Em 17 anos, O Instituto Um Pé de Biblioteca apoiou mais de 30 bibliotecas em todo o país!

Como fazemos?
A Jornada pela Biblioteca é uma gincana que promove a abertura e reforma de bibliotecas comunitárias e a capacitação de grupos locais, com total protagonismo da comunidade.

São 6 etapas obrigatórias e a pessoa vencedora ganha o KIT UPDB: ambientação, treinamento, qualificação de equipe e o melhor, estar em rede e nunca mais lutar sozinha!

Name: Live Oak Public Libraries
Description: Live Oak Public Libraries is a system of 16 library locations serving a 3-county region in southeast Georgia. Each year, the Library checks out almost 1.3 million items, answers in excess of 650,000 questions, registers more than 450,000 computer sessions, and presents programs to nearly 80,000 patrons in Chatham, Effingham, and Liberty Counties.

Name: Marile Cărți
Description:
Vrei să stai la masă cu niște oameni vii, inteligenți sau cultivați? Cauți un prieten sau un mentor într-o lume grăbită, superficială și egoistă?
Construim comunitatea iubitorilor de adevăr, bine și frumos, a oamenilor liberi, care nu pot fi cenzurați și care-și pun întrebările semnificative ale vieții. 

Suntem cei care cred, muncesc și investesc în educația permanentă. Instructorii Clubului nostru oferă seminarii interactive, având o calificare academică la nivel internațional, dar și o bogată experiență de comunicare în agora cetății.

Dacă te-ai săturat de influenceri banali și artificiali, dacă te-ai plictisit de sloganuri motivaționale, dacă îți dorești câteva clipe de autenticitate pe calea către Everestul înțelepciunii, atunci seriozitatea căutărilor, atmosfera prietenească și profilul interdisciplinar al Clubului Marilor Cărți sunt pentru tine. 

Vino în comunitatea care atrage zilnic persoane pasionate de literatură, filozofie, istorie, teologie, dezvoltare personală sau antreprenoriat.

Pe lângă aceste întruniri, clienții noștri pot opta și pentru sesiuni intesive de coaching 1:1, orientate către personalizarea unor soluții din viața profesională. Cele mai căutate tehnici țin de arta oratoriei, vorbirea în public, secretele povestirii și strategii de leadership & personal branding.

Clubul Marilor Cărți este comunitatea deschisă celor care pariază pe rafinament și inteligență într-o Românie deșteaptă, elevată și elegantă.

Numai cultura ne poate vindeca de vulgaritate!

Name: Z. Smith Reynolds Library
Description: ZSR Library supports instruction and research for students and faculty in the Undergraduate College,  the Wake Forest School of Business, the Graduate School of Arts and Sciences, and the Wake Forest Divinity School. ZSR was named the 2011 winner of the ACRL Excellence in Academic Libraries award in the university category.

Name: Your Book
Description: Somos una biblioteca virtual centrada en la difusión, a un bajo costo, de contenidos académicos pensados exclusivamente para estudiantes universitarios. Surgimos a raíz de una necesidad que se vio intensificada en los últimos años: el acceso universal, legal y económico a los materiales de estudio.

Name: New Westminster Public Library
Description: NWPL meets the challenges facing libraries today by striving to balance the needs of traditional library users with those seeking the tools and experiences of a modern, technologically relevant public space. From directories and newspapers published in the 1800s to online news databases and downloadable e-books, the library is working hard to provide the means for our entire community to continually grow, learn, succeed, and enjoy!

Name: Deiters & Todd Library Consulting
Description:
Jim Deiters and Alex Todd combine for over 40 years of experience working in city, village and district libraries throughout northern Illinois; including 20 years of experience leading libraries as their director.  

Both Jim and Alex come from library families.  Jim's mother was director at the Tinley Park Public Library while Alex's dad was director at the Fountaindale Public Library District.  Although neither saw themselves as librarians when they were young, the profession's calling was ultimately too strong to resist.

Jim and Alex met through the Library Administrators Conference of Northern Illinois (LACONI). As partners in its leadership circle, they oversaw a successful restructuring of LACONI's popular salary survey . The two paired up again as co-chairs of ILA's Advocacy Committee.  During their tenure, they helped rewrite the committee's charter, implemented an annual work calendar and increased the number and quality of advocacy-related programs and workshops offered at ILA's annual conference, Reaching Forward and other regional and statewide events.

Name: TUM University Library
Description:
We are the scientific information center of TUM. At the interface of knowledge production, archiving, and dissemination, we provide fast and efficient access to scientific information and support researchers and students in optimally designing research projects, learning, and teaching processes. 

Our nine branch libraries at the Munich, Garching, Freising, and Straubing sites offer extensive literature holdings and access to information in science and technology, architecture, engineering, educational research and teaching, nutrition, land use, and the environment. As a technical and scientific library, we are a supra-regional literature and information provider for research institutions, companies, and private individuals.

Name: Newark Public Library NJ
Description: The Newark Public Library is the largest municipal library in New Jersey with a collection of more than 1.5 million books, audio and visual materials, and unique collections of prints, photographs, and historical documents. The historic Main Library is at 5 Washington Street in downtown Newark. The seven branches serve as neighborhood anchors in the City. Among the many free resources offered to the community throughout Newark are assistance with employment searches, cultural programs and films, exhibits, book signings, business research, and other events for adults and children. The Library is a vital part of the civic and cultural fabric of Newark.

Name: La Remise, Bibliothèque d'outils
Description:
La Remise est une coopérative de solidarité à but non lucratif qui entrepose des outils d’usage commun (cuisine, plein air, menuiserie, artisanat, mécanique, jardinage, électricité, etc.) qui sont mis à la disposition de ses membres sous forme de prêts.

La Remise offre aussi un espace de travail doté de nombreux outils spécialisés ainsi que la possibilité de suivre des formations ou des ateliers portant sur divers thèmes.

Les membres y développent leurs savoirs faire et leurs habiletés manuelles en plus d’y faire des rencontres intergénérationnelles et interculturelles.

La Remise renforce les liens sociaux, lutte contre le gaspillage des ressources et crée de la richesse pour la communauté.

S’impliquer à La Remise, c’est participer activement à un changement social pour appliquer l’économie circulaire en réponse à des besoins tant pratiques, économiques et écologiques. La Remise est bien plus qu’une bibliothèque d’outils mis à la disposition des citoyen·nes : c’est un lieu de partage et de transmission des connaissances qui est rendu possible grâce à l’implication de sa communauté.

Name: de Bibliotheek CultuurPuntAltena
Description: De levendige, eigentijdse Bibliotheek in Altena. Waar we samen werken aan een sterk, cultureel en sociaal Altena.

Name: TijdLab (Bibliotheek LocHal en Stadsmuseum Tilburg)
Description: Het TijdLab is een samenwerking van de Bibliotheek LocHal en Stadsmuseum Tilburg. Deze plek biedt tevens een platform voor de partners van Erfgoed Tilburg.

Name: Universitätsbibliothek Bochum
Description: Die Universitätsbibliothek Bochum ist eine zentrale Einrichtung der Ruhr-Universität Bochum. Sie nimmt zentrale Aufgaben der Literaturversorgung für Studium, Lehre und Forschung wahr und bietet unterstützende Dienstleistungen an. Neben traditionell bibliothekarische Aufgaben spielt die Weiterentwicklung von Angeboten im digitalen Umfeld eine wichtige Rolle. Mit einem Bestand von mehr als 1,6 Mio. gedruckten Medien in der Universitätsbibliothek sowie Lizenzen für eine Vielzahl an elektronischen Ressourcen gehört sie zu den großen Bibliotheken in Nordrhein-Westfalen. Sie steht neben den Universitätsangehörigen auch der allgemeinen Öffentlichkeit zur Verfügung.

Name: Monash Health Library
Description:
The Monash Health Library is an essential resource for Monash Health clinicians, students and researchers. The Library provides access to authoritative evidence, subscription resources and guidance on evidence based practice and conducting advanced research. Our aim is to ensure timely and effective access to medical information for the benefit of our healthcare service. We are also here to support you as the variety of information resources and exponential growth of data volumes challenge your information seeking skills with education, training and practical assistance.
There are physical library spaces in each of Monash Health's hospitals which are used in a multitude of ways – be it for studying, collaborating with other colleagues, engaging in educational training, working, using our collection or just taking some time out for a break. The Library is a place that helps this all happen. 
We are working hard to make our Library spaces as pleasant and welcoming as we can. Please come in for a visit, we’d be very happy to see you.

Name: Shreve Memorial Library
Description: Shreve Memorial Library transforms Caddo Parish lives with resources, services and support to create a better world by focusing on developing young readers, sparking imaginations, encouraging curiosity, fostering connection, and providing comfortable places. Shreve Memorial Library's 21-branch system is maintained by a parish-wide property tax millage to support the informational, educational and recreational needs of the people of Caddo Parish. Shreve Memorial Library values S.E.R.V.I.C.E., providing support, empowerment, resources, vision, innovation, customer satisfaction and ethics. Our vision is to dream, discover, do... Shreve Memorial Library and you!

Name: North Vancouver City Library
Description:
North Vancouver City Library is a landmark building located in the heart of the City of North Vancouver. The Library serves more than 55,000 residents as well as customers from neighboring cities and districts. We provide a fine balance of both traditional and emerging new library services, and take pride in providing excellent customer service. 

MISSION

Our purpose, our reason for being:

We foster the love of learning in all its forms, connecting people to experiences, ideas and one another.

VISION

What we aspire to be and do:

We will be the welcoming, vibrant hub of a thriving community by:

 • empowering growth
 • sparking curiosity
 • fostering creativity and innovation
 • galvanizing community potential

VALUES:

Our deeply held beliefs that guide our decision making:
 
 • learning and innovation 
 • community focus 
 • working together 
 • intention 
 • sustainability 
 • being welcoming and inclusive 
 • intellectual freedom
 • balance

STRATEGIC PRIORITIES

Where we will focus in order to achieve our mission, move toward our vision, and reflect our values:

• inspire learning, discovery and creation 
• create vibrant spaces 
• honour indigenous perspectives 
• enhance access and inclusion

Name: Bibloamigos
Description:
Bibloamigos es la experiencia más reconocida en la formulación, gestión, administración y ejecución de proyectos de arquitectura y estrategia social para bibliotecas, la cultura y educación al servicio del país.

Asociación de Amigos de las Bibliotecas, la Cultura y la Educación - Bibloamigos, asociación privada, de utilidad común, sin ánimo de lucro, con fines culturales y educativos.

Se creó en 2001 con el objetivo de apoyar y fortalecer el proyecto educativo y cultural que ofrecen las bibliotecas públicas de Bogotá y de las Bibliotecas del País, entendiéndola como una herramienta invaluable de inclusión social al servicio del país.

A partir de 2005, BibloAmigos amplió su ámbito de gestión a la de recursos público-privada para proyectos relacionados con las bibliotecas, la cultura y la educación a nivel nacional e internacional.

Name: Herning Bibliotekerne
Description:
I en tid præget af fake news, kunstig intelligens og en konstant strøm af information er Bibliotekerne mere aktuelle end nogensinde.

Hos Herning Bibliotekerne er fakta, troværdig viden og kildekritik fundamentet. Vi arbejder hver dag for at styrke borgernes digitale dannelse og skabe trygge rammer for videndeling og digital inklusion.

Det gør vi blandt andet gennem undervisningsforløb og workshops, børn- og unge, studerende og alle Hernings borgere lærer at navigere sikkert i et samfund i hastig forandring.

Bibliotekets kerneopgave – at sikre fri adgang til oplysning, viden og kultur – er samtidig et bidrag til at understøtte demokratiet. Det ansvar tager vi på os hver eneste dag.

Herning Bibliotekerne er stedet, hvor viden, kultur og kritisk tænkning går hånd i hånd – og hvor mennesker mødes og danner fællesskaber på tværs.

Name: Greenwich Library
Description: The mission of Greenwich Library is to provide exceptional resources, programs and services that promote the joy of lifelong learning and discovery, and to offer a welcoming place for people to gather and share experiences.

Name: My Legal Care
Description:
Traditionally, while reading a book, it is difficult to search text/content (no Ctrl + F button in offline approach). Further, in case while reference is to be made to other book/books, it is always difficult to refer content simultaneously with 2-3 books  at the same time. 

Even though on internet, as a virtual environment, search (find content), cross-reference (different tabs), comparison (edits) are integral to virtual environment, there is no single platform to conduct such features.

Thus, continuity, in reading really matters, thus while referring to the different provision (content) jumping across different books (offline) and different windows (online) is difficult. Such countless distractions slow down productivity. 

MLC intends to create a system that merges all the advantages of both traditional reading and digital reading to maximize people’s efficiency of time and be a one stop solution for a User to search any legislation (law) in India & should be easily readable & comparable for common man (or an expert).

Name: Ranking Bibliotecas
Description: Ranking Bibliotecas está dirigido a rectores, vicerrectores, directores de bibliotecas, profesionales de bibliotecología y administradores de las páginas web, para que conozcan el estado actual en el que se encuentran sus bibliotecas, comparando entre universidades de su ciudad, país o región. Así podrán evaluar y analizar la forma en que sus bibliotecas comunican, ofrecen y prestan los servicios a sus usuarios, observando si son acordes a las nuevas necesidades planteadas por el cambio en el contexto educativo.

Name: Biblioteksutveckling Västerbotten
Description:
Biblioteksutveckling Västerbotten har länet som arbetsfält och ingår i det nationella biblioteksnätverket. 

Vi arbetar för att främja utveckling, samarbete och kvalitet i länets folkbiblioteksverksamheter och för att stärka bibliotekens roll som en kraft för demokrati, delaktighet och mångfald. 

Biblioteksutveckling Västerbotten har också ett litteratur- och läsfrämjande uppdrag, samt ansvar för länets tre sjukhusbibliotek.

Name: tuslibrosvip.com
Description:
TusLibrosVIP.com: Tu librería de confianza

TusLibrosVIP.com es el lugar ideal para los amantes de la lectura. Descubre las últimas novedades literarias junto con los clásicos de siempre, todo en un solo sitio. Con una amplia selección de libros y noticias diarias sobre el mundo de la cultura, ofrecemos una experiencia completa para quienes disfrutan del placer de leer.

Las mejores novedades y clásicos de siempre:

Encuentra los libros más esperados del momento y redescubre aquellas historias que han dejado huella en la literatura. Desde novelas contemporáneas hasta grandes obras de la historia, nuestro catálogo se adapta a todos los gustos y preferencias.

Noticias diarias sobre literatura y cultura:

Mantente al día con las últimas noticias del mundo literario. Publicamos novedades sobre lanzamientos, eventos, premios y curiosidades del sector editorial. Además, abordamos temas culturales relevantes que enriquecen la experiencia de nuestros lectores.

Fragmentos y opiniones para descubrir nuevas lecturas:

Explora fragmentos de libros antes de decidir tu próxima lectura. Lee opiniones y reseñas de otros lectores para conocer diferentes perspectivas y encontrar historias que se adapten a tus intereses.

Descubre a los mejores autores:

Desde escritores consagrados hasta nuevas promesas de la literatura, en TusLibrosVIP.com te acercamos a los autores más destacados del panorama literario. Sumérgete en sus obras y descubre qué hace especial a cada uno de ellos.

Tu espacio literario en un solo lugar:

Si buscas un sitio donde encontrar los mejores libros, informarte sobre el mundo de la cultura y compartir tu pasión por la lectura, TusLibrosVIP.com es para ti. Explora, disfruta y deja que la literatura te transporte a nuevos mundos!

Name: PBZ Pestalozzi-Bibliothek Zürich
Description:
Die PBZ Pestalozzi-Bibliothek Zürich ist die öffentliche Bibliothek in Zürich. Sie ist eine moderne öffentliche Bibliothek mit einem aktuellen und breiten Medienangebot. Ihre Standorte sind verkehrsgünstig gelegen und attraktiv ausgestattet.

Die PBZ fördert die Lesefähigkeit, weckt die Freude am Lesen und stärkt die Lesekultur. Sie ermöglicht die allgemeine Weiterbildung und leistet einen Beitrag zur Aneignung und Auffrischung von Wissen. Die PBZ vermittelt Anregungen für eine sinnvolle Freizeitgestaltung. Die angebotenen Medien dienen der Unterhaltung und wecken Neugierde.

Die offene Atmosphäre in den Räumlichkeiten der PBZ lädt ein zum Lesen, Arbeiten und Verweilen. Die Standorte sind gut mit öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln erreichbar; die Öffnungszeiten sind kundenorientiert. Fachkundiges Personal steht den Besucherinnen und Besuchern für die persönliche Beratung zur Verfügung. Regelmässige Veranstaltungen bereichern das Leistungsangebot der PBZ.

Die PBZ ist offen für Menschen unterschiedlicher Herkunft und verschiedenen Alters. Durch das fremdsprachige Angebot wendet sich die PBZ auch an Menschen aus anderen Kulturen und fördert deren Integration und Beteiligung am öffentlichen Leben.

Name: Bibliotheken Zuidoost Fryslân (BZOF)
Description: De bibliotheek is - offline en online - een laagdrempelige plek waar je je welkom en veilig voelt. Een aantrekkelijke plek die je inspireert om kennis en vaardigheden op te doen of te vergroten. Om actief mee te doen met de maatschappij en je talenten te ontplooien. Ook is de bibliotheek de plek van ontspanning, van rust, van ontmoeten, van het uitwisselen van kennis, gedachten en ideeën. Iedereen is welkom.

Name: Effatà - Società Cooperativa di Promozione Culturale
Description:
Effatà - Società Cooperativa di Promozione Culturale.  Opera dal 2003 nell’ambito della fornitura di servizi e della promozione culturale. È una società cooperativa di lavoro a mutualità prevalente, con in organico una ventina di soci, tutti bibliotecari.
La Cooperativa si propone di valorizzare il patrimonio librario, storico, artistico e ambientale del territorio permettendone la massima fruizione e comunicazione attraverso nuovi approcci e facendo uso di nuovi media. Il core-business della cooperativa è l’attività di gestione biblioteche e tutte le iniziative ad essa correlate. La scelta di operare nel settore dei beni culturali nasce dal comune interesse dei soci per le diverse espressioni del sapere in quanto mezzo di promozione dell’uomo. 
Punti di forza della Cooperativa sono la conoscenza del territorio e l’attenzione alle persone, che consentono di attivare progetti che mettano gli utenti al centro dell’interesse del servizio bibliotecario. 
La nostra Cooperativa applica un Sistema di Gestione per la Qualità conforme alla norma UNI EN ISO 9001:2015 per l’attività di “Progettazione ed erogazione del servizio di gestione biblioteche”, 
Accanto all’attività istituzionale propria delle biblioteche, la Cooperativa ha svolto in questi anni con ottimi risultati attività di promozione culturale, del libro e della lettura, sia nei comuni, nelle scuole e nelle biblioteche gestite, sia esternamente presso altri enti, organizzando rassegne letterarie di incontri con l’autore, laboratori e letture per bambini, sia in biblioteca ad utenza libera sia a scuola, eventi culturali (concerti, cineforum, viaggi ecc.), e concorsi per fidelizzare gli utenti della biblioteca sia bambini sia adulti. Svolge inoltre attività editoriale, con il marchio proprio delle edizioni il Roseto, con all’attivo una quindicina di pubblicazioni di storia locale e di autori del territorio. Inoltre ha promosso corsi di formazione rivolti sia a bibliotecari sia a utenti delle biblioteche.

Name: Open Library Foundation
Description:
The Open Library Foundation (the Foundation) was created in 2016 as an unbiased, independent not-for-profit organization designed to ensure the availability, accessibility and sustainability of open source and open access projects for and by libraries. The Foundation seeks to enable and support collaboration among librarians, technologists, designers, service providers and vendors to share expertise and resources and to create innovative new software and resources that support libraries. We believe that open discourse in a diverse and inclusive community will better identify and characterize challenges and opportunities, and enable paradigm-shifting solutions.

Software developed by projects hosted by the Foundation is freely available under an Apache v2 license to enable personal, institutional or commercial use, and to sustain an open collaboration of interested parties. The Foundation simply provides the infrastructure by which the library community at large can organize, contribute to, and benefit from our projects — ensuring availability and a “safe haven” for our projects’ output that is separated from the needs and goals of any single contributor, user or affiliated party.

Name: Oil, Gas and Salt Resources Library
Description: The Oil, Gas & Salt Resources Library was founded in 1998. We are a Geoscience Research Centre with information pertaining to the Petroleum sector of Ontario. We believe the highest quality of information is a fundamental requirement for the responsible harvesting of energy and environmental management.

Name: Michigan eLibrary
Description:
The Michigan eLibrary (MeL) is Michigan's online digital library.  MeL contains reliable resources which include a state-wide shared catalog of over 400 participating libraries on both peninsulas, a suite of over 30 subscription databases containing full-text information from magazines, journals, newspapers, practice tests, courses, ebooks, car repair manuals and much more.  MeL is available 24/7 to all Michigan residents at no cost.  

The Michigan eLibrary is the flagship program of the Library of Michigan (http://michigan.gov/libraryofmichgan).   MeL is made possible by grant funds from the U.S. Institute of Museum and Library Services (IMLS) administered by the State of Michigan through the Library of Michigan with additional funding provided by the State of Michigan.

Name: Literaturhaus Zürich
Description: Das Literaturhaus Zürich versteht sich als Schnittstelle zwischen Literaturschaffenden und Öffentlichkeit. Neben einer reich bestückten Bibliothek und schönen Lesesälen bietet das Haus der Museumsgesellschaft Zürich an rund 100 Abenden Raum für ein Literaturforum mit Autorenlesungen, Diskussionen und Vorträgen. Podiumsgespräche mit bekannten in- und ausländischen Schriftstellern laden zur Auseinandersetzung mit Sprache und Literatur ein. Zudem führt es Symposien, Workshops und Veranstaltungen zu Literatur und anderen Künsten durch.

Name: Biblioteca Celestino Domingues (ESHTE)
Description:
► Where smart & innovative minds meet  ◆ Identifies, Qualifies & Delivers Specialized Contents in Hospitality & Tourism  Follow Us!

A biblioteca desenvolve-se em três pisos, funciona em sistema de livre acesso aos vários espaços e ao fundo documental, excetuando a área de reservados. Destina-se a utilizadores internos (alunos, docentes e funcionários da ESHTE e da EHTE) e a utilizadores externos. As duas salas de leitura estão equipadas com pontos de acesso para computadores portáteis, cobertura wireless e têm cerca de 100 lugares sentados.

 Em Maio de 2011, a convite da ESHTE, Celestino Domingues, apadrinhou o espaço da Biblioteca tendo descerrado uma placa comemorativa dos 20 anos da Escola, com a inscrição do seu nome. Passou a designar-se desde então por Biblioteca Celestino Domingues.

Para conhecer as últimas novidades e tendências, siga a página Showcase da BCD no LinkedIn | For the latest news and trends follow BCD's LinkedIn Showcase page

Name: Virginia Library Association
Description: The purpose of the Association is to develop, promote, and improve library and information services, library staff, and the profession of librarianship in order to advance literacy and learning and to ensure access to information in the Commonwealth of Virginia.

Name: Boston Library Consortium
Description: Founded in 1970, the Boston Library Consortium focuses on resource sharing, professional development, collaboration, and advocacy among 19 public and private academic research universities, liberal arts colleges, special research libraries and state libraries in Massachusetts, Connecticut, Rhode Island, and New Hampshire. Beyond the BLC’s commitment to providing high quality and cost-effective sharing of print and digital content, the consortium serves as a forum for a broad range of library practice areas and as an incubator for projects and initiatives significant to academic and research libraries throughout New England.

Name: mk Solutions
Description: Experience has its advantages! Let mk Solutions provide you with a turnkey library automation solution to improve patron self-service and circulation workflow.  mk products include RFID systems, patron self-check & payment kiosks, security gates, staff workstations, inventory management and automated materials handling.  Our self-service lending machine, the mk LibDispenser, provides 24-hour access library services in convenient locations for patrons. mk guides the library completely from start to finish, including initial system design to post-installation support.  All products purchased from mk Solutions will be custom manufactured by our experienced team and tailored to meet your specific needs.

Name: Kauno apskrities viešoji Ąžuolyno biblioteka
Description: Neišsemiama žinių, kūrybos, kokybiško laisvalaikio ir atradimų erdvė Jūsų atokvėpiui ir įkvėpimui.

Name: Friends of the Central Library
Description:
Friends of the Central Library raises funds to support the Central Library, the hub of the Onondaga County Public Library which includes branches and suburban libraries. Since 1997, FOCL has donated over $650,000 to support library programs by purchasing books and materials.

FOCL produces and promotes the Friends of the Central Library Author Series, the largest library-related lecture series in the country. Friends of the Central Library has invited over 150 world-famous authors to Syracuse to entertain, inform and inspire our Central New York audience.

Friends of the Central Library believes that libraries are critical to the vibrancy of a community. Libraries afford residents opportunities to job search, research historical and genealogy records, educate, and entertain. FOCL supports and funds literacy efforts and resources.

Name: Pequot Library Association
Description:
Bringing Literature, Music, Art, Science & the Humanities to our Community
Our mission extends far beyond most traditional lending libraries. Pequot Library is housed in a historic building, framed by a Great Lawn, and located on over three acres in the charming village of Southport in Fairfield, CT. A small gem to be discovered, Pequot Library is a vibrant programming library where patrons arrive for high-impact cultural events and leave enriched and inspired.

Experience award-winning, professional musical performances in the prized acoustic of the auditorium/concert hall (which is perhaps the finest performance venue of its size in the region) and discover distinctive exhibitions in The Perkin Gallery. We integrate Pequot’s nationally significant Special Collections, local artists’ work, and renowned traveling displays from partnering institutions, on display free and open to everyone. Enjoy stimulating public programs: Meet best-selling Authors, explore important Issues of the Day with recognized experts, and view thought- provoking films and documentaries. More than 19,750 individuals of all ages are educated and entertained by over 400 programs each year.

Pequot Library Brings Culture to Life!

Patrons flock to Pequot Library from all over Fairfield, Southport, Westport, Easton, Weston, and since Pequot Library is a destination library, people of all ages come from Bridgeport, Trumbull, Stratford, Stamford, Norwalk, Greenwich, Monroe, New Haven and beyond. During a five-day period we tracked 21 different zip codes of people visiting Pequot Library and participating in programs. For our Summer Book Sale book lovers and book sellers travel from as far away as California, and all the other 50 states.

Follow us on Facebook: www.facebook.com/PequotLibrary
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/PequotLibrary

Name: Lubuto Library Partners
Description:
Lubuto Library Partners creates high quality, open-access libraries to serve Africa's street kids and other vulnerable children and youth. The library provides a safe haven and an opening to the world beyond the bleak streets. Lubuto offers educational services and the simple pleasure of books and the arts for children who find themselves alone in the world. Giving the burgeoning numbers of street children the chances they deserve to develop their imaginations and to realize their potential is Lubuto’s challenge.

Lubuto’s highly professional organization, in the US and Zambia, does not work as an isolated charity. The sustainability of its program is ensured through partnership with government, community-based organizations, and professional groups, and Lubuto libraries are owned and run by Zambians.

Name: Ohio Public Library Information Network
Description: The Ohio Public Library Information Network (OPLIN) provides broadband internet connections and related information services to Ohio public libraries. Our primary mission is to ensure that all Ohio residents have fast, free public internet access through the 251 independent local public library systems in Ohio, as well as the use of high-quality research databases not freely available online. Though the eventual consumers of our services are often members of the general public, our actual customers are in fact limited to the public library systems of Ohio.

Name: Bibliothèque Félix Houphouët-Boigny (Académie des sciences d'outre-mer)
Description:
La bibliothèque F. Houphouët-Boigny de l’Académie des sciences d’outre-mer possède près de 130 000 documents : 115 000 monographies, 4 600 périodiques dont 100 vivants, plus de 600 cartes historiques, un millier de manuscrits et environ 10 000 brochures et tirés à part. Elle possède un fonds riche, concernant particulièrement l'Afrique sub-saharienne, le pourtour méditerranéen, le Maghreb-Machrek mais aussi le sud-Asie, la péninsule indochinoise et l'Inde. 

Ouverte au public, elle est le principal pôle de référence en région parisienne pour l’outre-mer français et étranger, passé et actuel. Elle est fréquentée, en dehors des académiciens et des membres de la Société des amis, par des professeurs des Universités, des chercheurs, des doctorants, des journalistes, des écrivains et des étudiants de toutes origines.

C’est un fonds vivant de mémoire coloniale, alimenté essentiellement par les services de presse - qui font l'objet de recensions mensuelles - et les achats. Les dons et legs, parmi lesquels les archives d'illustres académiciens, y participent également. Les critères d’enrichissement de la collection sont définis par une charte documentaire depuis 2019. La bibliothèque met, en outre, petit à petit à disposition les 60 000 volumes du fonds patrimonial unique « Afrique, Outre-mer et colonies » de la DILA.
 
La bibliothèque porte depuis le 14 février 2020 le nom de Félix Houphouët-Boigny, après son inauguration par le président de la République de Côte d’Ivoire M. Alassane Ouattara. Médecin, ministre en France puis en Côte d’Ivoire, il y devient ensuite président de 1960 à 1993. 

Membre de l’Académie pendant vingt ans, son parcours exceptionnel et emblématique, bien au-delà de la Côte d’Ivoire et de l’Afrique, a ainsi favorisé le choix de la figure du président Houphouët-Boigny pour baptiser la bibliothèque. Cette dernière porte ainsi désormais un nom qui manifeste sa richesse dans le domaine des pays qui sont au-delà des mers et son ouverture au grand large.

Name: Boulder Public Library Foundation
Description: Our Library is the cornerstone of our community. And programs are the cornerstone of our Library. By funding programs like BLDG 61 Makerspace, Lego Story Club, and Computer Science Education Week, the Boulder Library Foundation is working to ensure our Library’s remarkable work continues far into the future.

Name: LibbyApp
Description: There are thousands of ebooks and audiobooks, hand-selected by your library, available for reading. Explore the collection through catalog guides, subjects, featured titles, and curated lists. It's a delight to discover new books through Libby.

Name: Mid-Hudson Library System
Description: The Mid-Hudson Library System (MHLS), headquartered in Poughkeepsie, NY, is a membership organization of sixty-six (66) independent public and free association libraries in Columbia, Dutchess, Greene, Putnam, and Ulster counties. MHLS insures the public's right to free access, facilitates economical resource sharing, and promotes professional library services while working in partnership with libraries and other service organizations.

Name: Elkhart Public Library
Description: Unlock your potential and read with everyone! We have all the items you expect, plus events and programs to move you. Like our books, check us out.

Name: Bibliotheek Dommeldal
Description: Vernieuwend Bibliotheeknetwerk met vestigingen in Geldrop, Heeze, Mierlo, Nuenen & Son en Breugel.

Name: OBA NEXT
Description: OBA NEXT wordt een plek waar talentontwikkeling, debat en kennis over nieuwe technologieën centraal staan. Zo kunnen Amsterdammers zich ontwikkelen op thema’s als betrouwbare informatie, online weerbaarheid en (digitale) nieuwe media: urgente thema’s voor een steeds verder digitaliserende stad. De programma’s van OBA NEXT zijn gevarieerd, laagdrempelig en voor alle Amsterdammers toegankelijk.

Name: Berkeley Public Library (CA)
Description:
The Berkeley Public Library has served the people of Berkeley since 1893, and looks forward to providing many more years of community service.

The Library is one of the most heavily used libraries in California, serving a local population of 118,950 and more from the surrounding area. (US Census estimate as of July 1, 2022)

The Central Library, located in downtown Berkeley, and four recently renovated branches ensure easy library access for residents in Berkeley’s many and diverse neighborhoods.

Get a library card, visit one of our locations, attend a program, or explore our website for access to new material and featured events. We offer a variety of materials and services for all ages and interests from Storytimes to a Tool Lending Library. The Library's website gives 24/7 access to many services including:

- downloading eBooks,
- streaming movies and music,
- ordering books and other media through Our Catalog, and Link+
- reading magazines and newspapers online

Name: Ourlibrary کتابخانه ما
Description:
کتابخانه ما یک مکان دنج برای اهالی علاقه مند به کتاب و کتاب خوانی است، لازم نیست اسامی تمام نویسندگان را از حفظ باشید و یا کتابخانه اتان پر باشد از کتاب های قطور، فقط کمی علاقه کافیست تا یکی از اهالی این کتابخانه باشید..
هدف کلی این کتابخانه را شاید بهتر باشد اینطور توضیح بدهیم، اینکه در این روزها که همه امان یک جورهایی گرفتار کار و زندگی و درگیر روزمرگی ها هستیم و فرصت چندانی هم برای خواندن کتاب های مختلف نداریم چیزی شبیه به “کتابخانه ما” بتواند با چند خط، با یک پاراگراف ما را به دنیای کتاب ها ببرد. چیزی که نه وقتمان گرفته شود و نه بی کتاب بمانیم. بهتر از هیچی نیست؟
شاید برایتان تعجب برانگیز باشد که چرا ما به جای استفاده از کلمه صحیح ourlibrary از welibrary استفاده کرده ایم! باید برایتان بگوییم که خب دلیلی نداشت جز کمی خلاقیت!

Name: Vilnius University Library
Description:
Established back in 1570, closely intertwined with the history of Vilnius University, Lithuania and Europe, during the long centuries Vilnius University Library has been fostering academic culture and traditions at the same time fearlessly facing challenges and introducing innovative solutions.

Mission: In line with the mission of Vilnius University, to create inviting environment that support information search, studies, research, and cultural learning.

Name: Refread
Description:
Refread can help your library reach more users online and serve them millions of e-resources in a simplified manner.

Refread started in year 2016 with the mission to help Libraries go beyond traditional formats of knowledge by aggregating multi-media learning content and information feeds. In a short span, Refread has become the platform of choice for campuses in India because of its vast collection and rich user experience. With a powerful discovery engine, seamless remote access service and native mobile apps, your library will have everything you need to deliver your e-collection to every user, everywhere.

Name: Gerber/Hart Library and Archives
Description:
ABOUT GERBER/HART
Gerber/Hart Library and Archives was founded in 1981 on the belief that knowledge is key to dispelling homophobia and the marginalization of sexual and gender minorities. Gerber/Hart collects, preserves, and makes accessible items related to LGBTQ history and culture. Open to everyone, Gerber/Hart is dedicated to promoting research, learning, exploration, and discovery in a safe atmosphere. Focused primarily on the Midwest, Gerber/Hart has grown to become one of the larger independent LGBTQ libraries and archives, containing a 22,500 volume circulating library, 600 periodicals, 700 newsletters, 150 archive collections (980 linear feet), 1,700 linear feet of Special Collections items, and four exhibition venues.

CONTACT INFORMATION
E: info@gerberhart.org
P: 773.381.8030

HOURS
Wednesday: 6 to 9 pm
Thursdays: 6 to 9 pm
Fridays: Noon to 4 pm
Saturday: 10 am to 4 pm

LOCATION
Gerber/Hart Library and Archives is located at 6500 North Clark Street between Pratt and Devon Avenue. Free parking is available in the lot adjacent to the 6500 North Clark Street building. Bus routes #36 Broadway and #151 Sheridan start and end at the turnaround across the street. The #22 Clark Street bus going north stops directly across the street, the #22 going south stops in front of the police station next to Gerber/Hart.

Name: Les Recyclables Genève
Description:
Amateurs de lecture et de bons petits plats, bienvenue aux Recyclables.

Au menu, une Librairie-Café où goûts littéraires riment avec sens culinaires. 

Nos objectifs, qualité et convivialité pour vous permettre de composer à petits prix de savoureux mélanges de romans, salades, polars, curry, livres en anglais et cakes salés.

Name: Fondren Library (Rice University)
Description: Located at one of the country’s leading research universities, Fondren Library enables its employees to contribute to the university’s research, teaching and community engagement mission, enjoy first-rate benefits, be part of an inclusive community, and grow professionally. With about 100 librarians and support staff across three facilities, Fondren is large enough to offer a range of resources and opportunities and small enough to be nimble and collaborative. Fondren embraces Rice’s culture of care by promoting inclusion (including through a mentoring program), empowering staff, and encouraging a work/life balance.

Name: NANNA
Description:
Au pied de Notre-Dame de Paris, dans le Port de Montebello, Nanna ouvrira ses portes au printemps 2026.
Péniche dédiée à la littérature et au monde du livre, Nanna rassemblera une collection curatée de 5 000 ouvrages : littérature contemporaine, classiques, poésie, philosophie, récits de voyage, beaux-arts, bande dessinée.

Tous les ouvrages, de seconde main, seront mis à disposition en libre accès : chacun pourra les lire, les emprunter ou en déposer d’autres, dans un esprit de confiance et de circulation des savoirs.

Autour de cette collection vivante, Nanna proposera une programmation littéraire régulière : lancements de livres, dédicaces, ateliers d’écriture, enregistrements de podcasts, rendez-vous BookTok… Des événements qui se prolongeront en soirées, autour de cocktails et d’une ambiance plus festive.

Name: Supreme Court of Canada Library
Description: Serves the Supreme Court Justices and staff.

Name: Sharjah Public Libraries - مكتبات الشارقة العامة
Prince George Public Library
Description: The Prince George Public Library is a publicly funded library system located in Prince George, B.C.. Between our two branches, we serve over 318,000 visitors annually.

Name: Johnson County Public Library-Indiana
Description:
Johnson County Public Library connects people, resources and experiences. It’s a place where everyone is welcome. It’s a place to learn through reading, discovering and creating. A library is a community of empowered learners, enthusiastic readers and engaged citizens. 

The Johnson County Public Library-Indiana is made up of four branches (Clark-Pleasant, Franklin, Trafalgar and White River) and the JCPL Services Center, which houses Administration, Human Resources, the Adult Learning Center, and the Marketing & Communications office. 

For detailed hours, information, and access to our catalog and other resources, please visit us at pageafterpage.org.

Name: Auto-Graphics - A Soutron Global Company
Description: Auto-Graphics is the only publicly-traded library software vendor to provide software solutions along with full financial transparency. The company’s nearly seven (7) decades of providing solutions to the markets it serves reflects how well Auto-Graphics has listened to their customer base and stayed abreast of new technologies, continuously reinventing their products and services to help libraries of all sizes become more efficient and patron-centric. The Auto-Graphics browser-based AGent Software Platform for patrons and staff – currently used by more than 11,000 libraries in North America – is comprised of SHAREit, a Web-based resource sharing solution providing patron-initiated sharing, circulation-based interlibrary loan (ILL); VERSO, an integrated public library system (ILS); RESEARCHit , a federated search and discovery module; and MONTAGEdc, a digital collection solution. All products are fully Web and cloud-based, and are available via a Software as a Service (SaaS) subscription. For more information, please visit www.auto-graphics.com. Auto-Graphics is a public company that trades under the stock symbol AIFS.

Name: Koninklijke Nederlandse Vereniging van Informatieprofessionals
Description:
In 1912 werd de NVB opgericht als de Nederlandse Vereniging van Bibliothecarissen en Bibliotheekambtenaren en de toenmalige argumenten daarvoor zijn anno nu nog steeds valide: men had behoefte aan uitwisseling van kennis en ervaring, aan contacten met collegae, men wilde dat de belangen werden behartigd bij beleidsontwikkeling op nationaal en internationaal niveau, dat er werd geluisterd naar wensen uit het beroepsveld met betrekking tot opleiding. Oorspronkelijk telde de Vereniging leden afkomstig van alle bibliotheektypen, inclusief openbare bibliotheken, hoewel er daarvoor een aparte vereniging bestond, de in 1908 opgerichte Centrale Vereniging voor Openbare Bibliotheken (CV).

In 2012 bestond de NVB honderd jaar en kreeg het predicaat Koninklijk, in 2013 veranderd de naam NVB naar KNVI.

Name: Library World Tour
Description:
Il progetto Library World Tour è stato ideato e creato da Mario Coffa, bibliotecario e archivista per creare una rete internazionale tra bibliotecari o professionisti dell'informazione di tutto il mondo al fine di condividere e scoprire idee, esperienze, abilità e conoscenze che andranno a beneficio della loro professione, organizzazione e paese. Dal 2018 Mario ha l'opportunità di raccogliere diverse interviste di bibliotecari e bibliotecarie di diverse parti del mondo che, con la loro voce offrono un prezioso e forte contributo al lavoro di molte altre biblioteche nel mondo. L'esperienza di ciascuno di loro racconta di un mondo fondamentalmente unito, di bibliotecari preparati e coraggiosi che ogni giorno riscoprono la bellezza dell'opera più bella del mondo. Non ci sono solo libri ma anche strumenti. Non ci sono solo persone ma intere comunità. Forse Mario non potrà mai viaggiare per il mondo e visitare fisicamente ciascuna di queste biblioteche e incontrare i loro lavoratori, ecco il motivo di questo viaggio virtuale.

Con il patrocinio dell'Associazione Biblioteche Italiane, sezione Umbria e rivista culturale Insula Europea.

E grazie a ciascuno di voi!

Name: Biblio - Livres PDF Gratuit
Description: Un monde de Livres et Romans gratuits à télécharger PDF, Lisez et Télécharger vos livres de choix en Format PDF

Name: Cecil County Public Library
Description:
Cecil County, Maryland, population approximately 100,000, is located between Baltimore and Philadelphia, near I-95 and Wilmington, Delaware.  At the top of the Chesapeake Bay, Cecil County offers unparalleled access to the bay and its tributaries.  Although predominantly a rural county of charming water-oriented small towns, and horse,  vegetable, fruit, and dairy farms, Cecil County’s population is growing rapidly.  Cecil’s proximity to Philadelphia, Baltimore, Newark, and Wilmington, provides easy access to metropolitan and suburban areas.  Cecil County is on the MARC train line.  Cecil offers excellent community life, strong neighborhood schools, the opportunities presented by growth, and extraordinary natural beauty. 

Cecil County Public Library system (“CCPL”) has seven branches. CCPL is feeling the pressure of rapid community growth and has developed plans for expansion of its services and facilities.  CCPL has a history of exceptionally strong programming for adults, children, and young adults.  CCPL uses the SirsiDynix automation system, has full Internet access, and uses the iBistro web catalog.  Its Central Library, based in Elkton is 25,000 sq. ft. and includes a 4,000 sq. ft. enclosed children’s room.  The Rising Sun branch has 7,500 sq. ft. and the recently-opened Chesapeake City branch has 5,700 sq. feet. The Perryville branch library, which opened in 2008, has 15,000 square feet.  The communities of North East, Cecilton, and Port Deposit are also served by thriving library branch locations.  The CCPL staff, now numbering nearly one hundred, values creativity, outstanding customer service, team spirit, and professionalism.

Name: CBB
Description: De CBB, Christelijke Bibliotheek voor Blinden en Slechtzienden zet zich in voor het omzetten en beschikbaar houden van christelijke lectuur in passende leesvormen zoals gesproken vorm, braille en grootletter. Al meer dan 100 jaar ervaring!

Name: AMALIA - Archivi, Manoscritti e Libri Antichi
Description: AMALIA, for the safeguard and promotion of written cultural heritage

Name: BiblioTips
Description: BiblioTips es una comunidad en redes sociales destinada al público general, académico y profesional que encuentra interés en el mundo bibliotecario.

Name: Connecticut Library Consortium
Description: The Connecticut Library Consortium leverages the collective power of our 950+ members to initiate cost-effective, value-added services to strengthen libraries. We are Connecticut libraries’ essential partner for purchasing, collaboration, and connection.

Name: Sons of the American Revolution
Description:
Patriotism - Education - History
The Sons of the American Revolution is a 501(c)(3), non-political, non-sectarian, and non-secretive organization.
The Sons of the American Revolution honors our Revolutionary War patriot ancestors by promoting patriotism, serving our communities, and educating and inspiring future generations about the founding principles of our Country.

Name: ARCHIVES REUNION
Description:
ARCHIVES RÉUNION, 1ʳᵉ SOCIÉTÉ DE TIERS-ARCHIVAGE AGRÉÉE D’OUTRE-MER
Par arrêté du ministère de la Culture et de la Communication en date du 3 avril 2012, puis du 24 novembre 2017, Archives Réunion a reçu l’agrément pour la conservation d’Archives publiques courantes et intermédiaires pour son site de Sainte-Marie à La Réunion.
ARCHIVES RÉUNION vous propose toute une gamme de solutions d’archivage physique répondant aux normes et référentiels du métier.
Votre contact : Thierry MARCIA - 06 92 59 43 31 - t.marcia@archives-reunion.com

Name: Winter Park Library
Description: The Winter Park Library connects people to knowledge and resources to amplify learning and build a stronger community.

Name: Evansville Vanderburgh Public Library
Description:
The eight locations of the Evansville Vanderburgh Public Library create experiences, opportunities and an atmosphere for lifelong learning.  Our resources and services allow anyone to explore, create, ignite their curiosity and find the confidence to venture into something new - whatever that may be.  Check out how the EVPL is redefining the traditional library!
• eBooks
• eReader checkouts
• Online magazines
• Illustrated eBooks
• Passport services
• Meeting room space with audio/visual support
• Public access computers & Wi-fi
• Latest release movies
• Classes & events
• Downloadable music

Name: Central Arkansas Library System
Description: The Central Arkansas Library System provides resources and services to help residents reach their full potential, and to inspire discovery, learning, and cultural expression.

Name: Huntsville-Madison County Public Library
Description:
The Huntsville-Madison County Public Library (HMCPL) was founded in 1818, when Alabama was still a part of the Mississippi Territory and it is the oldest continuing library in the state.

This is the public’s library. HMCPL is a13-branch system that serves all of Madison County, Ala. For 200 years, the library has been dedicated to enriching the educational, recreational and cultural lives of communities in Madison County through materials, information and programs that foster a lifelong love of learning. 

In addition to the collection of over 500,000 items, HMCPL also provides outreach services, a BookMobile and BookBike, online services, training, an extensive digital collection, public-use computers, free Wi-fi, meeting spaces and much more. For more information about HMCPL and its services, please visit hmcpl.org.

Name: Vancouver Island Regional Library (VIRL)
Description:
As a regional system, Vancouver Island Regional Library (VIRL) covers a vast geographic area, from Sooke and Sidney in the south to Port Hardy, Haida Gwaii and the Central Coast. Our system, the fifth largest in British Columbia, totals more than 42,000 square kilometres and includes a mix of urban, rural, and remote communities that work together to ensure exemplary library services for all our members. 

Each of our member jurisdictions contributes to a pooled budgeting system, as mandated by the Library Act. With this model, VIRL is able to leverage economies of scale, discounted prices on library materials, and a robust eLibrary with the very latest in ebooks, audiobooks, streaming and downloadable music, movies and TV, and online learning opportunities.  

VIRL uses a floating collection, which means that no matter where someone lives, they can request any title in our collection and have it delivered to their branch. This model ensures equity of access for all VIRL cardholders and means they can take advantage of the entirety of our collection. We focus on providing the highest quality titles, both in print and digital formats, for all of our cardholders.

Our branches reflect how people are changing the way they interact with their libraries. 21st Century libraries must balance the traditional services we have always provided with the flexible spaces, new technologies, digital resources, and exciting programming that people expect today.

Name: Bibliotheek Zuid-Hollandse Eilanden
Description: Bibliotheek de Boekenberg en Bibliotheek Zuid-Hollandse Delta gaan samen verder als Bibliotheek Zuid-Hollandse Eilanden. Hierdoor kunnen wij jou nog meer bieden: een uitgebreide collectie, een deskundig onderwijsaanbod en gevarieerde culturele en maatschappelijke programmering. We ondersteunen inwoners met het ontwikkelen van essentiële (basis)vaardigheden voor een volwaardige deelname aan de samenleving. Bij ons is altijd ruimte om te leren, te ontdekken en geïnspireerd te raken.

Name: KIT-Bibliothek
Description:
Die KIT-Bibliothek sichert als Partner von Forschung, Lehre und Innovation die Informationsversorgung des Karlsruher Instituts für Technologie (KIT). Die KIT-Bibliothek stellt sich den Herausforderungen der digitalen Informationsgesellschaft und erhöht durch innovative Technologien und individuelle Serviceleistungen kontinuierlich die Attraktivität für ihre Nutzerinnen und Nutzer.

Die Schwerpunkte ihrer Informationsdienste liegen auf der Unterstützung des gesamten Forschungsprozesses und auf der Gestaltung attraktiver Lernorte sowie der Förderung der Informationskompetenz.

Die KIT-Bibliothek entwickelt zur Erreichung dieser Zielsetzungen laufend ihre Unternehmenskultur weiter. Sie stärkt so die Motivation der Mitarbeitenden und fördert interne und externe Kooperationen auf unterschiedlichen Ebenen.

Name: Manga Shanga
Description: Discover captivating manga and novels that ignite your imagination. Immerse yourself in epic adventures and compelling stories. Explore our collection and embark on a journey beyond the ordinary. Let the power of words and art transport you to extraordinary realms. Start your adventure today!

Name: North Vancouver District Public Library
Description: At North Vancouver District Public Library, we inspire learning, discovery, creativity and collaboration in our community. Serving almost 90,000 residents at three full-service locations and one Express Library throughout the beautiful District of North Vancouver, we are proud to provide free and equitable access to welcoming spaces, diverse collections and digital resources, a wide range of technology and computers, including StoryLab, and so much more. Proudly late fine free, our libraries are the destination for our growing community to connect, share, and inspire.

Name: Gladstone's Library
Description:
Gladstone’s Library is the UK’s finest residential library, with 26 bedrooms, an on-site restaurant and a comfortable guest lounge. It is the UK’s only Prime Ministerial library, built following a bequest from four times Prime Minister of Great Britain, William Ewart Gladstone.

Our world-famous Reading Rooms house thousands of books, including items from Gladstone’s own personal library, and offer protected study spaces in which to read, think and work. They are accessible to registered Readers, Researchers and residents. It is free to become a Reader and work within the Reading Rooms.

The current building, raised in 1902 and designed by John Douglas, was funded by public subscription. It is home to unique archival collections, making it a destination for scholars from across the globe. Gladstone’s Library is a self-sustaining registered charity; every booking and donation made helps maintain the Grade I listed building and the collections it protects.

Name: MOHAMMED BIN RASHID LIBRARY
Description:
Built in the shape of a rehl, the traditional wooden book rest used to hold the Quran, our library building overlooks Dubai Creek. Our seven story structure houses Dubai's most ambitious cultural initiative to-date, establishing a lighthouse of knowledge, culture and creativity with an objective to grow a collection by acquiring millions of books from around the world.


Founded by law no. 14 in 2016 during the national Year of Reading, the library is the vision of His Highness Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum. Supporting Dubai and UAE goals to develop a knowledge society, the creation of the Mohammed bin Rashid Library follows a number of important initiatives set in motion to promote and encourage reading, literacy and Arabic literature.

Name: Palm Beach County Library System
Description:
The Palm Beach County Library System is your place to connect, inspire and enrich. Visit one of our 17 locations located throughout the County for entertainment, education and exploration. We offer materials in many formats to suit your needs. We have books in hardback, paperback, large print, downloadable and audio formats. You can check out DVDs and music CDs. Attend one of our cultural activities, computer classes, musical performances or meetings. 

Our professional information specialists can help you find the information you need for your research paper, business venture, family history and medical condition. If you can’t make it to one of our locations, then check out our online resource and outreach services. We have e-books, magazines, newspapers and research sources on our website, www.pbclibrary.org. The Bookmobile has about 40 stops a month and we offer outreach services to those who are visually or physically unable to visit the library.

Name: Bibliothèque et Villa Marmottan
Description:
Propriété léguée en 1932 à l’Académie des beaux-arts par Paul Marmottan, historien, collectionneur et mécène, le site de la Bibliothèque et Villa Marmottan, situé à Boulogne-Billancourt, possède une remarquable collection de livres anciens, d’objets d’art, de meubles, d’estampes et de peintures. C’est aussi une bibliothèque vivante, riche de tous les titres récemment publiés sur la période de l’Empire.
Deux chercheurs et trois artistes y sont accueillis en résidence chaque année.

Un carnet de recherches, animé par l'équipe de la bibliothèque, est disponible sur la plateforme hypotheses.org à cette adresse : https://marmottan.hypotheses.org/

Name: SINBIESP - Sindicato dos Bibliotecários, Cientistas de Informação, Museólogos e Arquivistas
Description: Sindicato dos Bibliotecários, Cientistas da Informação, Historiadores, Museólogos, Documentalistas, Arquivistas e Auxiliares de Biblioteca e de Centros de Documentação no Estado de São Paulo.

Name: Bibliobytes
Description: Bibliobytes se destaca como líder en el ámbito de la capacitación para bibliotecarios, ofreciendo cursos online especializados en procesos y servicios bibliotecarios. Nuestra misión es fortalecer y actualizar constantemente las habilidades de los profesionales de la información, asegurando que estén preparados para enfrentar los desafíos cambiantes del mundo bibliotecario. Con un enfoque centrado en la innovación y la accesibilidad, Bibliobytes se posiciona como la elección preferida para aquellos que buscan excelencia en su desarrollo profesional dentro del campo bibliotecario.
