Description: Knowledge Horizon Libraries Services is a fully integrated Libraries service firm specializing in the integrated solutions for libraries, complete service about libraries solutions furnishings, ILS Software, RFID Security System, Reference citation, Cataloguing Services, Book sterilizer and Library Training...etc.,

Name: CollEx-Persée
Bibliothèques Mazarine & de l'Institut de France
Description:
La Direction des Bibliothèques Mazarine et de l’Institut de France regroupe :

LA BIBLIOTHÈQUE DE L’INSTITUT. Créée dès la fondation de l’Institut (1795), elle couvre l’essentiel des disciplines relevant des cinq Académies, conserve 600 000 ouvrages, 9 500 titres de périodiques dont 300 en cours, 8 500 cotes de manuscrits et papiers savants, plusieurs dizaines de milliers de documents iconographiques (estampes, dessins, cartes et plans, photographies), environ 1 500 objets. Elle recueille la production des académies et des membres de l’Institut, collecte une documentation savante française et internationale conforme aux besoins et aux orientations des travaux académiques, et elle intègre des fonds qui lui sont confiés par donation.  

LA BIBLIOTHÈQUE MAZARINE. Ouverte en 1689 (mais perpétuant une tradition de publicité inaugurée en 1643), la Mazarine est une bibliothèque publique, une bibliothèque patrimoniale (environ 180 000 imprimés antérieurs à 1800, dont 2400 incunables, 4600 manuscrits, une collection d’œuvres d’art), et une bibliothèque de recherche dont la politique documentaire est orientée dans les disciplines historiques (sciences auxiliaires de l’histoire, histoire médiévale et moderne (14e-18e siècle), histoire locale et régionale de la France). Elle conserve 600 000 documents. Ses principales missions sont la conservation et la restauration, le développement de services documentaires, la recherche et la production de données de référence, la valorisation des collections, la médiation culturelle.  

La BIBLIOTHÈQUE THIERS. Constituée à partir de 1905 autour des archives de travail et de la bibliothèque personnelle d’Adolphe Thiers (1797-1877), enrichie de plusieurs donations, elle rassemble aujourd’hui des fonds diversifiés (livres, manuscrits, estampes, dessins, œuvres et objets d’art populaire) spécialisés dans l’histoire politique et sociale de la France, de la Révolution à la Première Guerre mondiale.

Name: Wecul
Description:
Launched in 2015, based in Porto, WECUL provides professional services for the implementation of integrated management and automation solutions for Institutions such as Libraries, Archives and Museums.

We believe in respecting the past to get through the present in order to achieve a better future. Collaborating with our costurmers and partners, our main goal is the keep good touch with our legacy.

If you have any questions, please contact us through: wecul.info@gmail.com. We'll you an answer, straight away.

Our services/products:

Nyron - A WECUL product that displays to Libraries, Archives and Museums a unique tool for a integrated management. Users can use Nyron as a point of search for a complete dataset.

RFID (w/ Bibliotheca) - This is a proven technology that allows item identification in addition to item security.

SirsiDynix HORIZON - a the foundational software for thousands of libraries worldwide. With the stability and maturity of Horizon, you have all you need to enhance your functionality with BLUEcloud now and into the future.

Princh – an easy, self-service printing solution. Payable with card or at a counter, with no need for a user account to connect to the printer net. Princh is an extremely user-friendly and intuitive printing solution.

Affluences - a simple tool to know everything about the occupation and attendance of your establishment.

biblioteca flex bookDrop non-RFID is a simple way for users to return their items easily and quickly at the library.

EnvisionWare - Public Management Many libraries face a common challenge: few computers and many users. With EnvisionWare solutions, Libraries can create an automatic process of computers reservation system.

cloudLibrary (w/ Bibliotheca) makes the library self-service experience better with powerful modules that support service models and community needs, libraries can offer users an intuitive and engaging digital experience.

Name: Noord Oost Brabantse Bibliotheken (NOBB)
Description: De Bibliotheken in de gemeenten Bernheze, Maashorst, Meierijstad en Oss vormen gezamenlijk de Noord Oost Brabantse Bibliotheken. Samen faciliteren en bevorderen we lezen, leren en informeren voor alle inwoners van ons werkgebied. Daarnaast zetten we ons in voor kennismaking met kunst en cultuur en het organiseren van ontmoeting en dialoog.

Description: The Poudre River Public Library District provides universal access to ideas and information to enrich our communities.

Name: EDITORIAL UNIVERSITARIA
Description:
Editorial Universitaria es una institución ligada a la Universidad de Chile. Nace en 1947, como iniciativa de un grupo de alumnos de Ingeniería, debido a la escasez de libros y al alto precio que ellos alcanzaban después de la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Su misión es editar y difundir el pensamiento cultural, académico y educacional a través del libro, al servicio de las universidades y de la sociedad chilena. De esta manera, por más de medio siglo se ha dedicado a publicar lo más selecto del medio intelectual chileno, en todos los campos de las ciencias y las humanidades, siempre atenta a privilegiar la creación de autores e investigadores chilenos, constituyéndose en un aporte insustituible para el desarrollo cultural de nuestro país.
Editorial Universitaria destaca en el ámbito de la educación, abordando desde los primeros años de Educación Básica hasta Educación Media y Universitaria, como también realizando otras publicaciones destinadas a investigadores y público en general.
El catálogo de Editorial Universitaria, es inmensamente valioso, no sólo por la cantidad de títulos sino, principalmente, por la calidad de sus autores, entre los que se cuentan varios Premios Nobel, todos los Premios Nacionales de Literatura y la mayoría de los Premios Nacionales de Ciencia, Historia y Arte.

Description:
YellowBelly is one of Ireland’s leading breweries, dishing out a huge range of craft beers that always offer something new 
to beer drinkers. Under the guidance of Head Brewer Declan Nixon our mantra is to get the freshest beer possible into the 
hands of our customers.


Every YellowBelly Beer has been given individual artistic treatment by Creative Director Paul Reck, creating individual stories, 
illustrations and artwork for every beer release and expanding the YellowBelly Universe through a comic book series and 
animations.


Since opening in 2015, this brewery has released over 300 beers. Now in 2021 on top of brewing four flagship beers Citra 
Pale Ale, Kellerbier Unfiltered Lager, Pirate Bay Session IPA and Red Noir Dark Red Ale, YellowBelly keeps drinkers entertained 
with regular exciting limited edition releases.

Description: Les Abeilles Solidaires œuvrent pour appuyer le système éducatif et le développement des communes, à travers différents programmes, tel que le programme YaaKAR, qui a vocation à créer des bibliothèques solidaires au Sénégal, dans le but de démocratiser l'accès à l'éducation et à la culture afin de lutter contre l'illettrisme des enfants, des adolescents et des adultes et renforcer ainsi leur résilience face à la violence.

Name: Champaign Public Library
Description:
Located in Champaign, Illinois, the Champaign Public Library connects our community with the power of knowledge, the world of culture and ideas, and the joy of reading.

We support the essential role of reading for success in life and work, the need for easy and equal access to lifelong learning, and the value of enriching and inspiring experiences.

Name: Repense, Biblio!
Description:
O Repense, Biblio! foi criado com a intenção de promover discussões, propor e divulgar conteúdos da área de biblioteconomia, Ciência da Informação e tecnologia - ocasionalmente serão trazidos conteúdos sobre arquivologia e museologia.

O intuito maior é contribuir com a metamorfose da biblioteconomia e ciência da informação.

Name: İstinye Üniversitesi Kütüphanesi
Description:
İstinye Üniversitesi Kütüphanesi, üniversitemizin eğitim ve araştırma programlarını destekler, kullanıcılarının doğru bilgiye en kısa sürede erişmesini sağlar. Kütüphanemiz, İstinye Üniversitesi öğrencilerinin ve personelinin akademik ve kültürel ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak üzere, tüm bilimsel araştırma ve aktivitelere destek ve kolaylık sağlamayı amaç edinmiştir.

İstinye Üniversitesi Merkez Kütüphanesi Topkapı Kampüsü’nde 5. katta, Vadi Kampüs Kütüphane ise Vadi Kampüsü’nde 6. kat yer almaktadır. Basılı kitap ve süreli yayın, e-kitap ve e-süreli yayından oluşan koleksiyonu  ile Topkapı Merkez Kütüphane toplam 1.050 m²  alanda (1 sessiz çalışma alanı, 1 araştırma alanı ve 1 bilgisayar alanı); Vadi Kampüs Kütüphane ise 650 m² alanda hizmet vermektedir.

Kütüphanelerimizin koleksiyonu, Kongre Kütüphanesi (LC) ve National Library of Medicine (NLM) sınıflama sistemine göre düzenlenmiştir.

Information Sources at Istinye University supports education and research programs at our university and it provides for users to access to exact information within the shortest time. Our library aims to provide for the students and staff members at Istinye university with support and convenience for all scientific researches and activities. 

Istinye University Central Library is located on the 5th floor on Topkapı Campus, and the Vadi Campus Library is located on the 6th floor on Vadi Campus. Topkapı Central Library, with its collection of printed books, periodicals, e-books, and e-periodicals, has a total area of 1,050 m² (1 quiet study area, 1 research area and 1 computer area); as for Vadi Campus Library, it provides service on an area of 650 m².

The collection of our library is classified according to Library of Congress (LC) and National Library of Medicine (NLM) classification systems.

All sources (except for periodicals and reference sources) are available for lending in our library.

Name: National and University Library in Zagreb
Description:
Najveća hrvatska knjižnica s funkcijom nacionalne knjižnice Hrvatske i središnje knjižnice Sveučilišta u Zagrebu. S približno 3,6 milijuna jedinica građe, brojnim uslugama i raznovrsnim programom već više od 4 stoljeća vitalni je dio hrvatskog kulturnog i znanstvenog života.

Knjižnica kao stožerna ustanova hrvatske kulture, znanosti i obrazovanja javna je ustanova od nacionalnog značenja.

Knjižnica obavlja knjižnične i informacijske djelatnosti nacionalne knjižnice Republike Hrvatske i središnje knjižnice Sveučilišta u Zagrebu te znanstveno-istraživačku i razvojnu djelatnost radi izgradnje i razvoja knjižničnog sustava Republike Hrvatske.

Name: Somerset County Library System of New Jersey
Description:
Somerset County Library System of New Jersey (SCLSNJ) is ten full-service branches and two reading stations serving 188,000 people in fifteen of Somerset County's twenty-one municipalities. SCLSNJ partners with you to connect, to explore, to share, and to discover.

http://goo.gl/Juros

Name: Dinas Perpustakaan dan Kearsipan Provinsi DKI Jakarta
Sonoma County Library
Description:
The Sonoma County Library is the heart of our community.  We are known nationally for our innovation and locally for our connection to our residents and communities. We are a community hub where learning, the arts, technology, and people intersect and thrive.  Our staff is known throughout the community for being engaged, empowered, energized, and ubiquitous!  

Our county-wide library system serves approximately 495,000 residents in the cities, towns and communities of Cloverdale, Cotati, Guerneville, Healdsburg, Petaluma, Rohnert Park, Santa Rosa, Sebastopol, Sonoma and Windsor. Through library services and programs at our 14 locations, online, and through targeted outreach, we embrace our mission to bring information, ideas, and people together to build a stronger community. 

Sonoma County is located 45 minutes north of San Francisco, features more than 370 wineries, over 100 organic farms, and 55 miles of Pacific coastline.  Sonoma County is also home to the Santa Rosa Junior College and Sonoma State University, home of the nationally famous Green Music Center and Weill Hall.  

For more information about Sonoma County Library, visit www.sonomalibrary.org.  Also, look for Sonoma County Library on Facebook, facebook.com/sonomalibrary.

Name: Bibliothèque littéraire Jacques Doucet
Description: Bibliothèque littéraire Jacques Doucet, les archives littéraires de la modernité.

Name: Cleveland Heights-University Heights Public Library
Description: We are a medium sized public library with four buildings serving two inner ring suburban cities on the East Side of Cleveland. We are known for our exceptional customer service. We offer traditional library services as well as technological services that bridge the digital divide and level the playing field for all, including our computer and media labs, wired meeting rooms, and free computer classes.

Name: Bibliotheek Deventer
Description: Wij zijn dé marktplaats voor kennis, informatie en inspiratie. Wij maken ons sterk voor de ontwikkeling van inwoners van de gemeente Deventer. We zijn een openbare bibliotheek én dragen zorg voor de erfgoedcollecties van de Athenaeumbibliotheek. Daarmee zijn wij het hart van Deventer Boekenstad.

Name: American Irish Historical Society
Description: The American Irish Historical Society was founded in 1897, and is an international center of scholarship, education and cultural enrichment dedicated to promoting the significant, on-going contributions to the United States of America made by Irish immigrants and their descendants.  As a center of the contemporary American Irish experience, the organization sponsors public programs to explore current issues and celebrates the renaissance in Irish culture with its frequent lectures, visual art exhibits and concerts.  The Society has been, from its inception, both non-partisan and non-sectarian.

Name: Children's Plus Inc.
Description:
For over 40 years, CPI has been serving schools and libraries across the country. With over 350,000 titles, we offer a one-stop shopping experience for all your children and young adult print and digital book needs.

CPI has built our business on a commitment to not just selling books, but cultivating relationships with our vendors, publishers, and customers. Our partnerships with hundreds of major educational and trade publishers, as well as small independent presses gives you the most options, the highest fill rates, and the best bindings in one place!

Name: Lentera.App
Description: Lentera is a mobile application which providing book collections as in library that you can enjoy for free. We carry a mission to increase Indonesian people's interest in reading by providing a pleasant reading experience through technology. Lentera is a partner for Authors and Publishers who wish to expand their publication network without eliminating the value of royalties.

Name: cedias-musee social
Description: Créé il y a 130 ans le Musée social met à votre disposition 130000 ouvrages sur l'histoire de la pensée sociale et le développement de la protection sociale ; il participe à la réflexion et à la prospective de ces sujets.

Name: Bibliotheek Enschede
Description:
De Bibliotheek is dé plek in Enschede voor informatie, kennis, cultuur en leesplezier voor en van iedereen. We prikkelen de nieuwsgierigheid, geven inspiratie en nodigen uit tot ontmoeting.  Jong en oud, lid of geen lid, kan er binnenlopen. Naast de centrale bibliotheek in het centrum zijn er vier wijkbibliotheken, een jeugdbibliotheek, een uitleenpunt en een boek aan huis dienst. 

Samen zorgen we dat de Bibliotheek een omgeving is waar jong en oud het plezier van lezen en leren ontdekken. Niets hoeft, alles mag. Je kunt bij ons studeren en werken, online een cursus volgen, of juist even ontspannen met een magazine of goed boek.

Name: Storyplay'r
Description:
Storyplay'r est une bibliothèque numérique et audio de plus de 2000 livres jeunesse pour les 3-15 ans, avec de nombreux outils d'aide à la lecture.

La mission  de Storyplay’r est de donner le goût de la lecture chez les jeunes enfants en utilisant la tablette comme medium, un support interactif qu’ils plébiscitent. Parce que le livre jeunesse n’est pas un livre comme les autres, mais un livre qui se raconte à voix haute, l’application Storyplay'r permet notamment à l'utilisateur, enfant ou adulte, d'enregistrer sa voix pour devenir narrateur de l’histoire, puis de partager sa narration avec ses proches.

Pour constituer son catalogue, Storyplay'r travaille avec des éditeurs jeunesse indépendants, et partage avec eux les revenus générés par les abonnés. Cet univers connecté où enfants et adultes sont à la fois lecteurs, conteurs et auditeurs, crée un espace de partage pour que les parents racontent encore plus d'histoires à leurs enfants.

S'ajoutent pour chaque histoire des outils d'aide à la lecture (espacement des lettres et des mots, synthèse vocale, colorisation des phonèmes...) pour aider l'enfant en plein apprentissage de la lecture.

Name: Salt Lake County Library
Description:
The mission of Salt Lake County Library is to make a positive difference in the lives of our community by inspiring imagination, satisfying curiosity, and providing a great place for everyone to visit. Our vision is "every visit matters."

We provide spaces, resources and programs for self-guided learning, growth and community connections at community County Library branches and at the Library's Viridian Event Center located throughout the Salt Lake Valley and /or the Internet.

The first Salt Lake County Library Board was established in 1938. One year later, in 1939, Salt Lake County Library Services began operations in two classrooms of the old Midvale School. More than 75 years later we have 18 libraries, two reading rooms and library services available in the Salt Lake County jail. 

Each year more than 4.5 million children, teens, adults and businesses visit our 18 Salt Lake County Libraries where thousands of free programs and millions of complimentary resources and materials are available to them. We are honored to remain an innovative community hub that provides equal access to information, technology and resources. 

Our online library, slcolibrary.org, provides library card holders the opportunity to manage their account, check out books, audiobooks, eaudiobooks, movies, television shows and music or access one of our many free databases – 24 hours a day, seven days a week. Library membership is free to Salt Lake County residents and continues to be an excellent return on investment for the community.

Name: دوشة كتب
Description: فريق تطوعي يسعى إلى إثراء ثقافة النقاش، ترتكز أنشطته على: تجمعات للنقاش - تدريبات النقاش والحوار - تدريبات الكتابة الإبداعية.

Description: Bibliotheek Lek & IJssel zorgt voor persoonlijke ontwikkeling, informatie en ontspanning zodat inwoners bewust, kritisch en actief kunnen deelnemen aan de (digitale) maatschappij.

Name: Atla
Description: Atla is a membership association of librarians and information professionals, and a producer of research tools, committed to advancing the study of religion and theology.

Name: Bibliopresto
Description:
Bibliopresto.ca est un organisme sans but lucratif dont le mandat est de développer des services en ligne pour les bibliothèques québécoises.

Bibliopresto.ca assure, entre autres, la gestion de Pretnumerique.ca, une plateforme qui permet aux bibliothèques de prêter des livres numériques à leurs usagers.

Name: Randers Bibliotek
Description:
Randers Bibliotek
Bibliotekerne i Randers Kommune består af Hovedbiblioteket i Randers centrum, Randers Bibliotek Syd i Kristrup, Randers Bibliotek Øst i Dronningborg, Langå Bibliotek samt en bogbus.

Projektorganisation
Randers Bibliotek er et folkebibliotek og kommunens største kulturinstitution. Vi har en ambition om at give borgerne Danmarks bedste bibliotek og samtidig vil vi være kommunens bedste arbejdsplads.

Det sikrer vi os ved at have en organisation, der arbejder systematisk med ideudvikling, og ved at interessere os for, hvad kommunens borgere efterspørger samtidig med at vi holder skarpt øje med nationale og internationale tendenser i forhold til biblioteker og mere overordnet kultur.

Bibliotekschefen (BC), chefen for litteratur og læring (CL) og holdene
BC er bibliotekets øverste leder og refererer direkte til direktøren for Kultur og Fritid. BC tegner biblioteket udadtil og har ansvaret for den strategiske ledelse. Under BC er CL, der sammen med BC varetager bibliotekets strategiske udvikling.
Organisationen har en stabsfunktion, ”Stab”, som refererer direkte til bibliotekschefen "Stab" indeholder: "Kommunikation og marketing", "Digitalisering og web", "Organisation og projekter" og "Administration og IT". Det samme gør holdet ”Værtskab og service” der også har sin egen koordinator. "Værtskab og service" indeholder: "Teknisk service", "Rengøring" og "Filialer og Bogbus".

Derudover er der seks hold, der alle refererer til chefen for litteratur og læring, og hvert hold har en koordinator. Der er tale om ”Børn og unge”, ”Kultur og formidling”, ”Skole og uddannelse”, ”Skema og booking”, "Materialer og flow" og "information og digital betjening". Alle medarbejdere er tilknyttet et hold eller en stabsfunktion.

Randers Bibliotek har lavet en aftale for 2020-2023 med Randers Kommune. Der indgås aftaler med alle arbejdspladser i Randers Kommune, som en del af Randersmodellen.

Name: Supreme Court Library Queensland
Description: SCLQ was established in 1862 to serve the judiciary and the legal profession in the administration of justice in Queensland.

Name: Kitabo
Description: Kitabo is Indore's only library that offers free home delivery of books to read and rent. We are here to make your reading hassle-free, cost-effective, and pleasurable with Kitabo. So that you can just sit back relax and read your favorite books in peace.

Name: The Commons Social Change Library
Description: The Commons Social Change Library is a changemakers’ library. We source and share campaign, activism and organising resources and insights from grassroots and leading progressive organisations across the globe, fostering best practice and innovative campaigning to deliver faster, deeper victories on the issues that matter.

Name: The Westport Library
Description: The Westport Library is committed to empowering the individual and strengthening the community. The Library is an important resource for entrepreneurs, job seekers, and small businesses. The Library has databases and directories as well as resources that provide industry analysis and business intelligence. The Library also offers a variety of classes and networking opportunities.

Name: Surrey Libraries
Description: Surrey Libraries is a valued community institution and one of the most-used community services in Surrey. The library welcomes around 2.5 million visits to our 10 branches each year, with an additional 2 million plus visits to our online resources.  Surrey Libraries runs hundreds of programs and services for children, youth, and adults to support their diverse learning needs. Serving the community since 1983, Surrey Libraries strives to be a leader in supporting creativity, connectivity, literacy, and lifelong learning. Find out more about Surrey Libraries and our current employment opportunities at https://surreylibraries.ca/about-us/careers.

Name: Mirakıl Veri İşleme
Description:
Mirakıl, 2016 yılında Bilgi ve Belge Yönetimi alanında uzman kişilerin bir araya gelerek kurulmuş bir şirkettir. Müze, Arşiv ve Kütüphanecilik alanlarında yazılım, donanım gereçleri, eğitim, danışmanlık ve veri girişi hizmetleri sunmaktayız. Özellikle açık kaynak kodlu yazılımlarla kurumların ihtiyaçlarına yönelik çözümler sunuyoruz.

Kalite ve akademik birikimi bir araya getirerek dinamik ve güçlü bir yapıya sahip Mirakıl, müşteri odaklı yaklaşımı sayesinde iş süreçlerinizi verimli hale getiriyoruz. Müşteri memnuniyetini esas alarak işbirliğimizi uzun soluklu kılmayı hedefliyoruz. Size özel çözümlerle bilgi ve belge yönetimi alanında sektördeki etkinliğimizi artırmak için çaba göstermeye devam edeceğiz.

Saygılarımızla,
@mirakilveri

Name: Arizona Library Association
Description: The Arizona Library Association promotes library service and librarianship in libraries of all types in the state of Arizona. Libraries face new challenges every day, and it's more important than ever for us to stand together in support of libraries and library staff. By joining our state-wide library association you are building local support of our profession while at the same time personally benefiting by being a member of a great organization.

Name: EurekaMag.com - Digital Article Delivery Services
Description:
We provide scholarly literature delivery services utilizing a network of international libraries. We supply library-scanned PubMed and other science articles and abstracts.

Due to our base in Europe, we have wide access to medical, biological, zoological, technical and geographical journals published in Europe including Eastern European and Russian sources. Coverage dates back to the 18th Century and earlier.

Name: Harold B. Lee Library
Description: BYU Students and faculty are the key reason we exist. We will align our strategy and resources (people, collections, services, and spaces) to provide the best possible outcome for them. We will do this by inspiring learning, improving discoverability of and access to collections, providing learning spaces, fostering collaboration, and developing our people.

Name: BibliotheekWerk
Description:
Openbare bibliotheken hebben te maken met arbeidsmarktontwikkelingen en de invloed daarvan op (toekomstig) personeel. Medewerkers- en werkgeversvertegenwoordigers van openbare bibliotheken vinden een goed functionerende arbeidsmarkt belangrijk. Daarom werken zij in de stichting BibliotheekWerk samen om dit te realiseren.

De doelgroep van BibliotheekWerk is personeel in dienst is bij openbare bibliotheken. De activiteiten van BibliotheekWerk richten zich onder meer op: HR-medewerkers, directeuren en or-leden.

Stichting BibliotheekWerk is opgericht op initiatief van de Vereniging van Openbare Bibliotheken, FNV Publiek Belang en CNV Connectief.

Name: Norm Bib
Description:
A Norm Bib é uma empresa fundada e gerenciada pela Bibliotecária Daniela Sanches, que pensando no maior conforto do seu cliente, buscou abranger diversos serviços da área de biblioteconomia e documentação para que o cliente possa encontrar tudo o que precisa no mesmo lugar.

A empresa é formada por uma equipe de Bibliotecários, Arquivistas, Revisores de Português e Tradutores, para atender a todas as demandas da área de Bibliotecas, Centros de Documentação, Editoras, Empresas e Universidades.

A Norm Bib oferece diversos serviços para atender nossos clientes que conta como público principal: acadêmicos, pesquisadores, editores, autores independentes ou pessoas que possuem qualquer tipo de acervo, desde uma documento em sua fase construtiva até a organização e informatização de um acervo, podendo ser ele em formato de documentos, multimídias, objetos, etc.

Name: Clermont County Public Library
Description: We've fostered lifelong learning by providing resources that inform, programs that engage and ideas that inspire in our community since 1955. As the 2015 winner of the  Excellence in Customer Service Award from the Clermont Chamber of Commerce, we strive for excellence when meeting the needs and interests of our community. We provide open access to a variety of resources and services such as free Pocket WiFi and free notary services. We're the community's trusted information resource. With ten branches throughout Clermont County plus our website with numerous online resources, we help you discover what you need.

Name: Santa Cruz Public Libraries
Description:
SCPL brings people, information, and resources together to enrich lives and strengthen our community.
We give every Santa Cruz Community member the opportunity to learn through our educational resources, classes, and staff support. We develop programs for the broad community as well as specific groups like students, seniors, and those who are most vulnerable, including the unhoused and incarcerated. We curate specialty collections, like genealogy and local history. We are an ever-adapting organization, continuously innovating, iterating, and exploring new ways to meet our community’s changing needs.

Name: Ontario Association of Library Technicians/Association des bibliotechniciens de l'Ontario
Description:
WHO WE ARE: 
Established, in 1973, the Ontario Association of Library Technicians / Association des bibliotechniciens de l'Ontario (OALT/ABO) is a not-for-profit organization of Library and Information Technician graduates, students, associate and institutional members.


MANDATE: 
To define clearly the role of the Library Information Technician and to make this definition widely known.

To publicize the value of Library Information Technicians and promote wider understanding and acceptance of their status.

To institute recognized standards operating on the Provincial level.
To work in liaison with related professions and institutions and to promote effective communication among Library Information Technicians and others in closely related fields.

To be receptive and aware of the constant changes and needs in the field of Library and Information Technology, and the community.

To disseminate information relating to Library Information Technicians.

These objectives are accomplished through:
Active membership
Education and professional development
Promotion and marketing
Partnerships and advocacy

["Library" Image by Flickr User Stewart Butterfield used under CC BY 2.0] [http://bit.ly/1fs2tim]

Name: UNLV University Libraries
Description: The University Libraries is a welcoming and inclusive place for learning. We foster innovation, knowledge creation and discovery, and academic achievement to enrich our UNLV and Southern Nevada communities.

Name: Circular Library Network
Description: We are a start up that provided infrastructure to facilitate the sharing economy

Name: Metropolitan Library System
Description: The Metropolitan Library System was a membership-based organization serving academic, public, school, and special libraries in Chicago and in the suburban communities of Cook, DuPage and Will counties. Established in 1966, MLS provided the leadership and resources necessary for its member libraries to succeed in their individual missions. MLS collaborated with the Illinois State Library, other library systems, and local libraries to create a seamless statewide network of information and resources for the people of Illinois. MLS merged with four organizations in 2012 to form the Reaching Across Illinois Library System.

Name: Ferguson Library
Description:
Since it first opened its doors at the end of the 19th century, The Ferguson Library has been the heart of the Stamford community, a place of learning and education, a gathering place where people could meet and exchange ideas. Sometimes even a place to come in out of the  cold for a while. As Stamford grew and changed, The Ferguson Library grew along with it. In 1911, The Ferguson became a free public library, embracing the concept that knowledge should be available to all, regardless of ability to pay.

The Ferguson now serves nearly a million visitors each year, and countless others access our online services. But our core values haven’t changed. The commitment to supporting lifelong learning, and providing free and equal access to information is still at the heart of our mission.

Our mission is to provide free and equal access to information, ideas, books and technology to educate, engage and enrich the Stamford community.

Name: Association des élèves conservateurices territoriaux de bibliothèques
Description:
L’AECTB est l’association des élèves conservateurices territoriaux de bibliothèques, créée le 11 mai 2015.
L'association a pour but de valoriser la formation d'application des élèves conservateurs territoriaux de bibliothèques, de soutenir leurs actions et de les représenter auprès des pouvoirs publics et associations professionnelles. Elle promeut également le cadre d'emploi des conservateurs territoriaux des bibliothèques.

Name: Richmond Public Library
Description: Richmond Public Library has proudly served the Richmond, BC, community since 1976. Our mission is to create opportunities to learn, connect, and belong.

Name: Rochester Public Library (Minnesota)
Description:
As one of four Minnesota libraries to win the National Medal for Museum and Library Service, Rochester Public Library (RPL) aims to "strengthen community and enrich lives by sparking imagination, creativity, engagement, and learning."

RPL earned the National Medal in 2018 by offering programs and services guided by a community-focused strategic plan. With a robust collection, over half-a-million visitors each year, and the busiest Bookmobile in the state (based on circulation), RPL offers a strong collection of materials to a growing community. The library also continues to expand and develop programming to empower and inspire community members. In 2017, 120,000 individuals attended a wide variety of library programs and activities.

Situated in the heart of downtown Rochester, just blocks away from the renowned Mayo Clinic, RPL serves the city of Rochester and surrounding areas. For more information about the Rochester Public Library, visit www.rplmn.org.

Name: librarywala.com
Description:
Librarywala.com was founded in 2007 and is India's largest online book rental library, 
We have our services in Mumbai, Pune & Bangalore for paperback books and globally for digital products. (we serve pan India for corporate for paperback books) 
We offer our members the benefits of Convenience, Collection, Choice & Cost.

Librarywala Advantages: 
Over 1 Lac books to choose from
Books available in more than five languages
Keep the books as long as your account is active (no return time)
Delivery within 3 to 6 business days across India
Classics to new releases

Our collection of books is well distributed among the following categories which are further divided into sub-categories.
Business & Management, Fiction, Children, History & Current Affairs, Biography, Films, Sports, Religion, Self-help, Non- fiction, Health.  
We also have books in Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, Tamil, Gujarati, etc..

Key Achievements:
Over 27000 retail members.
100+ corporate using our services.
Librarywala.com has won the Star Entrepreneur award 2009 by Indira international innovation summit. 
Librarywala.com has won the Finalist award among the top 30 finalists in the Tata & Nen startup awards (chosen from a total of 600 companies started in India)
Librarywala.com has made it to the Limca book of records 2010 for being the First and the biggest online library in India.
Librarywala.com has been nominated for India 5000 best MSME award for quality excellence 2017.

Digital Products Include:
E-books 
Information Technology E-books 
Business book Summaries 

Our Website and applications will make it very easy for your to click, pick and choose your next favourite read. 

Happy Reading

Name: IFLA LIBPUB
Description:
The IFLA LIBPUB SIG was officially organized at the IFLA WLIC in Kuala Lumpur (2018), to advance the rapidly emerging, relatively new field of Library Publishing, which is part of a broader range of scholarly communication activities driven and managed by all types of libraries: national, state, academic, and public and private.

Specifically, library publishing involves the publication of predominantly open access journals, monographs, and other materials to a variety of audiences and through a variety of languages, using open source or proprietary publishing platforms. Library publishing activities are closely linked to the strategic imperatives of institutions pertaining to open scholarship.

Library publishing activities build upon librarian competencies such as collection development, copyright, discoverability, outreach, and platform management and may offer a range of support services including consultancy, editorial, training in workflows, policy development, dissemination, hosting, digitization of collections, ethics and governance, impact, and sustainability. Libraries can act as publishers directly or lend support in other ways, such as infrastructure or funding local or global open publishing initiatives.

This unit is sponsored by the Acquisition and Collection Development Section.

This unit is part of the Professional Division D.

Name: SPARC Europe
Description:
SPARC Europe is a foundation committed to delivering on the promise of open access, open science, open scholarship and open education.

Our vision is that open access to European education and research is the default: For the Higher Education community, research, education, industry, and for society.

Our mission is to provide leadership to Europe’s Higher Education and research communities and those that support them. We do this to enable the conditions and opportunities to maximise the access and re-use of Europe’s research and educational resources for all whilst respecting diversity and equity.

Name: Reference and User Services Association (RUSA)
Description:
Learn. Network. Grow. With RUSA membership, we put you first. Online discussion forums, webinars, eCourses and listservs are just a few ways to learn with RUSA. Stay current with weekly communication about what’s happening in RUSA and with the peer reviewed journal Reference and User Services Quarterly (RUSQ) which outlines key updates and wider issues related to the reference and user services profession. Network with more than 3,000 RUSA members across the nation online and at two annual conferences which include author panels and social events. Advance your skills with leadership opportunities in one of our six specialty sections or one or more of our 127 committees – some of the most popular are the Book & Media Awards committees, where you’ll choose the best adult books of the year – the only adult book awards at the American Library Association.
 
RUSA serves all types of libraries in reference, user services, adult readers advisory and collection development as well as resource sharing, genealogy, archives, business reference and reference technology. RUSA is a division of the American Library Association.

Name: Buffalo & Erie County Public Library
Description: The Buffalo & Erie County Public Library (B&ECPL) consists of 37 libraries and two mobile units.  The City of Buffalo has a Central Library and eight branches.  There are twenty-two contracting member libraries which operate twenty-eight facilities in the suburbs of Erie County.  The are free and open to the public.  Libraries serve as centers of information, education, culture and entertainment for the residents of Erie County. Your Buffalo & Erie County Public Libraries are Profoundly Public

Name: The Bright Vibes Library & Coworking Space
Description: Welcome to Bright Vibes, Delhi's ultimate co-working and co-study space. Our fully air-conditioned and Wi-Fi enabled environment ensures a focused studying experience. With wall-side individual seats, whiteboards, and cozy recliners, we offer the perfect ambiance for concentration and relaxation. Stay hydrated with hot and cold Bisleri water, and enjoy beverages like coffee, tea, and soup. Your safety is important to us, with 24-hour camera surveillance and convenient parking. Our top-notch interior design and soothing fragrances create a motivating and calming atmosphere. Experience the best at Bright Vibes library, where we pay attention to every detail for your comfort and satisfaction.

Name: BibLibre
Description: Our team work with libraries of different sizes from all over the world. We provide Open Source Software that suit your needs and maintained by dynamic communities. Our services help you to make the best use of them to let you focus on the most important, your library users.

Name: Idaho Commission for Libraries
Description: The Idaho Commission for Libraries (ICfL) is an agency of the State of Idaho. Our mission is to assist libraries to build the capacity to better serve their communities.  We offer a variety of resources for libraries and Idahoans.  To learn more about ICfL, programs located at your local library, or resources available through us, please follow our page and visit our website at libraries.idaho.gov.

Name: Kitsap Regional Library
Description:
Kitsap Regional Library inspires our community to dream more, learn more, do more and be more.

 
Kitsap Regional Library maintains nine locations across Kitsap County. The Library's collection includes more than 420,000 books, audiobooks, music, movies, 60 + online databases, access to one-on-one individualized reference appointments and home delivery for more than 200 homebound residents. The Library offers educational classes, workshops, author visits, community forums and musical performances for all ages.

Name: Centro de Documentación Epistolar
Description: El Centro de Documentación Epistolar es un proyecto que pone en valor a la carta como dispositivo de diálogo y, en retrospectiva, como huella imprescindible de la memoria colectiva. Tiene como objetivo preservar y posibilitar la circulación de estos materiales identitarios invalorables a través de un archivo participativo y un espacio de encuentro y difusión para especialistas, para curiosos interesados y para la comunidad general. Una manera de mirar por el ojo de la cerradura y hallar un espejo.

Name: Leesoffensief Brabant
Description: Het Leesoffensief Brabant strijdt voor een betere leesvaardigheid. Binnen deze Brabantbrede, strategische samenwerking van onderwijs, kinderopvang en bibliotheken pakt iedere partner voortvarend zijn rol en deelt zijn expertise. Het doel? De Brabantse jeugd een leesvaardige toekomst geven zonder laaggeletterdheid. Samen gaan we voor leeskracht!

Name: Burnaby Public Library
Description:
We respectfully acknowledge that Burnaby Public Library is located on the unceded territories of the xʷməθkʷəy̓əm (Musqueam), Sḵwx̱wú7mesh (Squamish), səlilwətaɬ (Tsleil-Waututh), and kʷikʷəƛ̓əm (Kwikwetlem) Peoples. Each Nation has distinct histories and distinct traditional territories that fully or partially encompass the city.

We encourage you to learn more about the Host Nations whose ancestors have occupied and used these lands, including parts of present-day Burnaby, for thousands of years.

Burnaby Public Library is an urban library system of four branches that serves a diverse and changing community of more than 250,000.

BPL is big enough to give you opportunities to advance your skills, knowledge and career, yet small enough for you to get to know your colleagues in all four branches. We support and motivate staff to develop and grow.

We believe that diversifying our team makes our organization stronger and more reflective of the community we serve. We seek people who embrace empathy and bring different experiences and perspectives.

Name: Bücherhallen Hamburg
Description:
Die Bücherhallen Hamburg sind mit jährlich 4,9 Millionen Besuchern die publikumsstärkste Kultureinrichtung Hamburgs und zugleich das größte kommunale Bibliothekssystem in Deutschland. Rund 13 Millionen Medien werden pro Jahr ausgeliehen.

32 Bibliotheken in allen Stadtteilen, 2 Bücherbusse und die Zentralbibliothek nahe dem Hauptbahnhof mit integrierter Kinder- und Jugendbibliothek, bieten ein umfangreiches, auf die Bedürfnisse der unterschiedlichen Kunden aller Altersstufen und Interessen zugeschnittenes, ständig aktualisiertes Medienangebot zur allgemeinen Information und Bildung sowie zur Freizeitgestaltung und Unterhaltung. 420 Mitarbeiter kümmern sich gern um Ihre Anfragen und Wünsche.

Als moderne Großstadtbibliothek haben die Bücherhallen Hamburg mehr als 1,7 Millionen Medien in über 30 Sprachen im Bestand: 1,2 Millionen Buchtitel (Belletristik, Sachliteratur, Kinder- und Jugendliteratur), über 180.000 CDs, 113.000 DVDs und Blu-rays, 64.000 Zeitschriften und Zeitungen, über 60.000 Noten sowie 20.000 Games und Spiele. Damit Sie immer einen aktuellen Medienbestand vorfinden, kaufen die Bücherhallen jedes Jahr über 235.000 Titel neu ein.

Name: McGill University Libraries
Description:
McGill University Libraries advance teaching, learning, research and community service by providing outstanding collections, access to the world of knowledge, excellence in service and an appropriate library environment, all of which are client-focused and responsive to the needs of the McGill community.

The Library & Archives
- Facilitates excellence in teaching, learning and research
- Creates an appropriate environment to support teaching, learning and research
- Anticipates and responds to student and faculty needs
- Contributes to positive student and faculty outcomes and experiences
- Provides the information resource infrastructure necessary for leading edge teaching, learning and research activity
- Supports community outreach and community partnerships

For more information visit our main page mcgill.ca/library, follow us Facebook facebook.com/mcgill.library or on Twitter @McGillLib, visit our blogs at blogs.library.mcgill.ca or find us on LinkedIn at linkedin.com/company/mcgill-university-library-and-archives.

Name: Bibliotheek Oosterschelde
Description: De Bibliotheek Oosterschelde verzorgt het openbare bibliotheekwerk voor meer dan 150.000 inwoners van de gemeenten Borsele, Goes, Kapelle, Reimerswaal, Schouwen-Duiveland en Tholen. In de dienstverlening staan informatie, cultuur en educatie centraal.

Name: Biblioteca Pública Digital
Description:
La Biblioteca Pública Digital, del Servicio Nacional del Patrimonio Cultural de Chile, nace a fines de 2013 como la primera biblioteca pública digital del país. 
Se trata de una plataforma en línea para el préstamo GRATIS de libros digitales mediante descarga en PC o a través de celular y tablet descargando la app BPDigital para iOS o Android.
Es un servicio gratuito dirigido a todos los habitantes de Chile y chilenos residentes en el extranjero. 
Actualmente, la Biblioteca Pública Digital es la biblioteca pública que más libros presta en Chile, cuenta con más de 300 mil usuarios y una colección de 17 mil títulos, distribuidos en 70 mil libros.

Name: Bibliotheek Drachten | Smallingerland
Description: Bibliotheek Drachten is een moderne bibliotheek met een breed aanbod producten en diensten. Dat wordt de laatste jaren alleen maar meer. Aan de ene kant zijn we er zijn voor onze trouwe klanten, die ons nog altijd zeer waarderen om onze uitleenfunctie en alles wat daarbij hoort. Aan de andere kant positioneren we ons steeds meer als maatschappelijk hart van de samenleving. Daarnaast organiseren we veel activiteiten, workshops en cursussen op allerlei gebieden.

Name: ePlatform Digital Libraries
Description:
ePlatform is a widely adopted online book lending platform that offers an extensive library of eBooks and Audiobooks. It provides access to over a million titles from top publishers worldwide, allowing schools and libraries to enhance their digital collections. With its affordable shared collections and convenient accessibility, ePlatform enables students to explore a diverse range of reading materials and fosters a love for reading.

The wide selection of popular titles available allows students and library users access to a diverse range of books, including fiction, non-fiction, educational material and more, 365 days a year. The platform's partnership with leading publishers ensures that users have access to high-quality content that aligns with their interests and educational needs. The wide range of features and benefits supports students with reading difficulties, neurodiversity and helps boost engagement with ESOL students, can enhance comprehension & vocabulary and cater to high interest/low level readers.

By leveraging ePlatform, schools and libraries can provide students with convenient and flexible access to digital reading materials. Whether students are on or off-campus, they can use the platform to explore and engage with eBooks and Audiobooks from their computers, tablets, or mobile devices. This accessibility encourages independent reading, supports remote learning initiatives, and enables students to discover and enjoy literature wherever they are.

Name: Bibliothèque Mines Paris - PSL
Description:
Fondée en 1794, la bibliothèque est installée depuis 1815 dans l'ancien hôtel de la duchesse de Vendôme. La salle de lecture a été inaugurée à l'occasion de la remise de la croix de guerre de la 1ère guerre mondiale par le maréchal Foch à l’École (1926).

La bibliothèque accueille, sur inscription gratuite obligatoire,  tous les publics. Son fonds regroupe des collections correspondant à de nombreux champs d'étude et de recherche de l'école : énergétique et procédés, mécanique, matériaux, économie, management, société, mathématiques et systèmes, histoire des sciences, culture scientifique, arts, humanités, langues. Il est également possible de consulter son fonds patrimonial.

Informations pratiques
Adresse :
60 boulevard Saint-Michel
75006 Paris

RER, Bus : Luxembourg

Du lundi au vendredi de 9h à 18h30
Fermeture entre Noël et le Jour de l'An et une partie du mois d'août

Name: The University of Hong Kong Libraries
Description:
The University of Hong Kong Libraries is an essential part of the educational facilities provided to you by the University. The Libraries advances the teaching and learning, research, and knowledge exchange pursuits of the University through its outstanding resources, people-centred services as well as its innovative and collaborative approaches.

The Libraries consists of the Main Library and six branch libraries, namely the Dental Library, Fung Ping Shan Library, Lui Che Woo Law Library, Music Library, Tin Ka Ping Education Library, and the Yu Chun Keung Medical Library. Of scholarly interest is Special Collections which houses a unique collection of Hong Kong materials, rare books, pamphlets, and microforms.

The Main Library and the six branches are located across the University, https://lib.hku.hk/general/location/index.html.

Established in October 1912 and located in two rooms in The University of Hong Kong’s Main Building with a floor area of about 288 square meters plus a small Medical section in the Pathology Building. Today, the collections of The University of Hong Kong Libraries exceed 3.1 million volumes, 7.4 million e-books, 479,000 e-Journal subscriptions and titles and 938 e-Databases.

Fung Ping Shan Library was established in 1932 as the University's Chinese library through a generous donation by the late Mr Fung Ping Shan. Construction of the library began in 1929. It was completed three years later and was officially opened on 14 December 1932 by Sir William Peel, then Governor of Hong Kong. In 1961, Fung Ping Shan Library moved into the Main Library building and, with the consent of the Fung Family, the original library premises were converted into the Fung Ping Shan Museum.

Name: Gail Borden Public Library District
Description:
A great place to work! Learning is a Journey...Start it here!

The Gail Borden Public Library is located on the Fox River in Elgin, IL. 
The Rakow Branch is located on 2751 W. Bowes Road, Elgin IL. 

Recipient of the 2009 National Medal for Museum and Library Services.

Name: de Bibliotheek Schiedam
Description:
Certificering
Sinds eind 2010 voldoet de Bibliotheek Schiedam aan de certificeringsnorm Openbare Bibliotheken 2010-2015.

De beste bibliotheek 2011
De Schiedamse bibliotheek was in 2011 de beste bibliotheek van Zuid-Holland en behaalde de vierde plek in de verkiezing van Beste Bibliotheek van Nederland 2011.

De beste bibliotheekwebsite 2010
In 2010 werd de website van de Bibliotheek Schiedam verkozen tot de beste bibliotheekwebsite van 2010.

Keurmerk mediawijsheid
Sinds begin 2012 draagt de Bibliotheek het Nationale Keurmerk Mediawijsheid.

Name: ReThinking Libraries
Description:
Libraries are changing and ReThinking Libraries helps each one evolve and thrive in an environment of constant change.  With almost 45 years of combined library experience, our approach emphasizes the unique nature of each community. A full suite of services is available to uncover the opportunities and value each library has to offer.

Strategic Plans | Facility Plans | Building Programs | Marketing Plans | Community Engagement | Space Plans | Public Speaking

Visit us at www.ReThinkingLibraries.org for more information

Name: Bibliotheek Zoetermeer
Description:
Met 800.000 bezoekers en bijna 35.000 leden is de bibliotheek de grootste publieke en culturele instelling van Zoetermeer. Wij zijn actief op het gebied van informatie, educatie, cultuur, leesbevordering en ontmoeting. 

Voor alle bewoners van Zoetermeer is de bibliotheek toegankelijk via de Hoofdbibliotheek, 3 wijkbibliotheken in Rokkeveen, Segwaert en Oosterheem, en de mediatheek in Castellum Palenstein. Daarnaast is de bibliotheek 24/7 toegankelijk via internet. Op www.bibliotheek-zoetermeer.nl kunt u informatie vinden over de bibliotheek en onze producten en diensten. In de catalogus kunt u titels uit de collectie raadplegen, reserveren of verlengen. Volg de bibliotheek via Facebook of Twitter om op de hoogte te blijven!

De bibliotheek heeft een uitgebreid productaanbod voor het onderwijs en werkt nauw samen met diverse partners in Zoetermeer. We leveren een bijdrage aan een goed cultureel klimaat in de stad en leggen contacten met het bedrijfsleven in het kader van cultureel ondernemerschap. 

Onze missie: De bibliotheek stimuleert leesplezier en maakt mensen nieuwsgierig!

Mensen die in hun vrije tijd lezen en leren hebben meer kans op succes en geluk in het leven. Ze kunnen zich ontwikkelen, verbreden hun horizon en vergroten hun kansen in de samenleving. Om dat lezen en leren te bevorderen, stimuleert de bibliotheek leesplezier en nieuwsgierigheid. Want de ontwikkeling van mensen is wat de bibliotheek en haar medewerkers in de kern drijft.

Name: Schomburg Center for Research in Black Culture, New York Public Library
Description: The Schomburg Center for Research in Black Culture in Harlem, one of the New York Public Library’s renowned research libraries, is a world-leading cultural institution devoted to the research, preservation, and exhibition of materials focused on African American, African Diaspora, and African experiences.

Name: The Library Company of Philadelphia
Description: Founded by Benjamin Franklin in 1731, the Library Company of Philadelphia was a learning community of citizens seeking to improve themselves and their city through discourse informed by shared books. Today, the Library Company continues this founding legacy as one of the world’s foremost research libraries for American history, culture, and society, stewarding collections of books and manuscripts, prints and photographs, and art and artifacts. As such, the Library Company connects premier collections, expert staff, an engaged public, and an exciting array of scholars, who together generate new scholarship, exhibitions, public programs, and online resources. We foster a learning community grounded in our historic collections that contributes to and amplifies knowledge of American culture and society and works for the benefit of all. The Library Company connects with thousands of visitors each year ensuring the lessons of the past instruct, amaze, and inspire future generations to come.

Name: Surrey Libraries UK
Description: Public library service in Surrey UK. For residents. Provided by Surrey County Council across 52 branches and online.

Name: de Bibliotheek Oost-Achterhoek
Description:
De Bibliotheek Oost-Achterhoek stelt zich ten doel het lezen te bevorderen en informatie zo toegankelijk mogelijk te maken, zowel fysiek als digitaal. Want burgers die een goede leesvaardigheid hebben en weten hoe ze goed met informatie kunnen omgaan, kunnen zich in de Nederlandse samenleving beter handhaven en hun eigen toekomst bepalen. De Bibliotheek richt zich op een breed publiek in de gemeenten Berkelland, Oost Gelre en Winterswijk.
De bibliotheek, met zeven fysieke vestigingen,  is een dienstverlenende organisatie waar ruimte is voor maatschappelijk en cultureel ondernemen. De organisatie realiseert haar rol met deskundig personeel, samenwerkingspartners en inwoners.

Name: The National Library of Lithuania | Lietuvos nacionalinė Martyno Mažvydo biblioteka
Biblioteka Główna AGH
Description:
Biblioteka Główna AGH to nowoczesne centrum informacji naukowo-technicznej, wspierające badania i dydaktykę AGH w Krakowie. Oferuje dostęp do szerokiego zakresu źródeł wiedzy, w tym zasobów cyfrowych i drukowanych, baz danych, literatury pięknej oraz przestrzeni do pracy indywidualnej i zespołowej. 
Ponadto Biblioteka odgrywa wiodącą rolę w Krakowskim Zespole Bibliotecznym.

Name: COINCES CHEZ NOUS
Description:
Les "Coincés chez nous" est un blog de critiques littéraires regroupant aussi bien des livres "grands classiques", que de la littérature moderne ou des essais.
Il cherche à s'affranchir des idées reçues sur un auteur ou une oeuvre.

Name: NUS Libraries
Description:
A leading global academic library
• Impacting research
• Enriching learning
• Revitalising experiences

Empower the NUS community with information resources, knowledge networks and interactive platforms to advance inter-disciplinary learning, research and innovation.

Name: ekz.bibliotheksservice GmbH
Description:
e³ – entdecken entwickeln erfahren. Machen Sie Ihre Bibliothek zum besonderen Ort, gemeinsam mit den Experten der ekz.bibliotheksservice GmbH.

Name: de Bibliotheek aan de Vliet
Description: De Bibliotheek van Leidschendam-Voorburg & Rijswijk

Name: CENL - Conference of European National Librarians
Description:
The Conference of European National Librarians (short ‘CENL’) is a network of 46 national libraries in 45 European countries.

Members of the CENL are national librarians of the member states of the Council of Europe. Since 1987, CENL has worked to advance the cause of Europe’s national libraries, reinforcing our special role in preserving the continent’s cultural heritage and making it accessible to all.
Our mission is to advance the cause of Europe’s national libraries, working better together and achieving more than we can do alone.

We believe that as world-leading memory institutions, Europe’s national libraries play an important role in the intellectual, educational, cultural, social and economic development of the continent, countries and communities they serve.

As a foundation under Dutch law we meet once a year for a special conference to discuss projects, initiatives and topics of common interest. We strive to form a strong community, supporting one-another through skills and knowledge exchange.

Name: Istanbul Aydın University Information Center
Description: Istanbul Aydın University Information Center was established in 2003 to support the education and research activities of our university, to provide our students with a more comfortable study and research area, and to meet their information and document needs. It started to serve with the second library service building in P Block Florya campus in 2015 and in T Block Social Sciences Florya Campus in 2021. Istanbul Aydın University Information Center; Since the day it was founded, it has adopted the modern library concept. All publications coming to our library were transferred to the Yordam automation program and made available to researchers 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, on our collective catalog website. It is updated with current information resources to meet the information needs of researchers. Along with the new trends in library automation and information access resources, the developments in hardware and software have been closely followed, and an infrastructure has been created in electronic library techniques in order to ensure that the existing resources are best accessible to the reader. In this way, it aimed to meet the information needs with the latest technologies in terms of hardware and design, and at the same time to transfer all documents in the printed and digital media to the user in the latest and most accurate way. Among the new and current collections of Istanbul Aydın University Information Center; There are collections such as the collection of literature and historical studies and the collection of medical books for medical students. There are also periodicals and reference sources. In addition, computers are offered to our users in order to support academic research. Istanbul Aydın University Information Center, which provides a comfortable research and study environment for students with its private study rooms, dual study areas and drawing class, is open for use 24/7.

Name: Friends of the Ottawa Public Library Association
Description:
FOPLA’s mission is to lead a community of Friends in support of the Ottawa Public Library. We do this through our fundraising and advocacy efforts, and by acting as the number one advocate for the Ottawa Public Library in our community.

We strive to deliver a fulfilling volunteer experience, because we know our volunteers are vital to helping us build a growing community of library users and supporters.

Because of our efforts, and due to the dedication of our volunteers, we’re proud to be one of the leading library Friends’ groups in Canada. Since 2003, we’ve given more than $3.6 million to the Ottawa Public Library to enhance their programs, services, and equipment across the city.

Name: Mississippi Library Commission
Description:
The Mississippi Library Commission was established in 1926 by an Act of the Mississippi Legislature. The agency was charged with giving advice, when asked, to schools and public libraries and to communities desiring to establish libraries. Further, the agency was required to obtain annual reports from all libraries in the state and to make a biennial report to the legislature of its work. The Act also authorized the Board of Commissioners to purchase and operate traveling libraries which might circulate to just about any library, organization, or group including charitable and penal institutions. Today, the Mississippi Library Commission offers a wide variety of direct and indirect services to libraries, government agencies and the citizens of Mississippi.

We believe that all Mississippians deserve quality library services. We recognize that our staff is an essential asset in delivering services that ensure customer expectations are met or exceeded. We commit to working hard, exhibit honorable behavior, to know what is right and to do it. We believe in being fair, honest, and respectful. We value a workplace distinguished by open, direct, and timely communication. To that end, we pursue new ideas with energy and rely upon the talents, skills, knowledge, and abilities of staff and colleagues to meet the changing needs of the people we serve.

Name: Saint Paul Public Library
Description: Saint Paul Public Library is welcomes residents of Saint Paul, Minnesota to connect, learn, participate and grow across twelve community branches, a Central Library in downtown Saint Paul, and a Bookmobile that travels throughout the city.

Name: Northbrook Public Library
Description: The Northbrook Public Library nurtures community and stimulates lifelong learning through innovative, responsive programming, partnerships, resources, and services. We deliver excellent customer service to our patrons to create a welcoming, inclusive environment.

Name: High Plains Library District
Description: We're a library district located in Northern Colorado, providing the sorts of library services you'd expect plus a whole lot more! Between our 7 Branch locations, 9 Member locations, and one of the most robust Outreach departments in the country, we serve multiple diverse communities with a wide variety of needs.

Name: Business Quotes and Motivation
Description: Everyone wants to go to heaven, but no one wants to die. Most people dream of being rich, but are terrified of losing money. So they never get to heaven.

Name: Biblioteksentralen
Description: Biblioteksentralen har landets kommuner og fylkeskommuner som medlemmer og har levert fellesløsninger til bibliotek siden 1952. Vi er et ikke-økonomisk samvirkeforetak basert i Oslo. All fortjeneste går tilbake til utvikling av nye og bedre tjenester for bibliotek knyttet til samlingsutvikling og formidling.

Name: NCW Libraries
Description:
Established in 1960, NCW Libraries provides public library service to over 250,000 people in Chelan, Douglas, Ferry, Grant, and Okanogan counties. 

Our 14,497 square-mile service area comprises about 1/4 of Washington State's land-surface area. Geographically, NCW Libraries is the largest library in Washington State.

Management and control of NCW Libraries is vested in a regional board consisting of two trustees from Chelan and Grant Counties and one trustee from each of the three remaining counties. NCW Libraries is supported almost exclusively by property taxes and proportional fees from incorporated cities and towns that choose to contract with the regional library.

Access to the library's collection of over 700,000 books and other materials is available through 30 community libraries, two bookmobiles, and Mail Order Library Service. 

Learn more at ncwlibraries.org.

Name: Sector Instituut Openbare Bibliotheken
Description: Het Sectorinstituut Openbare Bibliotheken (SIOB) is het landelijke instituut voor alle openbare bibliotheken. De belangrijkste opdracht is de versterking en innovatie van de bibliotheeksector, de grootste culturele sector van Nederland. De focus ligt daarbij in belangrijke mate op de digitale bibliotheek.

Name: Urban Librarians Unite
Description:
ULU is a passionate group of urban library professionals and advocates working to build community centered 21st Century Libraries.

Core Values:
+speaking up for libraries and their communities
+providing visibility and mobilizing supporters
+providing support and education for urban librarians

You can find more information about our advocacy work at savenyclibraries.org.

www.urdubooks.com.pk

Name: Sistema de Bibliotecas da Unicamp - SBU
Description:
O Sistema de Bibliotecas da Unicamp (SBU) provê informação de excelência para ensino, pesquisa e extensão, em um ambiente que respeita a diversidade e a socialização. 

Oferecemos acesso à informação científica, tecnológica, histórica e cultural por meio de produtos e serviços inovadores, buscando a satisfação dos usuários. 

Nossos valores incluem excelência, cooperação, acessibilidade e comprometimento. 
Visamos ser referência nacional e internacional, com base na responsabilidade social, ética e valorização do ser humano.

Name: Contra Costa County Library
Description: Contra Costa County Library is a system of 26 libraries located across Contra Costa County.

Name: East Lansing Public Library
Description:
The East Lansing Public Library's mission is to provide a place and resources where people gather to share information and ideas to enrich lives and foster community. The vision is to enrich, connect and transform lives through knowledge and innovation.

The East Lansing Public Library is the recipient of the 2017 State Librarian’s Excellence award and centrally located just north of Michigan State University, within the East Lansing Community. The library includes meeting room spaces, quiet study areas, a teen area, a 1,100 square foot Maker Studio and over 3,000 square feet of Children’s space.  With more than 30 staff members, the library is committed to providing services to the diverse MSU/East Lansing community.

Name: Digital Antiquity
Description: Digital Antiquity is a collaborative organization devoted to enhancing preservation of and access to irreplaceable archaeological records and data.  Digital Antiquity supports archaeological research, resource management, education, and public outreach by providing new and innovative ways of finding, managing, preserving, and using archaeological information.  Archaeologists, computer scientists, and information management experts have created Digital Antiquity with two basic goals. One is to improve substantially the ease of accessing and using archaeological information. The other, equally important, is to provide for the long-term preservation of the irreplaceable records of archaeological investigations.

Description: Description

Name: Bartholomew County Public Library
Description: Located in the heart of downtown Columbus, Indiana, our architecturally unique library serves as a crossroads for lifelong learning in our community.

Name: Vernon Area Public Library
Description: The Vernon Area Public Library District directly serves the 44,002 residents of a 29-square mile area that includes all or parts of Buffalo Grove, Lincolnshire, Long Grove, Vernon Hills, Prairie View, Riverwoods and unincorporated Ela and Vernon townships. In addition to access to books, movies and music, the library provides free classes and performances, free Wi-Fi and internet access, on-demand and downloadable music, movies, audiobooks, and e-books, and specialized research services.

Description: Bienvenue sur le compte officiel des 10 BU de l'université de Franche-Comté!

Description: The Chicago Tool Library is a community nonprofit lending institution whose mission is to provide equitable access to tools, equipment, and information to allow all Chicagoans to learn, share, and create.

Description:

The main goal is to provide a possibility to read for all members of Iranian community, develop and promote reading and also provide the best services for all Book Lovers.
