Aberta ao público em 2013, a Biblioteca Brasiliana Guita e José Mindlin (BBM) é um órgão da Pró-Reitoria de Cultura e Extensão Universitária da Universidade de São Paulo (USP), criada para abrigar e integrar a coleção brasiliana reunida ao longo de mais de oitenta anos pelo bibliófilo José Mindlin e por sua esposa, a conservadora Guita Mindlin.

Com um expressivo conjunto de livros e manuscritos, a brasiliana reunida pelo casal é considerada a mais importante coleção do gênero formada por particulares. O acervo é composto por cerca de 40 mil títulos, correspondentes a aproximadamente 60 mil volumes. Além da coleção de José e Guita Mindlin, a Biblioteca incorporou parte do acervo do bibliófilo e bibliotecário Rubens Borba de Moraes, que, após seu falecimento, em 1986, deixou cerca de 2.300 obras ao casal Mindlin. Atualmente, mais de 4 mil itens desse grande e diverso acervo estão disponíveis digitalmente, com acesso totalmente gratuito.

Desde sua criação, a Biblioteca reúne especialistas, sedia projetos e apoia iniciativas de estudos, desenvolvendo atividades em torno de quatro campos do saber: Estudos Brasileiros; História do Livro e da Leitura; Tecnologia do Conhecimento e Humanidades Digitais; e Preservação, conservação e restauração do livro e do papel.

Name: Forest History Society
Description: The Forest History Society is a nonprofit library and archive dedicated to collecting, preserving, and disseminating forest and conservation history for all to use. The Society links the past to the future while reminding us about our important forest heritage.

Name: FORENINGEN LES
Description: FORENINGEN LES is a company based out of Postboks 183 , Sentralen, OSLO, Oslo, Norway.

Name: Libfocus
Description: A communal blog with a broad and open-minded take on the subject of library and information management. We  guest posts!

Name: Whitby Public Library
Description:
We’re the Whitby Public Library, located in Whitby, Ontario, Canada. 

We are the community’s ‘Doorway to Discovery’: engaging minds and
connecting people.

Name: de Bibliotheek Bibliorura
Description:
Wij geloven in gelijke kansen. Goed kunnen lezen draagt daar aan bij. 
Onze missie luidt dan ook: "Bibliotheek Bibliorura is de schakel tussen lezen en educatie. Hiermee vormt zij het fundament voor de burger, om volwaardig te kunnen participeren in de maatschappij.”

Name: East Lansing Public Library
Description:
The East Lansing Public Library's mission is to provide a place and resources where people gather to share information and ideas to enrich lives and foster community. The vision is to enrich, connect and transform lives through knowledge and innovation.

The East Lansing Public Library is the recipient of the 2017 State Librarian’s Excellence award and centrally located just north of Michigan State University, within the East Lansing Community. The library includes meeting room spaces, quiet study areas, a teen area, a 1,100 square foot Maker Studio and over 3,000 square feet of Children’s space.  With more than 30 staff members, the library is committed to providing services to the diverse MSU/East Lansing community.

Name: Documentary Heritage and Preservation Services for New York (DHPSNY)
Description: Documentary Heritage and Preservation Services for New York (DHPSNY) is a program of the New York State Archives and New York State Library to provide service and support for the state’s archival and library research collections. As a statewide initiative, DHPSNY offers free planning and education services to collecting institutions — including archives, libraries, historical societies, museums, and other organizations — that safeguard and ensure access to historical records and library research materials.

Name: Silkeborg Bibliotekerne
Description:
Silkeborg Bibliotekerne består af hovedbiblioteket i Silkeborg og lokalbibliotekerne i Kjellerup, Gjern og Them, samt Silkeborg Arkiv.
Silkeborg Bibliotekerne ønsker i hverdagen, såvel som i den strategiske dagsorden, at bidrage til stærke by- og lokalsamfund overalt
i kommunen. Det udmøntes, i form af indsatser, der udspiller sig på bibliotekerne, udenfor bibliotekerne og ikke mindst i de digitale
universer.
Vores daglige arbejde og Strategien 2024 spiller aktivt ind i Silkeborg Kommunes Planstrategi 2040 og Udviklingsstrategi for Vækst og Velfærd 2018-2030.

Name: Rockford Public Library
Description:
Welcome to the Official Rockford Public Library LinkedIn Page!

Since 1872, RPL has proudly served Rockford Illinois with access to learning, culture, and lifelong discovery. Follow us for updates, events, and stories that celebrate our mission and our city.

Proudly serving Rockford for over 150 years!

Name: Santa Clara County Library District (SCCLD)
Description:
The Santa Clara County Library District is an open forum promoting knowledge, ideas, and cultural enrichment. The library provides free access to informational, educational, and recreational materials and services. In response to community needs, the library provides diverse resources on a wide variety of subjects and viewpoints and helps people use these resources.

WE ARE:
7 Community Libraries
1 Branch Library
2 Bookmobiles
Online Library 24/7

SERVING THE AREAS OF:
Campbell
Cupertino
Gilroy
Los Altos
Los Altos Hills
Milpitas
Monte Sereno
Morgan Hill
Saratoga
All Unincorporated areas of Santa Clara County

OUR RESOURCES: $50,714,808 BUDGET
287.40 Full Time Equivalents staff positions
23,946 open hours serving the public
59,622 volunteer hours

OUR PEOPLE: SERVICE POPULATION 440,440
355,720 cardholders
3,337,726 library visits
4,105,146 website visits

OUR COLLECTION: 2,051,703 ITEMS
9,259,837 checkouts
1,575,652 database searches

OUR EVENTS:
5,975 classes and programs in 2018
233,851 in program attendance in 2018

SUMMER READING PROGRAM 2018
402 classes and programs
23,651 in program attendance
32,123 Summer Reading Club Participants
5,388 Lunch at the Library meals served

Name: Business & IP Centre Leeds
Description:
Whether you are taking your first steps in setting up in business, or looking to grow an established business, at Business & IP Centre Leeds we have a wealth of information at our fingertips. We can guide you through the procedures required to help you protect the intellectual property in your products and services, provide access to specialist databases covering market research, company information, and patents and trademarks. 

We draw on a wide range of resources and have extensive experience in dealing with business and intellectual property enquiries. We are members of the Europe-wide PATLIB network, the British Library's Business & IP Centre network, and work closely with the West and North Yorkshire Chamber of Commerce and other partners.

You can book a free one to one consultation with specialists including business advisors, accountants and IP attorneys, and attend a range of free events and workshops to help you start-up and grow your business. 

We are based on the 2nd floor of Leeds Central Library, and also host regular online workshops and webinars.

Business & IP Centre Leeds is a one-stop source for all your business and intellectual property needs.

Name: Kenosha Public Library
Description:
We are an inclusive, welcoming community that strengthens neighborhoods, inspires shared learning, and nurtures curiosity.

Vision: The Kenosha Community will be universally literate, civically engaged, and embrace multiple cultures and generations.

Our staff values: intellectual freedom, compassionate professionalism, collaboration, diversity, equity, and inclusion.

Name: The Young Adult Library Services Association
Description: The Young Adult Library Services Association (YALSA) is a national association of librarians, library workers and advocates whose mission is to expand and strengthen library services for teens, aged 12-18. Through its member-driven advocacy, research, and professional development initiatives, YALSA builds the capacity of libraries and librarians to engage, serve and empower teens.

Name: Library Of Entrepreneurship, University of Tehran
Description: Email: Lib.ent@ut.ac.ir

Name: de Zoomerij
Description:
De Zoomerij inspireert jong en oud met verhalen, kunst, cultuur en waardevolle ontmoetingen en draagt eraan bij dat iedereen volwaardig kan meedoen aan onze samenleving. 
Stichting de Zoomerij is ontstaan uit de fusie tussen de Bibliotheek Veluwezoom en Cultuurbedrijf RIQQ en werkzaam in de gemeenten Rheden, Renkum en Rozendaal.

Name: Electronic Resources and Libraries (ER&L)
Description:
ER&L believes great things happen when eresources, digital services and related library industry folks come together, meet, learn and have some fun along the way. Join us on March 1-4, 2026, for ER&L Fest in Austin, Texas, and Online!

Since 2005, ER&L has convened a conference and online learning opportunities to support the improvement of the way we collect, manage, maintain, and make accessible electronic resources. As technology and our approach to it changes, iterates and improves, we know our important work is never done. At ER&L, we bring together the many library and industry roles together in a thoughtful, collaborative and education-packed conference.

ER&L is a friendly niche conference made through the efforts of a fleet of libraryland volunteers and a small but mighty team led by our librarian founder. With a focus on a comfortable and inclusive environment with ample opportunities to network, ER&L is a great way to get to know the community.

Flanked with pre- and post-conference workshops and filled with over 100 peer-reviewed sessions, deep-diving seminars, and multiple networking opportunities, ER&L offers attendees the ability to gain practical advice, develop lists of new tools and resources, and deepen understanding on challenging topics through case studies and peer presentations.

Name: Tacoma Public Library
Description: We empower our community by bringing people together to discover, connect, create, learn, and thrive.

Name: Alachua County Library District
Description:
Alachua County Library District (ACLD) is a public library organization located in North Central Florida. ACLD provides books, movies, music, and research assistance free of charge to the residents of Alachua County and the state of Florida. 

ACLD consists of 12 locations, 2 bookmobiles, and numerous deposit collections. ACLD also provides free downloads for e-books, audiobooks, music, and more at www.aclib.us. 

Questions? Ask Us! http://ask.aclib.us/

Name: Openbare Bibliotheek Brugge
Description:
De Brugse Openbare Bibliotheek is een bron van inspiratie en ontwikkeling. De bibliotheek is een plek waar verhalen, cultuur, kennis en ideeën uitgewisseld worden in documentaire, digitale en sociale vorm. Zo worden mensen geïnspireerd en ondersteund bij het ontwikkelen van kennis, vaardigheden en talenten. De bibliotheek wil hiermee alle bevolkingsgroepen van de stad en omgeving aanspreken en hun ontmoeting stimuleren.
Ze is tegelijk hedendaags en eeuwenoud. Als bewaarbibliotheek beheert ze een kostbaar cultureel erfgoed, met het accent op de Brugse (boek)geschiedenis en letterkunde. Ze draagt zorg voor deze geschreven en gedrukte collecties om ze over te dragen aan volgende generaties. Ze activeert dit erfgoed vanuit een geïntegreerde visie op de globale bibliotheekwerking.
Als basisdienstverlening streeft de bibliotheek naar een zo drempelloos mogelijke toegang. Ze gaat actief op zoek naar gebruikers die om wat voor reden dan ook minder participeren. Door haar brede collectie en wetenschappelijke steunfunctie heeft ze een uitstraling die verder reikt dan het Brugse.
Via het netwerk van veertien vestigingen bedient de bibliotheek de Brugse bevolking. Met een gevarieerd aanbod bemiddelt ze actief bij het beantwoorden van vragen op het vlak van cultuur, kennis, vorming en ontspanning. Diversiteit, kwaliteit en afstemming op de lokale situatie en de lokale behoeften vormen dan ook het uitgangspunt.

Name: Nurul Ilm Library
Description: Welcome to Nurul Ilm Library, a vibrant library and reading hall designed to ignite your intellectual curiosity and transform your future. With a spacious capacity of up to 50 individuals, our space is crafted for learning, collaboration, and inspiration. Whether you're diving into a new book, engaging in thought-provoking discussions, or working on your next big idea, we offer the perfect environment to fuel your educational journey. Join us in our mission to "Illuminate Your Path with Knowledge" and be part of a community dedicated to personal and professional growth. Explore, connect, and discover how education can reshape your world.

Name: Biblioteksentralen
Description: Biblioteksentralen har landets kommuner og fylkeskommuner som medlemmer og har levert fellesløsninger til bibliotek siden 1952. Vi er et ikke-økonomisk samvirkeforetak basert i Oslo. All fortjeneste går tilbake til utvikling av nye og bedre tjenester for bibliotek knyttet til samlingsutvikling og formidling.

Name: Bibliotheek West Achterhoek
Description:
Lezen, leren, inspireren... Je vindt het allemaal in de bibliotheek!
Bibliotheek West-Achterhoek heeft vestigingen in Doesburg, Doetinchem, Hengelo, Vorden, Wehl en Zelhem en een Servicepunt in Steenderen. Bij ons kun je lezen, leren en inspiratie opdoen. Loop gewoon eens bij ons binnen of bezoek onze site en ontdek wat de bibliotheek voor jou kan betekenen!

Name: National Acquisitions Group
Description:
NAG is a professional organisation for people responsible for or interested in the acquisition, management and development of library resources in libraries of all types. It is run by its members for its members.

NAG produces impartial good practice guidelines and standards relating to its core purpose. It offers opportunities for education and training, knowledge sharing and networking through its annual in person events and a regular series of webinars. Members benefit from discounts on events and access to "Ask Us" services and webinars.

NAG is a voice for everyone associated with library and information resources – librarians, information officers, publishers and service suppliers – providing leadership and a source of shared expertise for its membership.

Name: Institut Dominicain d'Etudes Orientales
Description: La mission fondamentale de l’Institut dominicain d’études orientales (Idéo) réside dans l’exploration du patrimoine théologique et philosophique de l’islam et de la richesse des cultures islamiques. Elle s’accomplit au sein de la société égyptienne grâce à une immersion de ses chercheurs, dominicains ou laïcs, qui résident au Caire, dans le but de susciter une théologie qui encourage une communion fraternelle avec les musulmans en mettant en lumière les vérités inscrites dans leurs traditions religieuses.

Name: Zagrebačko knjižničarsko društvo (Zagreb Library Association)
Description:
Zagrebačko knjižničarsko društvo je regionalna strukovna udruga koja okuplja djelatnike knjižničarske struke na području Grada Zagreba i Zagrebačke županije. Svrha, ciljevi i zadaci Društva su da pridonosi stručnom obrazovanju, prati, proučava i obrađuje stručna pitanja i daje prijedloge za unapređivanje knjižnične djelatnosti; potiče osnivanje i razvitak svih vrsta knjižnica i širi zanimanje društva za knjigu i knjižnice; sudjeluje u kreiranju i provođenju politike na području knjižničarstva; zalaže se za odgovarajući društveni i ekonomski položaj knjižničnih djelatnika. Skraćeni naziv Društva je ZKD. Zagrebačko knjižničarsko društvo je član Hrvatskog knjižničarskog društva a njegovi članovi aktivno sudjeluju u radu stručnih tijela HKD-a.

Sviđaju Vam se sadržaji koje objavljujemo i želite nam poslati fotografije sa svog knjižničarskog putovanja ili posjeta spomen-kući poznatog autora, fantastičnu knjižnicu u kojoj radite, policu knjiga na neobičnom mjestu, predložiti kolegicu ili kolegu kao lice ZKD-a ili gosta za ZKDruškanje, javiti da ste objavili članak u knjižničarskom časopisu, organizirate konferenciju ili webinar? Sve vaše prijedloge možete poslati na mail: drustvenemreze@zkd.hr

Name: SPN, Stichting Samenwerkende POI's Nederland
Description: Stichting Samenwerkende POI’s Nederland (SPN) is de organisatie van de gezamenlijke Provinciale Ondersteuningsinstellingen. Deze negen POI’s hebben de wettelijke taak om het bibliotheekwerk in Nederland te innoveren en ondersteunen. We bundelen de krachten en zetten samen de koers uit zodat we de uitvoering op provinciaal niveau optimaal kunnen ondersteunen.

Name: Bëgg Lire
Description:
Bëgg Lire est une start-up socio-éducative dont la vision est de contribuer à l'amélioration du système éducatif sénégalais et même africain.

Nous faisons la promotion de la lecture et d'une éducation de qualité qui peut être accessible à tous. Sur les réseaux sociaux, nous attirons l'attention des internautes sur les bienfaits et l'importance de la lecture. 

Nous avons développé un site web www.begglire.com qui est une plateforme d’achat et de vente de livres avec un catalogue qui ne cessera d'être enrichi par vos livres mais aussi par les livres des libraires locaux. Vous êtes maintenant en mesure de trouver au même endroit les livres les plus rares du Sénégal et de bénéficier d’un service de livraison selon vos désirs en quelques clics.

POURQUOI Bëgg Lire ?
PARCE QUE 
	
• Tous les livres vendus sur la plateforme sont certifiés conformes à la commande de l'acheteur à défaut d'un remboursement.
	
• Les prix des livres sont librement fixés par leurs propriétaires et vous bénéficiez d'un meilleur marché concurrentiel.
 	
• Vous pouvez acheter et vendre vos livres de Dakar et de partout au Sénégal.
 	
• En un clic, vous pouvez dénicher le livre que vous avez tant cherché ou facilement trouver un nouveau client à confier votre collection.

• Un système de sécurité optimisé nous permet de préserver l'intégrité de vos données personnelles, vos revenus et vos livres.
 
COMMENT UTILISER Bëgg Lire ?
C'est simple !

Acheter son livre 	
1. Ajouter un livre dans votre panier	
2. Effectuer le paiement	
3. choisir entre la livraison et la récupération	
4. recevoir sa commande après authentification par Bëgg Lire

 Vendre son livre
1. Mettre en ligne un livre grâce à son code barre (ISBN)
2. fixer un prix de vente
3. mettre le livre à la disposition de l'acheteur via Bëgg Lire
4. Recevoir son paiement

 Nous restons à votre écoute pour tout besoin d'informations supplémentaires
 
ALORS N'ATTENDEZ PLUS !

Name: LOUIS: The Louisiana Library Network
Description:
Through LOUIS: The Louisiana Library Network, from Shreveport to Houma, from New Orleans to Lake Charles, from Monroe to Hammond, all students and faculty members at publicly funded academic libraries have equal access to critical library resources and technologies.  The initiatives that LOUIS provides support all academic programs, such as nursing, engineering, computer science, natural sciences, humanities, and workforce development.  These resources and technologies might otherwise be cost prohibitive to public colleges and universities in the state.  LOUIS effectively levels the playing field for all students and faculty by making resources and technology available anywhere, anytime.

LOUIS is widely recognized as a model for cost-effective collaboration in higher education.  Its centralized organization works in conjunction with its engaged and active membership.  Louisiana academic libraries founded the collaboration in 1992: to address the common needs of all academic libraries; to ensure equal access to resources, services, and technologies; to maximize purchasing power; to share expertise; to support research, teaching, and learning.

Name: ArchivesSpace
Description:
ArchivesSpace is an open-source archives information management application for managing and providing access to archives, manuscripts and digital objects and supports a range of archival functions.

ArchivesSpace is also a community of archivists, librarians, developers, and more working together to create an application that reflects our shared values and solves common problems.

Name: The Chinese University of Hong Kong Library
Description:
The Chinese University of Hong Kong Library was established in 1963 to serve the then newly founded Chinese University of Hong Kong. It coordinates the collections and services of the University Library (founded 1965) and the branch libraries: Chung Chi College Elisabeth Luce Moore Library (founded 1951), New Asia College Ch'ien Mu Library (founded 1949), United College Wu Chung Multimedia Library (founded 1956), Li Ping Medical Library (founded 1980) at the teaching hospital complex in Shatin, the Architecture Library (founded 1994) and the Lee Quo Wei Law Library (founded 2004). The administration of the CUHK Library is centralized under the University Librarian.
--
香港中文大學圖書館於1963年創校時成立，負責統籌大學圖書館及各分館之庋藏及服務。成員包括大學圖書館（1965年成立）、崇基學院牟路思怡圖書館（1951年成立）、新亞書院錢穆圖書館（1949年成立）、聯合書院胡忠多媒體圖書館（1956年成立）、建築學圖書館（1994年成立）、利國愇法律圖書館（2004年成立）以及位於沙田之教學醫院的李炳醫學圖書館（1980年成立）。各館之行政均由香港中文大學圖書館館長統籌。

Name: COUNTER Metrics
Description: We bring the knowledge community together to agree and adopt the global standard for measuring and reporting content usage through normalised metrics.

Name: KopGroep Bibliotheken
Description: KopGroep Bibliotheken is a libraries company based out of Netherlands.

Name: NASIG
Description:
NASIG is an independent organization working to advance and transform the management of information resources. Our ultimate goal is to facilitate and improve the distribution, acquisition, and long-term accessibility of information resources in all formats and business models. NASIG is also the proud moderator of the SERIALST discussion list since 2014.

NASIG is a member of NISO and of Project COUNTER, and is a strategic affiliate of the Library Publishing Coalition.

Name: Muncie Public Library
Description: Muncie Public Library is a public library that has open computer labs, programming for all ages, community meeting rooms, art exhibition spaces, print, media, and eMedia materials, music, audio, and graphic design software, 3D printing, research and genealogy databases, and so much more!

Name: Circle Centre Lund
Description:
Circle Centre was founded to address the problem of overconsumption, which leads to degradation of environmental resources, poor working conditions, and excess waste. 

We believe that by starting a library of goods with items that we do not need everyday, we can start changing the idea of ownership. We aim to promote more cultural consumption, rather than the material consumption of goods. As a part of this movement, we also host open educational events and hands-on workshops focused on sustainable living and reuse. Additionally, by offering a common workspace, we aim to foster a tight-knit community of Lund where people can share not just goods, but ideas and skills as well..

Located at Stenkrossen, we are aiming to serve the community and over 40,000 Lund University students.

Name: Loudoun County Public Library
Description:
The Loudoun County Public Library is the community's information center. It provides free and equal access to a full variety of library resources and innovative technologies to enhance the quality of life and meet the informational, educational, and cultural interests of the entire community.

We serve Loudoun County residents through ten community branches, which share system-wide resources:

Ashburn
Brambleton
Cascades
Gum Spring

Name: Memoria Srl Archivi
Description:
La società è nata (con la forma di cooperativa) nel novembre 1990 su iniziativa di alcuni archivisti che avevano già condiviso esperienze di lavoro in una struttura simile (la cooperativa Mnemon in attività dal 1985), o che avevano operato singolarmente nel settore dei beni culturali. Nel luglio 1997 ci sia¬mo trasformati in s.r.l. Nel bagaglio formativo e professionale dei soci vanno quindi annoverate sia le esperienze maturate insieme prima della costituzione di MEMORIA che quelle vissute fuori dell’ambito societario. 
Gli archivi storici e le loro problematiche rappresentano il campo di interesse originario di MEMORIA. La nostra formazione, i nostri interessi e le risorse economiche allora disponibili in questo settore hanno orientato le prime fasi della vita societaria e la riflessione sul senso del lavoro culturale .
Insieme ai fondi storici, gli archivi di deposito e in formazione, costituiscono oggi, insieme all’attività formativa, il nostro campo di intervento principale. Assicuriamo progettazione, consulenza e operatività affinché corrette strategie di produzione, gestione e conservazione degli archivi producano efficienza nei processi lavorativi degli enti, siano essi soggetti privati o pubbliche amministrazioni, e ricadute positive nei fruitori a tutti i livelli, da chi deve far valere diritti a chi in-daga il passato nelle parole delle carte e dei files. 
Siamo convinti sostenitori dell’utilizzo delle tecnologie informatiche e dei nuovi linguaggi applicati agli archivi. In particolare, abbiamo fatto significative esperienze di impianto di sistemi informativi dedicati all’ambito documentario.
Non siamo un gruppo di tuttologi. Cerchiamo di volta in volta professionisti competenti per inte-grare la nostra offerta di servizi. 
Fidatevi

I soci di Memoria: Leonardo Musci (presidente del cda), Marco Grispigni, Susanna Oreffice, Nicola Pastina, Cristina Saggioro e Nicoletta Valente.

Name: Fries Film & Audio Archief
Description:
Het Fries Film & Audio Archief is onderdeel van Film in Friesland en gevestigd in het gebouw van Tresoar (het Fries Historisch en Letterkundig Centrum in Leeuwarden). Het Fries Film Archief verzamelt en beheert sinds 1988 het filmisch erfgoed van Fryslân. Wij zijn geïnteresseerd in alle films en video’s die in of over Fryslân zijn gemaakt, van heel oud tot zeer recent. Onze collectie bestaat op dit moment uit ruim 13.000 films en video’s die wij voor een deel hebben gedigitaliseerd. De originele films worden bewaard in ons filmdepot in het gebouw van Tresoar.
Samenwerking en dienstverlening staan hoog in ons vaandel. Met ons materiaal ondersteunen wij diverse musea in Fryslân.  Wij adviseren archieven, historische verenigingen en particulieren over beheer en digitalisering van historisch filmmateriaal. Wij werken nauw samen met partners als Tresoar, Historisch centrum Leeuwarden, Fries Museum en de Waddenacademie.
Een groot deel van onze collectie is afkomstig van enthousiaste amateurfilmers (amateur in de zin van liefhebber) die hun materiaal aan ons hebben geschonken of in beheer gegeven. Dit is typisch een collectie die door de jaren heen vanuit de samenleving is opgebouwd.  Wij willen dit materiaal graag aan de samenleving teruggeven. Dat doen we o.a. via onze website, waar u onze collectie kunt doorzoeken en het materiaal dat we hebben gedigitaliseerd kunt bekijken. Daarnaast worden onze films voor vele doeleinden gebruikt: tv en documentaire, tentoonstellingen, educatie, filmavonden, evenementen, onderzoek, thema- en kunstprojecten, etc.

The Kern County Library provides access to resources that enrich lives. We seek to nurture creativity, education and imagination to inspire.

Name: Digital Library of the Caribbean (dLOC)
Description:
The Digital Library of the Caribbean (dLOC) is a cooperative digital library for resources from and about the Caribbean and circum-Caribbean. The dLOC partner institutions are the core of dLOC. dLOC partners retain all rights to their materials and provide access to digitized versions of Caribbean cultural, historical and research materials currently held in archives, libraries, and private collections. Learn more about becoming a partner at https://dloc.domains.uflib.ufl.edu/become-a-partner/.  

Beyond providing a home for digitized and born-digital Caribbean archival materials, dLOC also serves as a network for those working in and interested in Caribbean cultural heritage. Our governance structure includes an executive board and scholarly advisory board representing multiple countries, languages, and expertise. dLOC also supports the creation of pedagogical resources, the promotion of scholarly work about the Caribbean, and training focused on cultural heritage preservation. Learn more about our work by visiting our program website: https://dloc.domains.uflib.ufl.edu/.

dLOC's operations are maintained by personnel at the University of Florida George A. Smathers Libraries and Florida International University Libraries.

Cover photo credit: "A beach in Granada," Bryant Slides Collection Circa 1940-1981, University of Central Florida Libraries, https://dloc.com/AA00029610/00001/citation

Name: Bergen County Cooperative Library System (BCCLS)
Description:
The Bergen County Cooperative Library System (BCCLS) is a non-profit 501(c)(3) organization supporting 77 public libraries throughout Bergen, Essex, Hudson, and Passaic counties in northern New Jersey.  BCCLS is a nationally recognized library consortium known for the quality and cost effectiveness of its services.  Our member libraries circulate 12 million items each year to more than 700,000 registered borrowers.
 
The organization was formed as a cooperative and depends on the efforts of its members as well as the central staff to achieve its founding goals of high quality service and affordable cost.  BCCLS supports coalition and consensus building as key steps in addressing and respecting library needs at the local, county, state and national levels for both adequate funding and appropriate legislation.
 
The BCCLS administrative office consists of a small but dedicated and highly skilled team of professionals in a collegial environment fostering creativity and collaboration.  Core functions include a shared online catalog, centralized cataloging of materials, staff training and support, library advocacy, the management of a network of over 1,400 devices across 84 locations, the administration of an integrated library system (ILS) software and other technological initiatives, and delivery services for material transport between member libraries.
 
Our goal is to support our member libraries by providing them with tools to better serve their communities.

Name: Carter Street Financial Solutions
Description:
His passion in life is to help Real Estate Entrepreneurs continue to build their legacy by growing their portfolios. His clients have the vision to build portfolios that will impact their families for generations to come and he takes pride in being a valuable resource by providing comprehensive accounting solutions to help them reach their goals.

Prior to working with real estate entrepreneurs, he worked as a financial advisor working with retirees that were focused on wealth preservation. He noticed that his most successful clients had a few things in common: sizeable real estate portfolios, bookkeeping issues, and tax issues. The accounting issues would pop up simply because they didn’t speak the language of accounting nor were they well versed in navigating the tax code. Although some were more willing to learn more than others, the problem was they only had so much time. And they needed to get back to what mattered most; building their portfolio.

We all know time is our most valuable resource, so Jori’s team makes it a priority to save you time so you can fully focus on making the best decisions for your portfolio because one wrong decision in this business can be costly.

If you'd like to set aside time to discuss how our comprehensive bookkeeping and tax advisory services can help you save thousands in taxes and accelerate business growth, follow the link below.

https://carterstreetfinancialsolutions.as.me/

Name: Feusseul
Description: Depuis sa création en 2013, FEUSSEUL s'engage à démocratiser l'accès à l'éducation, au numérique, et à la culture. Nous reconnaissons l'importance des bibliothèques comme acteurs clés de cette mission, car elles contribuent à une société plus éclairée et inclusive. Notre travail consiste à rendre les bibliothèques plus accessibles et de les transformer en moteur du développement pour une société inclusive en soutenant l’éducation, le numérique, et la culture.

Name: Minitex
Description: Minitex is a publicly supported network of academic, public, state government, and special libraries working cooperatively to improve library service for their users in Minnesota, North Dakota, and South Dakota. There is reciprocity with Wisconsin libraries.

Name: Zaccheus Onumba Dibiaezue Memorial Libraries
Description: Zaccheus Onumba Dibiaezue Memorial Libraries' (ZODML) vision is a Nigeria in which everyone has the ability to educate themselves. Our mission is to provide channels through which people can freely access information and learning tools to acquire knowledge. To achieve this, we establish community and school libraries, libraries in prisons, as well as online libraries and other resources.

Name: Dublin City Libraries
Description:
Dublin City Libraries provides the public with more than just books – it’s a community resource with something for everyone.

Across our 21 branch libraries, as well as our mobile Library in the Community, our diverse collection of books, CD’s, DVD’s, games and more spans over 950 thousand physical items – with 10.4 million books available to request from across the island of Ireland and dozens of eResources accessible online with your library membership.

In 2010, Dublin successfully bid to become the fourth UNESCO City of Literature, in recognition of its longstanding literary tradition and vibrant contemporary scene.
Policy and programming for the Dublin UNESCO City of literature designation is co-ordinated by Dublin City Libraries who will celebrate 20 years of the popular One Dublin One Book programme and 30 years of the Dublin Literary Award in 2025.

Dublin City Libraries are also jointly responsible for the Dublin Festival of History, which aims to preserve, share and promote the history and heritage of Dublin and Ireland and to encourage and facilitate historical research.

The Dublin City Archive is also part of Dublin City Libraries, located within our headquarters on Pearse Street. Collections can be accessed by appointment only and may not be removed from the Reading Room.

Name: Neliti
Description:
Neliti aims to increase open access to scientific knowledge by allowing universities and publishers to create their own repositories, academic journals and conference proceedings. We particularly target developing countries.

Our vision is to achieve 100% open access to scientific information in order to accelerate research that solves the world's biggest challenges. Since launching in January 2017, Neliti receives over 4 million monthly visitors and is an Alexa Top 10,000 website.

Name: Missouri Library Association
Description: The Missouri Library Association is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization operating to promote library service, the profession of librarianship, and cooperation among all types of libraries and organizations concerned with library service in the State of Missouri.

Name: Colorado Association of Libraries
Description:
The Colorado Association of Libraries (CAL) is the common bond, voice, and power for the library community. We are united to advocate for quality library services, support access to information, and foster the professional development of our members.

Through CAL's efforts, Colorado libraries will be essential to the enrichment of all Colorado communities. The Association will be the most powerful advocate for all library issues in the state. As a model association, CAL will be the first choice for leadership, advocacy, and professional development.

CAL members are librarians, library employees, institutions, and corporations drawn from public, school, academic, and special libraries; public library trustees; education administrators; library service providers; library vendors; volunteers; and library supporters.

Name: ACIM - Association pour la coopération des professionnels de l'information musicale
Description:
L'ACIM est une association française créée en 1989. Elle regroupe des bibliothécaires musicaux et des discothécaires. 
Depuis 25 ans, l’ACIM a développé une communauté professionnelle importante, avec des rencontres nationales annuelles, un site web , la liste de diffusion Discothécaires, une présence sur les réseaux : twitter, facebook, …
Afin de défendre la place de la musique en bibliothèque, les missions de l’ACIM sont de : 
Susciter et en faciliter la réflexion professionnelle et d’animer des groupes de travail (formation, plan de classement, ressources numériques, éducation artistique et culturelle, métadonnées, statistiques, …)
Mutualiser les ressources et les savoirs faire professionnels
Organiser les Rencontres Nationales des Bibliothécaires Musicaux.
Participer à faire avancer les objectifs communs des métiers des bibliothèques, des archives et de la documentation et coopérer avec les associations professionnelles liées à la musique en bibliothèque.

The Association for cooperation of the professionals of music information (ACIM) is a French association created in 1989. It brings together music librarians.  
For 25 years, ACIM has developed an important community with :  
its annual national meetings
its website
its mailing list “Discothécaires”
its active social media presence :  twitter, facebook, ... 
Aiming to preserve the access to music in libraries, the main activities of ACIM are : 
stimulating thinking and debate within the profession and facilitating group projects on current issues (Music librarianship, music classification, digital music resources, arts and cultural education, metadata, statistics…)
Pooling resources and sharing professional knowledge and skills 
Organizing the annual National Meeting of Music Librarians for 15 years
Participating in advancing common goals of libraries, archives and documentation centers and cooperating with professional associations related to the music librarianship.

Name: Provo City Library
Description: The Provo City Library is a public library serving residents of Provo in the state of Utah. It occupies the building of the former Brigham Young Academy, which was built in 1892. In 1976, the building was added to the National Register of Historic Places. After a remodeling process, it was rededicated as the Provo City Library on September 8, 2001.

Name: LACLI
Description:
Welcome to LACLI, an international collaboration to create a repository of free online resources for Latin American, Caribbean, Latinx, and Iberian studies! LACLI is an essential tool to find websites that provide access to a great variety of resources such as audiovisual materials, books, data, ephemera, government documents, oral histories, periodicals, reference works, visual materials, web archives and more!

LACLI is managed by the Latin America Northeast Libraries Network (LANE), a network of library professionals representing academic and research libraries mainly in the Northeastern United States. LANE is a regional affinity group with ties to the Seminar on the Acquisition of Latin American Library Materials (SALALM).

Name: Network of the National Library of Medicine (NNLM) Region 1
Description: The Health Sciences and Human Services Library at the University of Maryland, Baltimore serves as the Regional Medical Library (RML) for Region 1, which provides programs, services, and dedicated support for NNLM Members in Delaware, Kentucky, Maryland, New Jersey, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Virginia, West Virginia, and the District of Columbia.

Name: Henallux - bibliothecaire documentaliste
Description:
La formation de bibliothécaire-documentaliste qu'est-ce que c'est ?

- Une formation riche et diversifiée, alternant culture générale et compétences techniques
- Une assise professionnelle sérieuse grâce à de nombreux stages
- Des langues étrangères (anglais, néerlandais) pour une intégration professionnelle efficace
- Une remise à jour permanente des savoir et savoir-faire enseignés

Tout ça encadré par une équipe pédagogique dynamique, motivée, orientée terrain et dans un cadre familial et individualisé.

Name: TU Wien Bibliothek
Description:
TU Wien Bibliothek has been supporting the work of TU Wien researchers, lecturers and students as a research library since 1815, the year both TU Wien and TU Wien Bibliothek were founded. With media holdings of more than 1.5 million items (books, journals, theses and other printed and electronic media), we are the largest library in Austria for scientific and technical literature and specialist information. Our collection includes materials of historical value, including the library of the Austrian Society of Engineers and Architects (Österreichischer Ingenieur- und Architektenverein, ÖIAV).

Networking nationally and internationally is central to TU Wien Bibliothek's role. CESEAR, e-IRG, COAR, LIBER and KEMÖ are some of the organisations within which we are working to contribute to the advancement of research and of academic library services. TU Wien Bibliothek is responsible for DOI-Services Austria, opens in new window and manages ORCID Austria, opens an external URL in a new window in cooperation with Vienna University. In addition, we support infrastructures for an open culture of research and the development of the European Open Science Cloud (EOSC).

Name: State Library of Oregon
Description:
Agency Vision: Equitable access to library and information services for all Oregonians. 

Agency Mission: The State Library of Oregon cultivates, preserves, and delivers library and information services to foster lifelong learning and community engagement.  

Core Values:
1) Equity: We challenge our personal and organizational biases in order to improve our practices and better serve all communities.
2) Access: We commit to ensuring information is preserved, discoverable, and available.
3) Collaboration: We invest in sustained and intentional partnerships by sharing expertise and resources to achieve mutual goals.
4) Public Service: We deliver excellent customer service and stewardship of resources to support democracy and the public good.
5) Future Readiness: We anticipate and respond to evolving trends and needs of all Oregonians.

Name: Faculdade de Ciências Humanas da Universidade Católica-Lisboa
Description: Faculdade de Ciências Humanas da Universidade Católica-Lisboa is a libraries company based out of Palma Cima, Lisboa, Portugal.

Name: Gloria Coles Flint Public Library
Description:
The Gloria Coles Flint Public Library's mission is to be Flint's "go to" place to learn for life.

GCFPL serves residents of the City of Flint, Michigan through a Main Library located in the beautiful Flint Cultural Center. The Library's key service priorities apart from its core services are Family Literacy, Digital Literacy and Encouraging Interaction in a Community Space.

The Library is a key partner in the Flint and Genesee Literacy Network, a network of service providers aiming to achieve community-wide results: (1) children enter school ready to learn, (2)  children are succeeding in school, (3) people are prepared for and succeeding in post-secondary education, and (4) people are gainfully employed at a living wage.

Name: Brown County Library
Description:
Brown County Library is your place for information, entertainment, community, and culture. 
Our Vision is to be an agent of opportunity that empowers people to be their best and to strengthen the region by celebrating the diversity of the human experience. We seek to be recognized as a community hub for literacy, learning, innovation, and cultural and economic vitality

Name: Cherry Hill Public Library
Description: The Heart of Town

Name: Innisfil ideaLAB & Library
Description:
More Than a Library!
A Hub, a Community Kitchen, a Centre, a Source.

With an array of incredible programs, events, resources and stories, the Innisfil Public Library wants YOU to get involved today! Books, DVDs, e-resources, free wi-fi, music recoding, vinyl signs, graphic design, community gathering space, 3D printing, soldering, business resources, community events, jewellery making, robotics, ....and we have a laser!


For more information, please visit www.innisfil.library.on.ca

Name: Whitehorse Manningham Regional Library Corporation
Description:
With over 1.3 million visitors borrowing over 3 million items annually, Whitehorse Manningham Regional Library Corporation is one of the busiest public library services in Victoria, Australia. 

Whitehorse Manningham RLC provides library services to the cities of Whitehorse and Manningham via eight library branch locations and is highly valued by community members and two member councils.  
       
The Library Corporation structure offers a wide variety of staff experiences and positions including non-traditional library roles. Extensive staff development opportunities are offered, including support for staff participation in state-wide working groups, special interest groups, scholarship applications and statewide training programs. Visit the library website for comprehensive information on all services and projects, outlined in Annual Reports and Library Plans.

Name: Slovenská národná knižnica
Description:
Hľadáte informácie? Začnite u nás
SNK je moderná vedecká, kultúrna, informačná a vzdelávacia inštitúcia, ktorá slúži všetkým občanom Slovenska a používateľom zo zahraničia.
Ako depozitná a konzervačná knižnica Slovenskej republiky SNK získavame, spracúvame, ochraňujeme a sprístupňujeme prednostne materiály, ktoré:
- vytvorili slovenskí autori, 
- boli vydané / vyrobené na území Slovenska, 
- sú napísané v slovenskom jazyku alebo
- sa obsahovo akokoľvek týkajú Slovenska.
Koľko takýchto dokumentov môže byť?*
* Vo fonde knižnice je 5,1 milióna dokumentov. Nájdete medzi nimi knihy, časopisy, ale aj mapy a iné špeciálne dokumenty. https://goo.gl/aY55gr
* Depozity Literárneho archívu uchovávajú 1.7 milióna jednotiek (rukopisy literárne aj hudobné, fotografie). https://goo.gl/MA6rY5
* V múzeách nájdete desiatky tisíc zbierkových predmetov (od kníh až po nábytok a spomienkové predmety po spisovateľoch). http://www.snk.sk/sk/muzea.html
Tieto dokumenty, u nás v depozitoch, ale vôbec nezapadajú prachom. Vďaka moderným technológiám postupne ožívajú. Ak sa chcete dozvedieť, ako prebieha projekt digitalizácie, kliknite na www.dikda.eu. Ak chcete zistiť, či Vaša obľúbená kniha alebo časopis už boli zdigitalizované - navštívte náš Katalóg digitálnej knižnice SNK http://dikda.snk.sk/.

Name: Biblioteca Nacional de Cuba José Martí
Description: La Biblioteca Nacional de Cuba José Martí es depositaria del tesoro documental, bibliográfico, artístico y sonoro del país, y de lo más representativo de la cultura universal. Funge como rectora del Sistema Nacional de Bibliotecas Públicas Cubanas con 387 instituciones en todo el territorio nacional.

Name: Jean and Alexander Heard Libraries
Description:
Welcome! The Jean and Alexander Heard Libraries at Vanderbilt University is comprised of nine libraries, including Special Collections & Archives. We seek to create a welcoming environment and provide services for research and scholarship, The libraries are dynamic places for faculty & staff, students and alumni to reflect and discover.

The Jean and Alexander Heard Libraries are fundamental to the university’s goal of advancing scholarship and learning. We collect, preserve and make accessible a wide variety of resources, we partner with faculty and students to shape research, and we encourage the development of informed scholars and engaged citizens.

Name: Centre National Universitaire de Documentation Scientifique et Technique
Description: Le CNUDST est un organisme tunisien qui fournit de l'information et de la documentation scientifique et technique aux chercheurs, collecte et diffuse les travaux de recherche sur la Tunisie ou réalisés en Tunisie, et offre un accès à un fonds documentaire international.

Name: ICI Centroamérica – Grupo ICI
Description: ICI Centroamerica: organización técnica, automatización y equipamiento de archivos y bibliotecas.

Name: McAllen Public Library
Description:
McAllen Public Library is a dynamic civic resource that promotes the open exchange of ideas through free access to information and connects a culturally diverse population with the global community.

After 60 years in the downtown McAllen location at 601 N. Main St., the Old Main Library closed its doors on November 23, 2011. Ready for a new home, new look, and new direction, McAllen Public Library relocated to its current location at 4001 N. 23rd St. on December 10, 2011. 

Now an award-winning public library, the new McAllen Public Library is 123,000 square feet and may very well be the largest single floor public library in the nation. The next largest is the Johnson County Central Resource Library in Overland Park, Kansas, at 90,547 square feet.

Find out about job openings by visiting the City of McAllen's Job Openings page @ www.mcallen.net.

Name: Specialist Information Service Philosophy
Description: The specialist information service for philosophy, funded by the German Research Foundation (DFG), is managed by the University and City Library of Cologne (ULC) in close cooperation with the Philosophical Seminar (Thomas-Institute) and the Cologne Center for eHumanities (CCeH) at the University of Cologne.

Name: Buobooks.com LLC
Description: A Buobooks é a primeira livraria mundial em língua portuguesa. Somos uma plataforma digital de venda de livros impressos do Brasil, de Portugal e de outros países que falam a nossa língua.

Name: Australian Libraries and Archives Copyright Coalition
Description:
The Australian Libraries and Archive Copyright Coalition (ALACC) is an advocate for copyright law reform in the interests of Australian libraries, archives and information providers.

We offer informed contributions to domestic and international copyright law and policy discussions and make submissions to government inquiries and we meet regularly with politicians and their advisers at Parliament House.

We also organise copyright education, including training and online information resources targeted at the library and archive sectors.

The ALACC and its members support a copyright framework that appropriately protects the interests of right holders while ensuring access to important cultural, educational and historic content for the public’s benefit.

Name: Bibliothèque Sciences Po Lille
Description:
La bibliothèque de Sciences Po Lille située en plein cœur du centre-ville lillois accueille les étudiantes et étudiants de Sciences Po Lille, de l’Université de Lille et des Grandes Ecoles publiques de Lille. Avec une amplitude horaire étendue (9h-22h 7j/7), des espaces et des services variés, les publics sont nombreux, chaque jour, à étudier, écrire, surligner, lire mais aussi à discuter, rire, dormir, jouer ou manger dans ses espaces.  La bibliothèque propose 370 places de travail sur deux étages.  

9 bibliothécaires et 18 moniteurs-monitrices-étudiants, et autant de fonctions supports du ménage à la sécurité, veillent tous les jours à son bon fonctionnement et contribuent à ce lieu de vie agréable.

Name: New England Library Association
Description:
Officially chartered in 1963, the New England Library Association is a regional organization whose membership represents a wide range of library‑related interests.

Its objectives are to initiate, plan and support regional activities; to encourage the exchange of ideas; and to cooperate with regional and national agencies having related interests.

Mission Statement:

The mission of the New England Library Association is to provide educational and leadership opportunities for library staff in support of improved library services for the people of New England. To that end, the association (1) engages regionally in important discussions in the library profession, (2) encourages the exchange of ideas through a variety of formal and informal events and (3) collaborates regionally and nationally with allied organizations.  NELA is a chapter of the American Library Association.

Values:

Mentoring newer members of the library profession, and promoting leadership development for the good of library service in New England and beyond
Inclusion & networking opportunities for all types of libraries and library workers
Educating/Helping to educate library staff for professional excellence
Recognizing and celebrating personal and professional achievement in libraries
Fostering communications among library organizations in our region (i.e. New England)
Connecting people in ways that make their personal and work lives more meaningful, and helping them to learn from one another
Engagement of members across the organization

Name: Hosting Solutions & Library Consulting (HSLC)
Description: Hosting Solutions & Library Consulting is a non-profit library support organization contributing to the success of libraries by delivering technical solutions and consulting services.

Name: GUARNERIO SOC. COOP
Description:
Guarnerio Soc. Coop è una cooperativa che dal 1982 si occupa di servizi e produzioni per la Cultura. Dal settore iniziale delle Biblioteche l'attività si è evoluta a buona parte dei servizi riguardanti i Beni Culturali. E' strutturalmente divisa in 4 aree: Biblioteche, Archivi, Storia Arte Musei, Fotografia e possiede delle competenze tecniche e organizzative trasversali che integrano l'offerta ai clienti (Editoria, Informatica, Allestimenti, Gestione documenti diversi ecc.).
Dal 2011 si occupa di Turismo Culturale integrando le sue competenze storiche con la conoscenza del territorio. Gestisce ad Aquileia l'ostello Domus Augusta.
IL cliente tradizionale è l'Ente Pubblico ma anche il privato che abbia esigenze riguardo ai contenuti e servizi che essa tratta.

Name: The Lit & Phil
Description: The Lit & Phil is Newcastle’s exquisite independent library, open to all and free to explore and browse.  Founded in 1793, its purpose-built library  opened in 1825 on Westgate Road, and is just yards from Central Station.  It became a hub of learning and enlightenment long before the city’s universities existed and today continues to inspire minds, stimulate imaginations, and confer a wealth of knowledge to young and old alike.
Location: Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear

Name: Asia Art Archive in America
Description:
Asia Art Archive in America (AAA in A), founded in 2009, is an independently established and operated U.S. 501(c)3 and the first overseas hub of Asia Art Archive (AAA) in Hong Kong.

AAA’s mission is to act as a catalyst for new ideas that enrich our understanding of the world through the collection, creation, and sharing of knowledge around recent art in and of Asia. By collecting, preserving, and making accessible information on contemporary art from and of Asia, AAA in A facilitates public understanding and specialized research, instigates dialogue and critical thinking, and seeks to raise awareness of and support for the activities of Asia Art Archive in Hong Kong.

To achieve this goal, AAA in A maintains a reading room in Brooklyn Heights which is open to the public free of charge and comprises over 5000 monographs, exhibition catalogs, reference books, periodicals, and audio-visual materials. AAA in A also organizes a regular program of talks, screenings, workshops, participatory projects, and panels with artists, curators, critics, and scholars in the field.

Name: de Bibliotheek de Plataan
Description:
De Plataan vormt een ontmoetingsplek voor alle inwoners van Vlaardingen, Maassluis en Midden-Delfland waardoor de sociale cohesie is versterkt, de inwoners toegang hebben tot de bibliotheekcollectie en de mogelijkheid hebben zich te ontwikkelen op maatschappelijk, cultureel en educatief gebied.

De Bibliotheek is een ontmoetingsplek  waar je samen of alleen naar toe gaat om te lezen, te studeren of te werken. Met internet en een collectie die is afgestemd op de wensen en behoeften van de plaatselijke bevolking is een schat aan informatie binnen handbereik. De bibliotheek biedt een stimulerende leeromgeving en vormt een platform waar mensen kunnen samenkomen, kennis kunnen delen, specifieke vaardigheden kunnen verwerven en hun talent kunnen ontwikkelen. Dat alles in een informele en ontspannen sfeer. De bibliotheek levert hiermee een belangrijke bijdrage aan gemeenschapsvorming en sociale cohesie. 
Met onder andere activiteiten, lezingen, het aanbieden van cursussen, de themacafés en debatten zorgt De Plataan ervoor dat persoonlijke ontwikkeling voor alle inwoners van Vlaardingen, Maassluis en Midden-Delfland toegankelijk is. 

De lokale fysieke bibliotheek en de landelijke digitale bibliotheek zijn onlosmakelijk met elkaar verbonden. Zij vullen elkaar aan. De Bibliotheek blijft de plek waar burgers terecht kunnen voor een actueel aanbod van boeken en andere media, zowel in fysieke als digitale vorm via goed uitgeruste bibliotheekvestigingen in de drie gemeenten, met (in meer of mindere mate*) ruime openingstijden en via de landelijke digitale bibliotheek, 24 uur per dag en 7 dagen per week. Met digitale toepassingen vergroten we het gebruiksgemak voor onze klanten. *Dit verschilt per gemeente.

Name: Private Academic Library Network of Indiana (PALNI)
Description: PALNI is a non-profit organization made up of 24 private, academic libraries. In PALNI, this library-to-library collaboration enhances faculty teaching and student learning for academic success. Through the “Power of PALNI,” each school benefits from reducing the duplication of efforts and achieving more in quality, value, and support. Read more www.palni.edu

Name: Lethbridge Public Library
Description: Lethbridge Public Library exists to provide residents and guests connections to a universe of ideas, resources, information, entertainment and experience in a vibrant setting. It is the community’s gateway to literacy and to life-long education and learning.

Name: Clinton-Macomb Public Library
Description:
The Clinton-Macomb Public Library (CMPL) is a district library serving a rapidly growing population of 185,000. 

Formed in 1992, CMPL directly serves all of the residents of Macomb Township and most of Clinton Township, with the exception of the portion in the Mount Clemens School District, which is served by Mount Clemens Public Library. CMPL is mostly funded by local property taxes from residents of Clinton and Macomb Townships. 

CMPL is a member of the Suburban Library Cooperative, encompassing 20 libraries in the cities and townships north of Metro Detroit.

Our mission: Ensure CMPL is valued as an essential community service by focusing on the following strategic priorities:

1. Inspire life-long reading and learning
2. Grow young readers
3. Advance student success
4. Connect the community

Name: Laramie County Library System
Description: The Laramie County Library System is the oldest continually operating county library system in the United States, proudly serving Laramie County since 1886. Our mission is to be a hub for engagement, literacy and learning, and lifelong curiosity and discovery, We offer innovative services and spaces across our main library in Cheyenne, branches in Burns and Pine Bluffs, and a bookmobile. Rooted in history and driven by purpose, we remain a steady presence in the lives, stories, and futures of those we serve.

Name: MARAC (Mid-Atlantic Regional Archives Conference)
Description:
Founded in 1972, MARAC is a vibrant, volunteer-run organization welcoming archivists who live and work in the mid-Atlantic region, which includes Delaware, Maryland, New Jersey, New York, Pennsylvania, Virginia, West Virginia, and the District of Columbia.

MARAC is focused on our members' needs and interests. We strive to provide MARAC members affordable archival education, encourage diversity and inclusion in the profession, foster collegiality among archivists, and support archival advocacy throughout the mid-Atlantic region. MARAC membership offers a wealth of benefits and service opportunities.

Name: Allegheny County Library Association
Description:
The Allegheny County Library Association is a federated public library system consisting of 45 independent libraries in the greater Pittsburgh area.

ACLA's mission is to pursue, provide and promote the highest quality public library service possible for all residents of Allegheny County through collaboration, cooperation and coordination.

Name: Zimbabwe Library Association (ZimLA)
Description:
Zimbabwe Library Association (ZimLA) is the professional association that represent the interests of library and information professionals in Zimbabwe. The history of ZimLA can better be explained in the timeline given below;

• Central African Branch of the South African Library Association (1947)

• Library Association of Rhodesia and Nyasaland (1955)

• Central African Library Association (1964)

• Rhodesia Library Association (1967)

• Zimbabwe Library Association (1980)

ZimLA is run by a National Executive Council (NEC) whose members are are elected for two-year terms. There are five branches covering all ten provinces. Branches are supported by Special Interest Groups. The business of ZimLA is guided by a Constitution and Rules of the Association.

Name: William L. Clements Library
Description:
The William L. Clements Library is one of the world’s finest early American history collections. The books, maps, manuscripts, prints, photographs, and other original resources in the Library’s holdings form a remarkable collection of primary sources on America from European exploration through the nineteenth century. 

The Library's mission is to collect and preserve primary source materials, to make them available for research, and to support, and encourage scholarly investigation of our nation’s past.

Name: Bibliotheek Oost-Achterhoek
Description: Basisbibliotheek met een werkgebied van 104.000 inwoners en 7 vestigingen (Borculo, Ruurlo, Eibergen, Neede, Groenlo, Lichtenvoorde en Winterswijk) Daarnaast levert de bibliotheek Oost-Achterhoek diensten aan 6 uitleenposten (Dorpsböke) in de gemeente Berkelland en 6 Bibliotheken-op-School in de gemeente Oost Gelre.

Name: Verona Public Library
Description: Verona Public Library is a home town library with big city frills!  The library prides itself on being a valued asset in the community.  We have become a valued asset by communicating with our customers to ensure we provide what they need.  We are not your quiet, hair-in-bun, shushing kind of library.  To be sure, there are designated places for quiet use, but outside of those areas we are exuberant about bringing excitement to the library.

Name: ASINPPAC
Description:
Somos una Asociación Civil sin fines de lucro que persigue el conocimiento, la especialización interdisciplinaria y la protección jurídica institucional para la preservación de las historias, identidades e ideologías de un pueblo o una nación reflejadas y plasmadas en el Patrimonio artístico, histórico y cultural

A partir del crecimiento de los potenciales y actuales riesgos que atentan contra la conservación del Patrimonio, como los conflictos armados, el cambio climático y la escasez de recursos económicos destinados a la preservación; como así también a partir de las dificultades para acceder a la actualización de los conocimientos que puedan evitar la destrucción o eliminación del Patrimonio, apuntamos a  la promoción y difusión de las diversas disciplinas como la Conservación y Restauración, la Museología, la Bibliotecología, la Archivística y otras disciplinas afines, para la mejora en la gestión y el cuidado de bienes culturales.

MISIÓN

Fortalecer la protección del Patrimonio Artístico, Histórico y Cultural, mediante un desarrollo integral de formación de actores, a través de la educación, la promoción, la investigación, la conservación y la exhibición de nuestro patrimonio mundial.

VISIÓN

Nuestra visión es ser una Asociación activa e innovadora, que responda a los diferentes desafíos de la preservación del patrimonio a través del desarrollo de proyectos de vanguardia que trascienden los límites geográficos para la construcción colectiva e interdisciplinaria del conocimiento científico y cultural, su divulgación e implementación en las diversas disciplinas involucradas. Contando con la capacidad, la dedicación y el altruismo de sus miembros comprometidos con el respeto a las diferentes ideologías a favor del desarrollo de una comunidad y su identidad.

OBJETIVOS

 

Asesorar ámbitos públicos y privados que custodian patrimonio cultural.
 

Salvaguardar el patrimonio cultural.
Incentivar el desarrollo de trabajos vinculados al registro, la investigación y

Name: Adeleke University Library
Description:
To extend the frontiers of knowledge, stimulate learning and promote understanding for the benefit of the community

Mission: To empower students to become lifelong learners and productive citizens in a dynamic global society by providing quality learning experiences that develop the knowledge, skills, abilities and attitudes for continued success.

Name: Athens County Public Libraries
Description:
Athens County Public Libraries is a network of seven library buildings. Administrative offices and central processing facilities are located at the Nelsonville Public Library. The system began in 1935 as an extension service of the Nelsonville school district.

Throughout Athens County, the library maintains a collection of about 320,000 items, adding 25,000 new items every year while weeding out old materials that contain outdated information. The Library also maintains subscriptions to about 130 different magazines and newspapers.

Name: Wyoming State Library
Description:
The Wyoming State Library is one of five divisions of the Department of Administration & Information, along with Budget, Economic Analysis, General Services and Human Resources. The State Library’s mission is to support Wyoming’s libraries and to serve as a resource for Wyoming residents, and state government employees.

The Wyoming State Library was established in 1871, when the fledgling territory’s 2nd Legislature created a Territorial Library of documents, maps and geological specimens.  From those beginnings in Cheyenne’s Opera House, the State Library has become an information hub for Wyoming’s government and residents, embracing changing technologies from paper to microform to electronic. In 1995, WSL launched WYLDCAT, the statewide electronic library catalog that connects over 100 public, academic, school and special library collections. GoWYLD.net, the State Library's portal to knowledge and learning, includes powerful research databases and digital content collections that support education and recreation for all library card holders in the state. WSL celebrates Wyoming’s history through the creation and curation of a digital collections of the state’s historical newspapers, places, patents, trademarks, legislation, and state documents.

Name: Gadsden Public Library
Description:
Gadsden Public Library - Main
254 College Street
Gadsden, Alabama 35901
(256) 549-4699
http://www.gadsdenlibrary.org
Hours: M, Tu, Th - 9 AM to 7 PM; W, F, Sa - 9 AM to 5 PM; Closed Sundays

Gadsden Public Library - East Gadsden Branch
(256) 549-4691
Hours: Mon through Fri - 9 AM to 5 PM; Closed Saturdays & Sundays

Gadsden Public Library - Alabama City Branch
(256) 549-4688
Hours: Mon through Fri - 9 AM to 5 PM; Closed Saturdays & Sundays

The Gadsden Public Library located in Gadsden, Alabama and its two branch locations offer a wide variety of up-to-date materials and E-resources for all age classifications.  Activities include Adult, Young Adult (Teen) and Children's programs and special events.  The library's collections focus on books and materials of general interest, new and popular releases, audiobooks, downloadable books and music, plus a comprehensive and widely used family research and genealogical department.

Name: Pasadena Public Library, TX
Description: Visit today and enjoy free books, movies and much more. Learn something new, develop your skills or explore your creative side. Pasadena Library has something for the whole family!

Name: Public Libraries South Australia
Description:
Public Libraries SA Inc (PLSA) champions every public library across South Australia—from bustling metropolitan hubs to vital regional centres and joint-use facilities.

Through strategic leadership, passionate advocacy and meaningful collaboration, we empower the entire South Australian Public Library Network to thrive.

We're dedicated to fostering inclusive spaces where everyone belongs, embracing fresh ideas, and amplifying the profound impact libraries make in communities throughout our state.

Name: Danbury Library
Description:
As an essential city asset, the Danbury Library is committed to being:

- A welcoming destination
- Responsive to the varied needs of our city’s diverse community, and
- A source of inspiration through words and ideas

Name: Stark County Law Library
Description:
The Stark County Law Library provides legal information services to local judges, attorneys, county and township officials, and public citizens. It has been serving the legal community since 1889. 

The library is open 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m., Monday-Friday, and is located on the fourth floor of the Stark County Office Building.

Name: Coopérative Technologies Dentaires
Description:
La Coopérative Technologies Dentaires est née de l'union des prothésistes dentaires désirant reprendre le contrôle de leur production. Notre proximité permet d'offrir à nos adhérents une prestation de qualité à bas prix et en toute autonomie face aux industriels. 

La Coopérative Technologies Dentaires produit des éléments dentaires.

Name: Waukee Public Library
Description:
Waukee Public Library is located in Waukee, Iowa. Waukee is one of the fastest growing cities in Iowa and is ranked as one of the top places to live in the nation. 

Built in 2003, the library is nearly 16,000 square feet with a collection size of more than 40,000 items. We serve the residents of the City of Waukee, the Des Moines metro and Dallas County. The Waukee Public Library offers many programs and events for children, teens and adults. 

The library features two unique museums built with generous donations; the Hal Manders Baseball Museum opened in 2009 and the Ori Coal Mine Museum opened in 2012. 

The Waukee Public Library is a city department and the majority of funding comes from the city through property taxes. The library also receives funding from Dallas County and the State of Iowa based on certain usage statistics. The Waukee Public Library Friends Foundation provides additional funding for the immediate and long-term needs of the library through generous donations from our community residents and businesses.

Name: West Florida Public Libraries
Description: The West Florida Public Libraries are committed to inspiring lifelong learning, advancing knowledge, and strengthening our community.

Name: Franklin Academy High School, Malone NY
Description: Public 9-12 high school in Malone, NY

Name: Maitland Public Library
Description:
The Maitland Public Library connects the community to a world of opportunities.

With the donation of 360 books by Maitland resident Clara Dommerich, the Maitland Public Library was created in 1896. First housed in a local teacher’s living room, the library later moved to a storefront on Horatio Avenue, near the railroad tracks. The current library building on South Maitland Avenue was built in 1907, with additions made to it in 1959, 1972, and 1989.

Although the Maitland Public Library was originally established, owned, and operated by Maitland residents, and governed by a Board of Trustees comprised of Maitland citizens, it became apparent by 1972 that expansion was needed to accommodate the increasing needs of Maitland’s citizens. An agreement was forged with the City of Maitland to expand the library and its services to Maitland residents. Because the city could not use public funds to build on private property, the Board of Trustees agreed to turn over all physical assets of the library – the grounds, building, and collection – to the city. Under this arrangement, the city agreed to fund the operating budget of the library and to maintain the building and grounds. The library continues to exist as a nonprofit corporation operated by residents of the City of Maitland.

The Maitland Public Library is governed by volunteers serving on the Board of Trustees, to whom the Library Director reports. These citizens meet monthly to review existing services, discuss future plans, and make decisions as needed regarding library policy. While the Library Director is responsible for the general operation of the library and ensures that the library is operated in accordance with the guidelines of the American Library Association, the Board establishes the guidelines and procedures pertaining to library services and personnel.

Name: VALE (Virtual Academic Library Environment)
Description: The VALE Consortium was developed in 1998 as a grassroots organization to develop inter-institutional information connectivity and collaborative library application projects among New Jersey academic libraries. VALE’s mission is to help institutions meet the demands of students and faculty for access to scholarly materials.

Name: Monroe County Public Library, Florida Keys
Description: South Florida's oldest public library, the Monroe County Library has branches stretching 100 miles along the island chain in Key Largo, Islamorada, Marathon, Big Pine Key and Key West, with online resources - including ebooks and eaudiobooks, Kanopy, LinkedIn Learning, Law Depot and more available 24/7/ . The Library is also home to the Florida Keys History Center, with its unique collection of Keys documents and artifacts, and popular online archive (bit.ly/keyspix).

Name: Gaston County Public Library
Description:
The Gaston County Public Library System, consisting of ten facilities across Gaston County, includes the Main Library in Gastonia as well as the Belmont, BC@BC, Cherryville, Dallas, Ferguson, Mt. Holly, Stanley, TECH@Lowell, and Union Road branches.

The purpose of the Gaston County Public Library is to serve the citizens of Gaston County and be a vital, inclusive, and evolving resource dedicated to creating a connected, collaborative, and engaged community through literacy, recreation, and lifelong learning.

Name: ELYRIA PUBLIC LIBRARY
Description: Elyria Public Library serves the school districts of Elyria and Keystone LaGrange.

Name: SAFECULT EU Project
Description:
OUR mission
The SAFECULT project aims at constructing a skills framework for disaster risk management for European libraries, archives and museums and makes available the capacity to deploy preventive and reactive measures to mitigate the risks and the inherent impacts of natural hazards affecting the written heritage 
OBJECTIVE 
- Assess the state of the art of disaster risk prevention and governance in the cultural institutions of the EU and the rest of the world.
 - Develop a European network to jointly address the issues of both disaster risk management and first response intervention, in order to enable cross–border cooperation and assistance. 
- Improve the key competencies and skills of operators (mainly archivists, librarians and conservators), also addressing the issues related to cross-border cooperation and assistance. 
- Elaborate courses, programs and materials to support the education of the operators working in the field of written heritage.
 - Establish a resident international course on the premises of the partners to support the coordination to face the emergency. 
OUR PARTNERS 
The SAFECULT consortium gathers 7 partners from 3 European Countries (Slovakia, Italy, Romania): research centres, SME, cultural institutions with wide experience in prevention, conservation, and risk management of written cultural heritage:
 - SLOVENSKA TECHNICKA UNIVERZITA V BRATISLAVE– project leader – SLOVAKIA - DataPower s.r.l. – ITALY - I- CON - Asociatia Stiinta si patrimoniul Cultural in Conexiune – ROMANIA - Biblioteca Nazionale Centrale di Firenze – ITALY - Chief ETS - ITALY - Biblioteca Academiei Romane – ROMANIA - Ministry of Interior of the Slovak Republic - SLOVAKIA

Our customers include world-leading universities, colleges and other institutions (such as NGOs) and a big number of individual users, such as un-affiliated scholars.
