Name: Distribuidora Mayorista
Description: Distribuidora Mayorista is a libraries company based out of 149 San Alfonso, Santiago, Chile.

Name: Piqua Public Library
Description:
The Piqua Public Library serves as a community-based organization to provide free informational, educational, and recreational materials to its patrons.  The Library is also dedicated to providing an environment that fosters and promotes the philosophy of life-long learning.

The citizens of the Greater Piqua area and all Library patrons will:

have available for their use a wide range of informational sources covering a diversity of topics, levels, and views.
be able to choose from a wide variety of media types for their recreational and informational needs.
be encouraged and assisted in utilizing as many and as wide a range of library materials and services as desired.
be encouraged to use Library facilities for cultural, educational, and community events.
be treated with respect and courtesy.
be encouraged to think of the Library as a place to find new learning experiences and a place that encourages the joy of reading.

Name: Flagstaff City - Coconino County Public Library
Description: The Flagstaff City Coconino County Public Library provides services, materials, and electronic access to information that will meet the diverse needs of adult and youth residents of the City of Flagstaff, Arizona and Coconino County.

Name: i-LIBRA
Description: Introducing our cutting-edge Digital Library, i-libra, tailored to meet the diverse needs of modern learners. Dive into a vast collection of digital books, accessible to all, encompassing a wealth of knowledge from across the globe.

Name: Project Pustak
Description: Project Pustak hires ambassadors in-charge of setting up libraries and coordinating educational projects for the underprivileged across their cities. We are hiring people willing to curate used resources to contribute towards the setting up of these libraries and conduct workshops and seminars at institutions with deficient means.

Name: Binaria - Centro Commensale del Gruppo Abele
Description:
Una libreria, una bottega alimentare, ma soprattutto un luogo di cultura e accoglienza a sostegno del Gruppo Abele Onlus. Al centro commensale Binaria puoi trovare un'ampia selezione di libri per bambini, puoi fare una spesa rispettosa dell'ambiente, delle persone e di qualità superiore. 
Le nostre sale sono a disposizione per corsi, incontri, formazioni e per ospitare iniziative culturali e di intrattenimento. 
Un calendario ricco di appuntamenti pensati per grandi e piccoli si pone l'obiettivo di "fare cultura" e sostenere al tempo stesso i diritti delle persone più fragili.

Name: Biblioteca Civica Tancredi Milone
Description:
Un luogo magico dove la conoscenza prende vita. 

Esplora il nostro vasto patrimonio librario, partecipa a laboratori stimolanti, incontra autori appassionanti e immergiti in un'esperienza culturale unica. 

Offriamo spazi accoglienti per lo studio e la socializzazione, servizi moderni e un programma ricco di eventi per tutte le età.

Promuoviamo la cultura e la conoscenza per nutrire la mente e la creatività, con un occhio sempre rivolto alla crescita della comunità. 

Immersa nel centro storico di Venaria Reale, in un continuo dialogo tra passato e futuro, la Biblioteca Civica Tancredi Milone - sostenuta da Fondazione Via Maestra - è il cuore pulsante della cultura in città.

Vieni a trovarci per scoprire con noi il piacere della lettura e la ricchezza del sapere!

Name: Società per la Biblioteca Circolante
Description:
La Società per la Biblioteca Circolante nasce il 7 Marzo 1869 con un patrimonio librario di 500 volumi e con 184 soci.
Si tratta di una biblioteca popolare il cui obiettivo principale è quello di far “circolare” la cultura tramite il prestito dei libri, da qui il nome di biblioteca circolante.

Name: Tatarana
Description:
Tatarana es un proveedor de productos y servicios para bibliotecas públicas, universitarias, especializadas y privadas. Conocemos el mercado bibliográfico y audiovisual. Informamos a las bibliotecas de las novedades de cada editor y de los catálogos disponibles de libros, música y cine. A través de nuestra tienda online, el bibliotecario compra libros, CD y DVD/BD, y gestiona el presupuesto de su biblioteca. Por la compra de documentos, ofrecemos los servicios de catalogación, indexación, colocación de antirrobo, forrado y envío del material.

Tatarana is a provider of documentary and technical products and services for libraries of any type: public, university, specialized and private. We are an experienced connoisseur of the bibliographic and audiovisual market, which allows us to offer information about the news and the available items of all publishers. The librarian can buy books, DVD/BD and CD in tatarana.net, managing the orders from their library profile. For the purchase of the material, we offer cataloging services, indexing, transport and anti-theft material.

Name: Johnson City Public Library
Description: Connecting People, Ideas, and Community

Name: East Greenbush Community Library
Description: The mission of the East Greenbush Community Library is to inspire learning, imagination, collaboration, and compassion by providing our community with equitable access to resources in a welcoming environment.

Name: Nederlands Hippisch Kenniscentrum
Description:
Het Nederlands Hippisch Kenniscentrum (NHK) is dé plek waar je alle informatie over paarden, de paardensport en -sector kunt vinden. Van verzorging tot stalling en van ziektes tot voeding, het is te vinden in deze online kennisbank. Kennis en informatie wordt verzameld in artikelen gebundeld. Deze artikelen zijn voor iedereen te vinden onder de verschillende thema's of via de zoekbalk op de site. 

Het NHK werkt samen met verschillende organisaties uit de sector. Samen met de kennispartners verzamelt het NHK kennis en informatie. Deze informatie is wetenschappelijk onderbouwd en/of door professionals geschreven. Naast het gebruik van wetenschappelijke onderbouwde bronnen, worden alle artikelen gecontroleerd door ons team van experts: de redactie!

Name: Library For All Australia
Description:
Library For All delivers high quality, culturally-diverse, educational reading material to communities that need it, via a groundbreaking e-book library app. Learning to read should be a basic right for every child, but millions of  kids around the world have no access to reading material. Our unique digital library fills educational resource gaps in developing world communities and other regions where history, poverty or remoteness, prevents access to conventional book collections.

Our quest is simple: we are there when books are not, so that every child can experience the joy of reading.

Name: Fraser Public Library
Description: The E. C. Webber Fraser Public Library is a Public Library located at 16330 E 14 Mile Rd, Fraser, Michigan, United States.

Name: EAST SIDE FREEDOM LIBRARY
Description: EAST SIDE FREEDOM LIBRARY is a libraries company based out of 835 6TH ST E, SAINT PAUL, Minnesota, United States.

Name: buscalibros.cl
Description:
Buscalibros es la librería la librería virtual más grande de Chile y top 5 de Latinoamérica.

Buscalibros nació el año 2005, siendo el primer portal especializado en la compra y venta de libros nuevos y usados en Chile.

Nuestras oficinas centrales se encuentran en Santiago de Chile. Contamos también con oficinas en España, México y Argentina, por lo cual podemos ofrecer a nuestros clientes gran parte de la oferta editorial de estos países. 
Nuestro catálogo también incluye más de 500.000 libros en inglés, traídos directamente de Estados Unidos.

El catálogo completo de Buscalibros incluye más de 2.000.000 de títulos.

Actualmente, Buscalibros recibe más de 1.000.000 de visitas al mes,  consolidándose como el portal líder de compra y venta de libros en Chile y Top 5 de Latinoamérica.

Name: Lakewood Public Schools
Description: The Lakewood School District consists primarily of the former Clarksville, Lake Odessa, Sunfield and Woodland school districts.

Name: Clube da Leitura: Está escrito
Description: Clube da leitura: Esta escrito

Name: GREENSBURG HEMPFIELD AREA LIBRARY
Description: GREENSBURG HEMPFIELD AREA LIBRARY (GHAL) is a favorite virtual and physical destination. GHAL inspires collaboration, change, creativity and curiosity by preserving local history and serving the community.

Name: bibliotecologia.cl
Description: Organización del área de las ciencia de la información, consultora para sistemas de bibliotecas, automatización y digitalización de archivos. Como parte de su organización se encuentra la Agencia Catalográfica Chilena que desarrolla la CIP en conjunto con el mercado editorial.

Name: Zion-Benton Public Library
Description: We are a Public Library located in Zion, IL, who serves the communities of Beach Park, Winthrop Harbor and Zion. Our services include public computers, free wi-fi, remote printing, electronic resources, programs for all ages, voter registration, public fax, public copiers, genealogy workshops, and more!

Name: Manheim Township Public Library
Description:
On September 13, 2010 the Manheim Township Public Library welcomed patrons for the first time at the new library located in Overlook Community Campus. 

A hub of excitement and wonder for all who visit the new inspiration, education and information center is a gathering place for Manheim Township residents and those from surrounding communities. 

The library offers computer stations with internet service as well as free WI-FI throughout the building. The new library also has a cafe and used book store, program center with seating for up to 200 and a children's library offering a place for children to learn and explore.

Name: Allegany County Library System
Description: The Allegany County Library System operates six branches—Washington Street in Cumberland, Frostburg, South Cumberland, LaVale, George’s Creek, and Westernport. It also has a bookmobile that travels the county serving elementary schools, nursing homes, and outlying areas. We offer public technology training as well as a circulating collection of books, large print materials, magazines, videos, films, and books on tape. Each branch subscribes to numerous local, state, and national newspapers and provides computers for accessing the Internet.

Name: Central New York Library Resources Council
Description:
The Central New York Library Resources Council, familiarly known as CLRC, was formed in 1967 as one of nine Reference and Research Library Resources councils ("3Rs") in New York State. CLRC serves libraries and library systems in four Central New York counties: Herkimer, Madison, Oneida, and Onondaga.

CLRC members share in the benefits of Council programs and services which are approved by a Board of Trustees elected by the Council membership. Advice and planning assistance are given by CLRC members serving on Standing and Program Committees. CLRC member institutions pay dues and actively participate in Council services including support for database building, access to regional resources, interlibrary loan, and delivery of materials among libraries. Other services available include sponsorship of continuing education events, promoting legislative efforts on behalf of libraries, and communications. Members also benefit from a variety of grant programs.

Name: Brentwood Public Library
Description: The Brentwood Public Library serves the residents of the Brentwood School District. Our mission is to provide an environment for lifelong learning by making available responsive services and resources that inform, educate, and enrich the lives of the people of the community.

Name: Oak Lawn Public Library
Description: The Oak Lawn Public Library proudly serves the community by bringing people together, providing accessible resources and fostering an environment that inspires intellectual and creative growth.

Name: Twinsburg Public Library
Description:
The Twinsburg Public Library’s mission is to inform, entertain, educate and  inspire the members of the communities it serves (Twinsburg City, Twinsburg Township, Village of Reminderville) 
It provides space to speak, think, meet, work and create. Connects users to tangible & intangible resources and materials to transform or enhance their lives.
Governed by a volunteer seven-member Board, the library is managed by a director and fiscal officer and staffed by over 50 full and part time personnel. The Library is funded by local property taxes (2 mill) and by state funding. Currently state funding is approximately 40 % of the library’s budget, with local property tax amounting to nearly 56%. In addition to other miscellaneous revenue, two support organizations fund both programming and capital projects. These two organizations are the Friends and the Foundation. In addition to its one building, the Library also has a Mobile Library which makes visits to various parts of the community who lack access to the main building.

Name: BWILC - Stichting Bob Wessels Insolvency Law Collection
Description:
The Stichting Bob Wessels Insolvency Law Collection (BWILC) is a foundation aimed at promoting the interest and knowledge of international and comparative restructuring and insolvency law.

BWILC currently manages the insolvency law collections of Prof. em. Bob Wessels, Prof. Ian Fletcher and Prof. Gabriel Moss. These collections are at display at the Leiden Law Library (The Netherlands).

Annually, BWILC organises a two-day workshop for PhD students from Europe and beyond to discuss on-going research in the field of European/international insolvency law.

Name: Norman B. Leventhal Map & Education Center at the Boston Public Library
Description: The Norman B. Leventhal Map & Education Center is an independent non-profit in a long-term relationship with the Boston Public Library. The Leventhal Center inspires curiosity and learning, and fosters geographic perspectives on the relationships between people and places, through free and accessible collections and resources, critical interpretation and research, and K-12 and public education.

Name: Fairfield City Council - WORKARY
Description:
Do you run a business?
Are you an entrepreneur?
Are you looking for a co-working space or meeting room?
Do you need business advice?
Would you like to connect with other businesses?

Fairfield City Council is supporting businesses of all sizes, in all sectors, and at every stage of development, through its WORKARY. Whether you are an aspiring entrepreneur, a start-up enterprise, a home-based business, or an established small-to-medium enterprise.

The WORKARY has dedicated premises at Whitlam Library Cabramatta, in the heart of Cabramatta. It features a community and events space that accommodates up to 100 people. Fairfield City Council believes the health and well-being of the broader community are closely tied to the success of its business community. Sustainable, growing businesses creates jobs, prosperity, social and environmental benefits.

Name: Association for Library Service to Children
Description: ALSC is the world’s largest organization dedicated to the support and enhancement of library service to children. ALSC’s robust network of approximately 4,000 members includes children's and youth librarians, children's literature experts, publishers, and education and library school faculty members.

Name: SBD.bibliotheksservice ag
Description:
Die SBD.bibliotheksservice ag unterstützt Bibliotheken mit Dienstleistungen und Produkten - partnerschaftlich, individuell, kreativ - und agiert als Vernetzerin.
Dies ermöglicht den Bibliotheken, zukunftsfähig zu arbeiten.

Die SBD.bibliotheksservice ag beliefert ihre Kunden mit qualitativ hochstehenden Produkten und Dienstleistungen zu marktgerechten Preisen, insbesondere:

- Auswahl und Rezensionen von Büchern und anderen Medien
- Bibliotheksgerecht aufgearbeitete Medien
- Information und Beratung beim Auf- und Ausbau von Bibliotheken
- Planung, Herstellung und Vertrieb von Bibliothekseinrichtungen und Bibliothekszubehör
- Exklusivvertrieb der Onleihe (e-Medien) für die Schweiz
- Dienstleistungen (Veranstaltungen, Kurse, Weiterbildungen)

Name: Royal Oak Public Library
Description: The Royal Oak Public Library provides opportunities for all to learn, connect, create, and innovate.

Name: St. Charles Public Library
Description:
St. Charles Public Library - Patron-Centric, Stewardship, Excellence, Innovation. #Inspiration Awaits!
630-584-0076

Name: Menomonee Falls Public Library
Description:
Our Mission  

To enrich our community by providing a welcoming and dynamic environment where all can explore, learn, grow and connect.  

We Value  

Excellence in customer service: We are patron-focused – dedicated to friendly, reliable, convenient and caring service.  

Access for all: We provide resources, programs and services that are inclusive and contribute to the success of all community members.  

Innovation, learning and the open sharing of ideas: We strive to spark curiosity and creativity, inspire learning, and connect people to resources, ideas and each other.  

Making the world a better place: We aspire to have a positive impact on the lives of individuals and our community and, by doing so, improve our world.  
Awareness and responsiveness to community needs: We are here to serve our community and our success is tightly woven with its success. Our actions will honor the public trust.  

Our staff, as employees and people: We are committed to the professional and personal growth of our staff and volunteers.

About the Library

Founded in 1906, the Menomonee Falls Public Library encourages life-long learning by providing materials, services, and programs to enrich our community’s educational, informational and recreational needs. It also seeks to stimulate children’s appreciation for reading and interest in learning.  

The library collection contains over 147,000 items including books, magazines, and other printed word materials (including large print books), and non-printed materials such as books on CD, CDs, DVDs, Playaways, CD-ROMS, and digital books and magazines.  

We strive to provide up-to-date reference and information service in person and by telephone.  

Menomonee Falls Public Library is a proud member of the Bridges Library System.

Name: Imagination Library of Johnson County
Description: The Imagination Library began in 1995 in Tennessee, when Dolly Parton wanted to “stimulate children’s imaginations and encourage reading within the family at an early age.”  She provided one book a month to children from birth to age 5, for a total of 60 free books by the time they entered kindergarten.  In 1999, she began offering the books nationwide and even internationally by inviting communities to set up affiliate programs.  Now, over 2,000 local affiliate organizations, like ours, not only help enroll children in their respective communities, but also raise money to cover the cost of the books.  The free books are mailed to children each month, and our program serves children in Johnson County, Indiana.

Name: Millonex
Description: Transform your library’s online services and capabilities with a modern ILS solution that will engage patrons on their terms while simplifying staff workflows. Visit www.simplicity-ils.com to learn more!

Name: Slovenian Library Association / Zveza bibliotekarskih društev Slovenije
Description: The Slovenian Library Association (ZBDS)  is dedicated to empowering library professionals through education, advocacy, and innovation. As a national umbrella organization, we provide a platform for knowledge sharing, continuous learning, and collaboration among libraries. Our goal is to elevate the role of libraries in Slovenian society and promote access to information as a fundamental right.  Join us as we shape the future of the library profession and strengthen the role of libraries in fostering a knowledge-based society.

Name: Lavender Library
Description:
MISSION
We are a hub of learning and connection for Sacramento’s LGBTQ+ community.

VISION
LLACE envisions a safe, inclusive, and supportive LGBTQ+ community in the Sacramento region.

VALUES
We value inclusivity - creating a safe and accessible place for all people to be comfortable in, allowing honesty and authenticity.

We value community - connecting people and organizations, building relationships and partnerships, providing space and support for events.

We value social justice - taking a stand to support non-dominant populations and historically marginalized groups (specifically QPOC), promoting nonviolent resistance, awareness and activism

We value LGBTQ+ stories - local, national, and international history, books and magazines, video and audio recordings, oral histories, storytelling, archives

Name: Paulette Comics
Description:
We provide culturally relevant reading material for all ages while sharing the vibrant traditions and lessons of Ugandan stories about our histories and cultures with the world. Our comic books help in sharing and understanding a rich history and culture in an easier, illustrated and more interactive manner.

Each book is loaded with stories that engage with Uganda, the Pearl of Africa, regardless where you come from. The stories are a mixture of fun & purpose as well as crucial to understanding who we are as Africans.

In many countries, like Uganda, we don’t have consistent access to reading material and books we do have, are not culturally representative. These comic books will be the foundation for a series of culturally diverse books, printed in Uganda to share here and with the rest of the world.

Name: Mälardalens universitetsbibliotek
Description:
The University Library is part of the University's research infrastructure. We are responsible for ensuring that the University's researchers have access to a relevant scientific information supply and receive support in processes relating to scientific publishing. 

We also offer study places, integrated teaching, drop in-guidance and support to students.

Name: Mentor Public Library
Description: Mentor Public Library is your community library. We foster lifelong enrichment by providing materials, services, and programs for literacy, learning, and pleasure in an environment of intellectual freedom and confidentiality.

Name: UWC Library
Description: Supporting teaching, learning, research and community outreach offered at UWC by providing quality services & facilities. Follow us for latest news and updates.

Name: Fureur de lire
Description:
La biennale « Fureur de lire » est un festival littéraire organisé en partenariat avec la Maison Rousseau et Littérature, le Cercle de la Librairie et de l’Edition de Genève et les Bibliothèques municipales. 

La fureur de lire se tiendra du 23 au 26 novembre 2023. Une édition hybride dédiée à la lecture, au livre, à la voix, à l’écoute, aux éditeurs·trices et aux libraires de la place.

Name: FromThePage
Description:
FromThePage is software for transcribing documents and collaborating on texts with others.

Our platform allows people to see an image of a page and to transcribe the text from that page.

We try to keep things as simple as possible, because frankly, transcribing text is hard enough.
 
FromThePage is simple technology that lets people collaborate to produce usable data from historical texts. Volunteers contribute their passion and expertise; archives and libraries highlight their collections.

The results are magical: discoveries about material; public awareness of historic reality, and better public access to records.

Name: Carnegie of Homestead
Description:
The Carnegie of Homestead (CoH) is a community service organization comprised of a public library, athletic club and concert hall, which serves 18,000 residents of Munhall, Homestead, West Homestead and surrounding neighborhoods by providing educational, health/wellness and cultural programs year round.  
The mission of the Carnegie of Homestead is to provide programs and facilities that enhance learning, wellness and quality of life within and outside the Steel Valley. Unique from other libraries, the Carnegie of Homestead includes a library, athletic club and music hall. The Music Hall has a seat capacity of 1,000 and attracts audiences from across our region and across our country. Many nationally recognized artists and bands perform at the Music Hall, and over 50-60 concerts are booked annually. The Library offers programming from toddlers through seniors. The Athletic Club includes several fitness-related amenities, including a pool, gymnasium, indoor baseball facility and full-service exercise facility. Currently, there are approximately 1,100 dues paying members.
The Carnegie of Homestead serves a combination of 3 communities and is located 5 miles south of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.  It operates on an annual organizational budget of $1,200,000.

Name: Orillia Public Library
Description: Orillia Public Library.

Name: QHSE Online Training & Certification
Description: Learn on your schedule Anywhere, anytime. Enjoy risk-free with our 30-day, money-back guarantee.

Name: Fővárosi Szabó Ervin Könyvtár - Metropolitan Ervin Szabó Library
Description:
A Fővárosi Szabó Ervin Könyvtár Budapest könyvtári hálózata, amely 46 tagkönyvtárral és a Központi Könyvtárral várja olvasóit. Intézményünk célja, hogy minden korosztály számára hozzáférést biztosítson a tudáshoz, kultúrához és közösségi élményekhez – korszerűen, befogadó módon és innovatív szemlélettel.
* * *
The Metropolitan Ervin Szabó Library is the public library network of Budapest, operating 46 branch libraries and a Central Library. We provide inclusive, accessible and innovative services that connect people with knowledge, culture and community across the city.

Name: Heuvellandbibliotheken
Description:
De bibliotheek levert een bijdrage aan de ontwikkeling van alle inwoners van het werkgebied en is de schakel tussen lezen, leren, cultuur, ontmoeting en debat. Hiermee vormt zij het fundament voor de burger om volwaardig te kunnen participeren in de maatschappij.
De stichting Heuvellandbibliotheken profileert zich als een ondernemende organisatie, die actief de samenwerking aangaat met lokale culturele en educatieve partners. Het is een lokaal activiteitencentrum, gericht op ontmoeting met inhoud, cultuureducatie en kennisontwikkeling. Daarbij zijn de wensen en behoeften van de burgers een belangrijk uitgangspunt. De bibliotheek krijgt daarmee een bredere maatschappelijke betekenis.

Name: Jefferson Parish Library System
Description: Having a total of 15 branches in the system which serve a population of approximately 434,767, the Jefferson Parish Library System was founded in 1946. The East Bank Regional Library is the largest of the Library's branches and encompasses the Library's Administrative departments.

Name: CAMLIS (Complementary and Alternative Medicine Library and Information Service)
Description:
CAMLIS - the UK's only specialist library for healthcare professionals, educators and researchers with an interest in Complementary and Alternative Medicine - is a joint venture between the Royal London Homoeopathic Hospital and a number of academic programmes and professional associations in the field.

The library has a beautiful reading room, stacks and offices at the RLHH in Central London, but serves its readers also remotely: with a comprehensive range of CAM e-journals, e-books and databases, but also with traditional printed books and photocopied articles by post.

Name: Vermont Library Association
Description: The Vermont Library Association (VLA) is an educational organization working to develop, promote, and improve library and information services and librarianship in the state of Vermont.

Name: Chicago Chapter of BCALA
Description: The Chicago Chapter of the Black Caucus of the American Librarian Association (CCBCALA) is organized to develop an educational, professional, and social organization to improve and develop library service and librarianship in the Chicago Metropolitan area.

Name: Hall County Library System
Description: The Hall County Library System is equipped with facilities and resources to help improve lives and empower visitors to meet the demands of today and the future.

Name: Public Library Services
Description: Public Library Services (PLS) is a business unit of the Libraries Board of South Australia and part of the Department of the Premier and Cabinet in SA State Government. PLS is the central support agency for all South Australian public libraries and has been in existence for over 30 years. Based out of North Tce, Adelaide, South Australia, Australia.

Name: IATUL 2024
Description:
This conference is not only a showcase for Aotearoa New Zealand and the mahi we are doing in the GLAMR sector, but an opportunity to build your kete aronui and enhance the pūkenga of all those present. We hope to achieve this by:
- Celebrating our achievements and learning from our mistakes/taking risks (Ko te hapa te tuakana o te ako – mistakes are the older sibling of learning).
- Hosting a conference where elements of Te Ao Māori (including kawa/tikanga/karakia/waiata) are woven into the fabric of the conference and experienced in a way that is genuine and authentic.
- Providing whanaungatanga – a sense of community and belonging for manuhiri.
- Enacting our commitment to Te Tiriti o Waitangi and supporting everyone on the journey with us.
- Providing manaakitanga – for people to be looked after, to learn, be challenged and inspired.

The conference streams aim to embrace the diversity of our profession and the work that we do in academic libraries, offering the opportunity to educate by weaving an indigenisation thread through all streams. They are:
1. Openness
2. Equity, Diversity and Inclusion – Enabling success for all
3. Wānanga – Sharing lived experiences
4. Whakawhanaungatanga – Building relationships

We look forward to welcoming you

Name: Lib4RI
Description: Lib4RI is the joint «Library for the Research Institutes within the ETH Domain: Eawag, Empa, PSI & WSL»

Name: PSP Asset Protection
Description:
PSP Asset Protection is a family-run business and one of the UK’s leading independent providers of library management software. Established in 1978, PSP Asset Protection has been working with libraries throughout the UK, developing new technologies, and extending our services to meet every need.

During this time, we have gained extensive understanding and built a collection of resources to help provide a tailored solution for each of our customers. Our team have the perfect mix of knowledge, skills and experience whilst still learning new things and applying them every day.

Our objective at PSP is to enhance and improve the quality of the library service of our customers.

Name: LIBRARY OF MICHIGAN FOUNDATION
Description:
FOCUS
Since its inception, the Foundation has raised more than $6 million in private and corporate donations for programs to boost adult literacy, youth and early childhood literacy, special services for the blind and physically impaired, statewide services for libraries, continuing education for librarians, library staff and trustees; and the construction of the Martha W. Griffiths Michigan Rare Book Room and its growing collection, which is housed in the beautiful Library of Michigan.

PHILANTHROPY
The Foundation does not raise money for day-to-day operations of the library. The Foundation provides opportunities for charitable giving to strengthen the cultural and literary world of Michigan by enhancing special programs and services of the Library of Michigan, not otherwise provided through state or federal funding.

NOT FOR PROFIT CHARITY
The Foundation is a 501 (c)(3) nonprofit charity governed by a volunteer, independent board of directors. The Foundation provides opportunities to individuals and businesses for charitable giving to support programs, collections and services of the Library, not otherwise provided through state or federal funding.

Gifts to The Library of Michigan Foundation help the Library of Michigan make a difference for

* Thousands of children and families (MI Reads!);
* Innumerable adults, students, and professionals throughout the state (Michigan Notable Books, MeL, State Law Library);
*Countless historians and book lovers (Rare Book Collection and Martha Griffiths Rare Book Room); and
*More than 11,000 visually and physically challenged adults and children (Braille and Talking Books Library)

Name: Auburn Free Library
Description:
Did you know that in children's books, only 10% of characters are Black, 7% are Asian/Pacific Islander, 5% are Latinx, and 1% are Native American? 

Our Community Library with over 2000 titles donated by organizations as far reaching as Good Morning America, Little Free Libraries, Imagination Foundation (Dolly Parton), Hindi's Libraries, Half Price Books and private donors has books with diverse characters available to all

Name: Csorba Győző Library
Description: Csorba Győző Library is a public library in Pécs, in Hungary.

Name: Library Arcade
Description: Library Arcade is an EdTech imprint for libraries. We publish Arcade Readers to support public and school librarians in promoting reading through gaming. Arcade Readers are innovative books that exist right at the intersection of graphic novels, videogames and skill challenges. Arcade Readers combine the words and illustrations of graphic novels, with the action and engagement of arcade-style videogames. Each book is written to help librarians get reluctant readers connected to their libraries and engaged in reading.

Name: Cally's Library
Description:
We are an online bookshop offering a wide range of books for all ages and interests. Our collection includes bestsellers, classic literature, non-fiction reads, and more. 

We also have an deep interest is personal development and capacity building through reading of books. As such we have subsidiaries which include Cally's Book Club, The Book Date, Read Along With Cally among others. Watch this space for the launch of awesome initiatives this year. A reader today, A leader tomorrow.

Name: Bibliosalut. Biblioteca Virtual de Ciències de la Salut de les Illes Balears
Description:
La Biblioteca Virtual de Ciències de la Salut de les Illes Balears (Bibliosalut) és una unitat d'informació de la Conselleria de Salut del Govern de les Illes Balears, encarregada de facilitar als professionals del sistema sanitari públic de les Illes Balears informació científica rellevant, mitjançant serveis bibliotecaris i productes i recursos bibliogràfics i documentals, fent ús de les tecnologies de la informació i la comunicació. Té com a finalitat contribuir a la millora de la qualitat de la tasca assistencial, docent, investigadora, de la gestió del coneixement i de la gestió sanitària dels professionals de la sanitat.

Bibliosalut, que va iniciar la seva activitat en 2003, depèn de la Direcció General de Recerca en Salut, Formació i Acreditació de la Conselleria de Salut, d'acord amb el que diu l'article 2.4.b) del Decret 17/2023, de 23 d’agost, de la presidenta de les Illes Balears, pel qual es modifica el Decret 12/2023, de 10 de juliol, de la presidenta de les Illes Balears, pel qual s’estableixen les competències i l’estructura orgànica bàsica de les conselleries de l’Administració de la Comunitat Autònoma de les Illes Balears, modificat pel Decret 16/2023, de 20 de juliol.

-----

La Biblioteca Virtual de Ciencias de la Salud de las Illes Balears (Bibliosalut) es una unidad de información de la Consejería de Salud del Gobierno de las Illes Balears, encargada de facilitar a los profesionales del sistema sanitario público de las Illes Balears 

La Biblioteca Virtual de Ciències de la Salut de les Illes Balears es un projecte cooperatiu entre la Conselleria de Salut i el Servei de Salut de les Illes Balears (IB-Salut), que té com a objectiu facilitar als professionals del sistema sanitari públic de les Illes Balears la informació científica més rellevant, mitjançant les noves tecnologies de la informació i la comunicació, per tal de contribuir a la millora de la qualitat de la seva tasca assistencial, docent, investigadora i de gestió sanitària.

Name: National Recording Preservation Foundation
Description: The National Recording Preservation Foundation (NRPF) promotes and ensures the preservation of sound recordings.

Name: Pro Archivum di Cannaò Alberto
Description: La Pro Archivum si occupa di gestione archivistica, sistemazione, valorizzazione e digitalizzazione di archivi di enti pubblici e privati. La professionalità e l'esperienza garantiscono ottimi risultati in un ottica di efficacia ed efficienza che contraddistinguono la nostra azienda.

Name: Lake Forest Library
Description:
Welcome to our LinkedIn Company page! We are here to offer information about resources and services to our local business community and the general public. Lake Forest is home to many entrepreneurs and small to medium sized businesses. Our resources can be of great value to businesses and consumers. If you're not a Lake Forest resident, there's still a good chance that your home library will offer similar resources. 

The Lake Forest Library serves the Lake Forest, Illinois community.  Our beautiful, historical building is located thirty miles north of Chicago on Lake Michigan. The library was chartered on July 4, 1898 and opened on the second floor of the new city hall on June 24, 1899. It moved to its current location in 1931.  

We host events and programs to educate, entertain and inspire the community. We offer books, ebooks, audiobooks, movies, music, databases, training software, and a Media Lab to residents of Lake Forest and it's surrounding communities.   

Call or email us with any questions at 847.810.4610 or reference@lakeforestlibrary.org

Name: Atlanta Fulton Public Library
Description:
The present Atlanta-Fulton County Library System began in 1902 as the Carnegie Library of Atlanta, one of the first public libraries in the United States.

In 1935, the City of Atlanta and the Fulton County Board of Commissioners signed a contract under which library service was extended to all of Fulton County. In 1982, Georgia voters passed a constitutional amendment authorizing the transfer of responsibility for the library system from the City of Atlanta to the County. On July 1, 1983, the transfer became official, and the system was renamed the Atlanta-Fulton Public Library.

Name: Lambeth Palace Library
Description:
Lambeth Palace Library is the historic library of the Archbishops of Canterbury and preserves the national archives of the Church of England. Our mission is to promote public access to our collection by welcoming researchers and through public engagement, such as outreach and cultural and academic partnerships.

Its collections have been freely available for research from 1610, when it was founded under the will of Archbishop Richard Bancroft. In 1953, the Library was redefined as the main special library for the history of the Church of England, with additional responsibilities as a repository and research centre for Church of England archives. In 1996 it also took into its care the substantial pre-1850 manuscript and printed collections of Sion College library (founded 1629), the historic library of the City of London clergy. Lambeth Palace Library’s move to a purpose-built new building, which opened in 2021, has provided the opportunity to unite its archival collections with those of the former Church of England Record Centre and will ensure that all the Library’s collections are preserved in the best conditions and made more widely available in the future.

Name: Opening the Book Ltd
Description:
Opening the Book specialises in the design and installation of reader-friendly interiors for public and school libraries.  We also run training programmes in the reader-centred approach for library staff.  Sister company, Opening the Book Furniture, designs and manufactures innovative book display furniture for libraries and schools, including the BookSpace range.

In 2016 we set up Opening the Book North America to take our ideas and products to the United States and Canada, building on our partnership with established library supplier, Brodart Company. 

Library Furniture
Opening the Book offers a complete range from fun children's library furniture to clever merchandising ideas through to whole library designs.

Library Design
Opening the Book's experienced designers provide space planning and design services for all sizes of libraries. From quick advice to feasibility studies to full installations, we can help you make the most of your options and persuade others of the benefits of including a library.

School Library Design
A successful Learning Commons is an energising environment for a wide range of learning activities. We can help you create an exciting and flexible student-centred space which can become the hub of your school.

Library Shelving
Opening the Book offers two high quality shelving systems. Active shelving gives maximum flexibility for dynamic, hard-working spaces and Performance shelving creates open, organic layouts. These unique shelving systems can be used separately or together to create imaginative, exciting and stimulating libraries.

Library Training
Library work is changing and staff need new skills. On the shop floor, customer care is becoming customer engagement while traditional displays are being replaced by retail-style merchandising. Today’s library managers are expected to develop new expertise in marketing and audience development, in strategic thinking, advocacy and partnership skills.

Name: PLEK 3_Bibliotheek Venlo
Description:
PLEK 3 is een derde plek, naast thuis (plek 1) en school (plek 2), waar kinderen en jongeren op een informele manier kunnen leren en zich verder ontwikkelen. Bij PLEK 3 brengen we taal en talent samen binnen een taal- en contextrijke leeromgeving, zodat de deelnemers hun potentieel kunnen ontdekken, ontplooien en verder laten groeien.

Met vier centrale thema's – techniek, duurzaamheid, burgerschap en cultuur – zetten we taalontwikkeling centraal in een speelse en interactieve aanpak. Maar we kijken verder dan enkel taal: ons doel is om de wereld van de kinderen en jongeren te verruimen. We verbinden ze met innovatieve organisaties en bedrijven uit Venlo, zodat ze kennismaken met de vele mogelijkheden die de toekomst biedt. Van exclusieve achter-de-schermen ervaringen tot creatieve workshops: wij brengen de toekomst naar het heden en laten hen ontdekken welke spannende kansen er voor hen liggen.

Name: LearnTechLib - The Learning & Technology Library
Description:
LearnTechLib is the premiere online resource for aggregated, peer-reviewed research on the latest developments and applications in Learning and Technology.

CONTENT: Encompassing more than 25+ years and 100,000+ documents of published international journal articles, conference papers, e-books, and multimedia content from 200,000+ leading authors, the LearnTechLib connects research and learning within one platform.

LearnTechLib has over 100,000 documents relating to Learning and Technology.

Over 100,000 full-text and abstract, peer-reviewed documents are available, including: Journal articles, Conferences papers, e-Books, Reports, Dissertations, Keynote talks, Presentation slides, and Collections of articles.

ALL PROFITS GO TO CHARITY: All profits from the LearnTechLib digital library are distributed to well vetted charities that have the potential for long term, transformational change.

SUBSCRIPTION: As a non-profit, LearnTechLib answers only to you, the customer, and puts subscribers first.  We are budget conscious, not profit driven therefore strive to keep rates low and affordable so institutions of all sizes and budgets can participate.  

For more subscription information and to subscribe: http://www.learntechlib.org/about/subscribe/

PUBLISHING PARTNERS: By becoming a LearnTechLib Publishing Partner, both the publication and its authors benefit.  If you are interesting in partnering with LearnTechLib, learning more about the benefits at:: http://www.learntechlib.org/about/partners/

AUTHORS: Through LearnTechLib authors may share their work and gain increased visibility and exposure global exposure in the global community of colleagues, universities, & libraries.

CONTACT: Info@LearnTechLib.org

Name: Infopeople (California)
Description: Infopeople is part of the Califa Group, a nonprofit library membership consortium of more than 220 libraries. The Infopeople model provides a breadth of training topics and a depth of training expertise greater than any single library or library agency, no matter how large, could provide. Infopeople training is open to all members of the library community - academic, public, school, and special.

Name: Alexandria Online
Description:
O sistema ALEXANDRIA ON LINE é um moderno gerenciador de bibliotecas que reúne as mais novas tecnologias da informática e da biblioteconomia, integrando e automatizando todas as funções da biblioteca: aquisição, catalogação, importação de registros, circulação, pesquisa, controle de periódicos, relatórios estatísticos e de controle, gerenciamento, emissão de etiquetas e código de barras.

Todas estas funções foram desenvolvidas de acordo com as regras e padrões da biblioteconomia. As telas são amigáveis, interativas e autoexplicativas. Possui ainda documentação detalhada que facilita o uso do sistema.

É um software pronto, testado e aprovado pelos nossos clientes.

Name: books4lending
