The launch of  our Android App "Books4lending" in Playstore  is a sweet news for  the book lovers community of Chennai as their favorite books are delivered to their door steps !

Name: Gloucester County Library System
Description:
The Gloucester County Library System (GCLS) is a group of individual and interdependent libraries that cooperate through a central administrative body to provide a wide range of library services for eligible patrons. Sharing resources enables members of the system to provide more cost-effective and technologically sophisticated services than any could provide operating alone.

The GCLS staff is responsible to a seven-member library commission, which is appointed by the Gloucester County Board of Chosen Freeholders. Funds for system services are provided by the member municipalities through a dedicated library tax.

Name: Chester County Library Business
Description: From starting a small business to searching for a new job, the Business and Career Center has a variety of services and resources to help those in need of top-notch, authoritative information.

Name: ANCEB
Dekalb Public Library
Description:
DeKalb Public Library is committed to providing value and excellent service to the City of DeKalb, an exurban community approximately 60 miles west of Chicago. Serving a core population of approximately 44,000 residents, and drawing reciprocal patrons from the surrounding area, DKPL is regarded as an important information, entertainment, and community resource for people of all ages.

DeKalb Public Library features a collection of more than 150,000 physical items, including books, CDs, DVDs, periodicals, and an expansive collection of digital materials and electronic resources. We are a member of the PrairieCat consortium which provides our library patrons with access to over 1,000,000 items. We regularly bring new technologies to our patrons, and provide wifi, computer access, and training. The DeKalb Public Library is open 7 days a week to serve our community.

The library is run by the Director, who is hired by the Library Board of Trustees. The nine members of the Board of Trustees are appointed by the Mayor to serve three-year terms. The Board generally meets on the second Wednesday of each month at 7:00 p.m. in the Bilder Family Meeting Room. All meetings are open to the public. Check the DKPL online calendar for meeting dates.

The Library is divided into six departments: Administration, Facilities, Public Relations and Events, Adult Services, Youth Services, and Access Services. The manager of each department reports to the Director. The Library has approximately 16 full-time and 33 part-time employees.

Name: Ngo e Mso
Description:
Ngo e Mso është një platformë online, e cila më vonë do të plotësohet edhe me një aplikacion për pajisjet e mençura, në të cilën njerëzit do të  kenë qasje online në libra të lexuara me zë në gjuhën shqipe.
Duke e parë që zhvillimi i teknologjisë informative, që nga zbulimi i interneti deri të pajisjet e mençura, si telefonat, tabletat e kompjuterët dhe duke e parë që përdorimi i tyre tashmë është bërë përditshmëri, por edhe nevojë e domosdoshme për njerëzit në gjithë botën, duke mos përjashtuar as vendet ku jetojnë shqiptarët, menduam që krijimi i një librarie online, ku do të ofrojmë vepra të ndryshme nga autorët shqiptarë e të huaj për lexuesit, do të kishte një efekt shumë pozitive në edukim, rritje të lexueshmërisë, por edhe në ngritjen e vetëdijës shoqërore ndër shqiptarë.
E vecanta e kësaj biblioteke onlinë është se ne për adhuruesit e leximit do të sjellim libra në formatin audio, pra me zë, cka e bënë leximin (dëgjimin) e tyre shumë me të lehtë dhe me të thjeshtë.
Marrë parasysh dinamiken jetësore që kanë njerëzit sot, më shumë angazhime, duke filluar nga puna e përditshme, udhetimet e ndryshme, familja, fëmijët e shumë cka tjetër, ndikon jo pak që leximit t’i mbetët pak e hic kohë.
Prandaj, ne mendojmë se posedimi i një platforme të tillë në telefonin tuaj do të ndihmonte që qasja juaj në literaturë të jetë shumë më e lehtë dhe më e thjeshtë, pavarësisht se ku ndodhesh dhe cfarë jeni duke bërë.
Nuk ka rëndësi a jeni në makinë, në rrugë, duke vrapuar në mengjes, duke shetitur në park apo duke shijuar natyrën, mundësinë që të lexoni (degjoni) e mësoni në cdo kohë do t’ua ofrojnë platforma jonë Ngo e Mso.
Qëllimi ynë është që qytetarët shqiptarë ku do që ndodhën të lexojnë e mësojnë sa më shumë sepse vetëm me dituri gjërat edhe mund të na ecin për së mbari.

Name: Bettendorf Public Library
Description: A wonderful experience awaits the whole family at this high-performing, award winning library situated on Learning Campus Drive, next to the Family Museum in Bettendorf, IA.

Name: Biblioteca Municipala B.P. Hasdeu
Description:
Biblioteca Municipală are misiunea de a oferi, tuturor fără restricţii, acces liber la informaţie, idei, lecturi, încurajează şi susţine libertatea de a cunoaşte, libertatea de expresie, spaţii pentru dezbateri, pentru expunerea punctelor de vedere, creaţiei proprii indiferent de orientarea religioasă, convingerile politice, sexuală, statut social şi intelectual.

Reţeaua formată din 31 filiale are o arie de cuprindere pe întreg municipiul. O contribuţie deosebită la valorificarea tezaurului de publicaţii revine bibliotecilor specializate (Biblioteca Publică de Drept, Biblioteca de Arte) şi Centrului Academic Internaţional Eminescu, Centrului Naţional de Hasdeulogie, Centrului de carte germană, bibliotecile de carte şi cultură evreiască „I. Mangher”, rusă „M. Lomonosov”, ucraineană „L. Ukrainka”, bulgară „H. Botev”, găgăuză „M. Ciachir” şi mai recent - poloneza A. Mickiewicz”, cu colecţii în limbile respective. 

Fondul tradiţional şi cel electronic cuprinde peste 1 mln de volume puse la dispoziţie fără restricţii spre consultare tuturor solicitanţilor. Impactul acestor performanţe are în vedere informarea, documentarea, formarea şi educarea celor peste 148 mii de utilizatori cu o mare diversitate de preocupări, categoriile prioritare fiind elevii, studenţii, intelectualii, funcţionarii, cărora li se oferă un sistem complex de servicii pentru instruire şi destindere. 



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Name: Carnegie-Stout Public Library
Description:
Collections
Carnegie-Stout Public Library serves the Dubuque and surrounding communities with a collection of over 270,000 volumes, 600 periodical and newspaper subscriptions, and a wide variety of audio and video materials. Collections of special note are an obituary file dating to the late 1850s and a newspaper index to the Telegraph Herald and other local newspapers.

Special Holdings & Services
Other special holdings include an Iowa and genealogical section. A volunteer genealogist is available most Tuesday evenings from 6:30 p.m. - 9:00 p.m. to assist patrons. The Youth Services Department places an emphasis on the emerging literacy needs of the youngest children, providing programs and materials for children of all age as well as materials and services to teens.

Electronic Services
The Library offers electronic informational databases as well as downloadable audio and video. Twenty-seven Internet access computers are available (16 in Adult Services, six in Youth Services, and five in the Teen Zone) as well as 35 laptop computers that can be used with the Library’s wireless network in any part the facility.

Mission Statement
The mission of the Carnegie-Stout Public Library is to improve the quality of life by providing resources that enhance and contribute to individual enjoyment, enlightenment, and knowledge.

Name: Chillicothe and Ross County Public Library
Description: The Chillicothe & Ross County Public Library has eight locations in Ross County, serving a population of about 80,000 people. We live in an age where the nature of information is changing faster than ever before, and the library is committed to giving you the tools you need to navigate this ever-changing world. Whether you are a parent looking for engaging and instructional programming for your children, a student looking for reliable information for school reports, someone new to technology who is trying to find where to begin, an organization looking for space and resources, or just looking for a good book or movie to relax and entertain, we are here for you.

Name: Automotive History Preservation Society
Description: Automotive History Preservation Society, a non-profit organization dedicated to preserving the past for the future.  We host ever-growing Online Digital Library that hosts the knowledge extracted from the paper records of pioneers and current champions in the automobile industry and culture.

Name: HathiTrust
Description: Founded in 2008, HathiTrust is a not-for-profit collaborative of academic and research libraries preserving 18+ million digitized items. HathiTrust offers reading access to the fullest extent allowable by U.S. copyright law, computational access to the entire corpus for scholarly research, and other emerging services based on the combined collection. HathiTrust members steward the collection — the largest set of digitized books managed by academic and research libraries — under the aims of scholarly, not corporate, interests.

Name: Newmarket Public Library
Description:
The Newmarket Public Library is a centre of inspiration, learning, discovery and dialogue for the community that offers much more than just books. Membership is free and you can enjoy access to over 175,000 items, including paperback, hardcover and large print books, audio books, as well as magazines, DVDs, video games, online databases, e-books and more!

Other Newmarket Public Library Services include: 

Home Access to Online Catalogues, downloadable audiobooks and e-books, interloan program, NPL's Art Collection and information services
Internet and Wi-Fi access
Visiting Library Service
Meeting/study rooms with digital group workspaces
MakerHub with 3D printers, button makers and Cricut machine
Programs and activities for all ages
Computers for public use
Printing, scanning and photocopying services
For more information, you may visit the Newmarket Public Library website or call 905-953-5110.

Name: Abrehot Library
Description: Abrehot

Name: Delaware Libraries
Description: The Delaware Division of Libraries, a state agency dedicated to unleashing the potential in all Delawareans in partnership with Delaware Libraries, offers free access to the online catalog (http://delawarelibraries.org), Wi-Fi, computers/internet, eBooks, programs/workshops, community partnerships, and more.

Name: Planetree Health Library
Description:
Our nonprofit organization provides consumers with free access to health and medical information. Currently all of our services are offered via the Internet: 
-- an easily navigated guide to trustworthy health and medical websites
-- articles, inspiration, and fun on our Facebook page
-- a monthly e-newsletter, PlaneTalk, full of responsibly reported medical news, self-care tips, and a listing of local health-related fairs, classes, and lectures

Name: National Library of Jamaica
Description:
The National Library of Jamaica (NLJ) is home to the largest collection of material related to Jamaica and the Jamaican people. The collection spans works published from the 16th century to the most current publications. 

The NLJ is an agency of the Ministry of Culture, Gender, Entertainment, and Sport. Its mission is to support national development through collecting, cataloguing, preserving and providing information about Jamaica’s history and cultural heritage and to promote a thriving network of libraries and services. It is unique in its role in the formal and informal education of the country and is the only library on the island positioned to serve an audience wider than its residents and its diaspora in the global information network. 

Twitter: @natlibja

Name: Vigo County Public Library
Description: The Vigo County Public Library generates positive change in the community by creating an environment of opportunity in which people can explore, expand their perspectives, and transform their own lives and the lives of future generations.

Name: Highland Park Public Library
Description:
The Highland Park Public Library's mission is to provide the highest quality Library services to community members for life-long learning, cultural enrichment, and enjoyment.

We offer a large collection of fiction and nonfiction for children and adults, reference assistance, child and adult programming, ebooks and downloadable audiobooks, a local historical reference collection, one-on-one computer classes, access to online resources, free Wi-Fi, and desktop and laptop computers with Microsoft Office 2007 and Internet access.

Name: The Urbana Free Library
Description: Located in the heart of downtown Urbana at the corner of Race and Green. The Urbana Free Library has a commitment to excellent public service. So, go ahead - ask for our help. It's what we do best!

Name: Lansdale Public Library
Description: Founded in 1928, The Lansdale Public Library serves the residents of the Borough of Lansdale. The mission of the Lansdale Public Library is to enrich our community through the encouragement of early literacy, the fostering of life-long learning, and the inclusion and celebration of the cultural diversity in our area.

Name: North Canton Public Library
Description: The North Canton Public Library was founded in 1926, when the North Canton Library Association was established. The purpose of the North Canton Public Library is to serve the community, and to enhance the quality of life of our patrons. The library accomplishes this goal by selecting, maintaining, and making available resources that serve our patrons’ informational, recreational and cultural needs. The library wants to establish a life-long relationship with every person, from preschooler through senior citizen, and works to reflect the changing needs of our community in its collection.

Name: Le Phare Community Library
Description: Welcome to Le Phare, which means "The Lighthouse" in French, a haven of peace and cooperative learning for all the community and specially for vulnerable kids and young people. In our community library we enhace reading culture and develop talents!

Name: Brick Borrow
Description:
Welcome to Brick Borrow – the UK’s LEGO Rental Subscription!
Why buy one set when you can build hundreds? From just £9.99/month, Brick Borrow lets you build, play, and return your favourite LEGO sets — giving you endless building adventures without the high cost or clutter. 
 How it works is simple:
1 Sign up and join our growing LEGO-loving community
2 Choose from 800+ epic sets (and growing!)
3 Build, play, and enjoy for as long as you like
4 Return it and pick your next challenge! 
It’s fun, flexible, and planet-friendly.
 As seen on:
 The Guardian
 Channel 5's Shop Smart Save Money
 Channel 4’s Steph’s Packed Lunch
 We've gone international!
From a UK start-up to launching franchises in Spain, Portugal & Italy, Brick Borrow is building something special — across borders and brick by brick.
 We’re proud to partner with brands like Crawley Town FC and Hibernian FC, spreading the joy of LEGO through football and community.

Name: Navajo Nation Library
Description: The mission of Navajo Nation Library is to provide all Diné with free and equitable access to services that combine and integrate Diné traditional knowledge with  information and library services that empowers all community members through literacy, balance, creativity, personal and intellectual growth, and support as lifelong learners.

Name: Center of Excellence
Description:
Center of Excellence (CoE) is a center providing services for Jordanian Public Universities Libraries (JoPULs), as we all connected since 2004 with one network under the name of Jordanian Universities Network (JUNet), and since 2004 we use a one Integrated Library System (ILS), and providing e-jornals and online line database subscription for all member libraries, CoE provide support for all libraries employees, faculty and students of all member universities.

note: updating soon...

Name: Life's Greatest Gift
Description: Book

Name: Warren-Trumbull County Public Library
Description:
The Warren-Trumbull County Public Library's mission is to enhance lives by connecting people and ideas.

The library system includes a Main Library and five branch libraries; a Bookmobile that travels throughout Trumbull County; outreach services to homebound individuals, daycares, and preschools; and a virtual branch open 24/7 through a website at www.WTCPL.org. 

CONNECTIONS TO ENDLESS EXPLORATION - The W-TCPL is dedicated to providing access to materials and services to meet the informational, cultural, and educational needs of the residents of Trumbull County.  Library customers can borrow books, movies on DVD, music CDs, magazines, audiobooks, and electronic resources. 

A library card is free to anyone who lives, works, or attends school in Ohio. Library cardholders can download and enjoy digital content such as e-books and e-audiobooks and digital movies and music on their personal eReader, smartphone, or tablet at no cost.

The library system offers a full schedule of guest speakers, early literacy sessions, and discussion groups at free programming throughout the year.

CONNECTIONS TO GROW YOUR SKILLS - The W-TCPL has Internet-accessible computers available for public use at each of its six locations. A variety of free computer classes on topics from computer basics and word processing to social media platforms and online databases are offered at most library locations. 

CONNECTIONS TO BUSINESS RESOURCES - The W-TCPL offers access to dozens of online resources including databases, directories, videos, tutorials, and research guides on topics ranging from business and health to motor vehicle repair.

CONNECTIONS TO YOUR FAMILY HISTORY - The Local History & Genealogy Center located in the Main Library in Warren contains research materials and maintains an online photo archive at www.trumbullmemory.org. Free genealogy classes are offered at several library locations to teach helpful tools for those interested in researching their family tree.

Name: Delhi University Library System (DULS)
Description:
Delhi University Library System (DULS) is a federally managed combination of physical and virtual collections and associated information services, wherein on the one hand, the traditional system of library holdings is maintained and on the other hand, ICT based services are implemented. 

Established in the year 1922, the University Library shifted to its present locale in 1958 and developed into Delhi University Library System around 1974. Presently there are 34 libraries in its fold. DULS is accomplishing its task of reaching to wider academic community. It is one of the largest academic library systems of the country in terms of collections and services. The core DULS collection is computerized with the provision of a centralized Web OPAC facility to cater to the information needs across various disciplines. The system is actively involved in advanced web based information services and promotes the use of e-content in teaching, learning and research by conducting innovative Information Literacy Programs (ILP) focusing on e-resources, research metrics- Impact Factor, h-Index, academic integrity, etc. for the benefit of scholars at large. It is also making efforts in developing tutorials to make the community proficient in the use of online e-content. 

DULS supports the academic activities of students, researchers and teachers of the university through Delhi University Campus Network which has in its ambit both the campuses and all the colleges affiliated to the University. In nutshell DULS endeavors to carve out an approach and create an atmosphere which is conducive to high quality research and other academic activities in the university.

Name: Forbes Library
Description: Forbes Library, the public library for Northampton, Massachusetts, provides a wide range of information, materials and services to all of the people of Northampton and Massachusetts.  The library’s magnificent building offers a friendly, welcoming physical environment which encourages the civic, intellectual, and cultural pursuits of the public. Forbes serves as a community meeting place in which curiosity, free inquiry, and lifelong learning are supported and nurtured. The library is open 56 hours per week, and many resources are available online 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

Name: MPL - Misr Public Library (15 branches)
Description:
The MISR Public Library (MPL) is considered one of the most important pioneering projects on the Egyptian cultural scene. 

The MPL's philosophy is based on the idea that the library is a living reality that interacts with the public, and that it constitutes the foundation for the cultural structure of the society.

MPL aims at encouraging people of all categories and age groups to develop their reading habit, and make use of the cultural and educational materials that are available in the library; as well as developing and updating these materials in order to satisfy the desires and needs of its members. it also aims at providing the tools and means for lifetime self-education.

Modern technological developments have added a new aim to the library objectives, for the purpose of enhancing and developing computer and internet usage skills among the various categories of the society.

Name: Lafayette Public Library System
Description: The Lafayette Public Library System provides free and equal access to high-quality, cost-effective library services for information, life-long learning, recreation, and cultural enrichment.

Name: Dekalb County Public Library
Description: DCPL is a public library that helps people to grow their informational, educational, and recreational values.

Name: BiblioTech Public Library
Description: BiblioTech Public Library is the nation's first all-digital library. Open to all Bexar County citizens, we offer four branch locations with computers, printers, faxing, scanning and technology support services. We also have hundreds of thousands of downloadable ebooks and audiobooks, as well as newspapers, magazines, graphic novels, comics, movies, music, active learning resources and more.

Name: Bibliothèques publiques du Québec
Description:
Les Bibliothèques publiques du Québec (BPQ) est un regroupement national qui rassemble les bibliothèques publiques autonomes de l’ensemble du Québec. Depuis 1984, il est dédié au soutien, au développement et à la promotion des bibliothèques québécoises.

Les BPQ ont comme but la mise en valeur du rôle des bibliothèques publiques en tant que contributrices à l’accès démocratique au savoir et à la participation citoyenne. L’association favorise le travail coopératif et le partage des meilleures pratiques en bibliothèque publique.

Les BPQ ont comme principales valeurs la mise à disposition et le rayonnement optimal des savoirs dans une perspective de plein épanouissement social, culturel et économique de tous les citoyens du Québec.

Les bibliothèques publiques autonomes desservent 83,2% de la population québécoise , soit plus de 7millions de personnes.

Name: Digi-Taalhuis Breda
Description:
Iedereen moet kunnen meedoen in de (digitale) samenleving. 
Daarvoor moet je beschikken over bepaalde basisvaardigheden als lezen, schrijven, rekenen en kunnen omgaan met de computer. Maar niet iedereen heeft voldoende basisvaardigheden om zelfstandig zaken te kunnen regelen.
Bij Digi-Taalhuis Breda, gevestigd in Nieuwe Veste, bibliotheek, Hier kan iedereen terecht voor vragen en advies rondom het verbreden van deze kennis. Er zijn taalgroepen en computerlessen, en er is ook een Inloopspreekuur waar gekeken wordt welk Bredaas taalaanbod het beste bij je past.

Daarnaast organiseert Digi-Taalhuis Breda allerlei activiteiten met partners in  de stad. Ook zijn we elke week te vinden bij de Digi-Taalpunten bij Buurthuis Ons en Ontmoetingscentrum de Vlieren.

Name: Biblioteca Digital memoriademadrid
Description:
La Biblioteca Digital memoriademadrid se crea para facilitar el acceso on line y digital al ciudadano y difundir a través de Internet el rico patrimonio documental, histórico y cultural que el Ayuntamiento, a través de sus instituciones, conserva sobre la ciudad de Madrid.

Para ello, la Biblioteca pone a disposición de la ciudadanía documentos en formato digital procedentes de las diferentes instituciones de la “memoria” del Ayuntamiento de Madrid: la Hemeroteca Municipal, el Archivo de Villa, la Biblioteca Histórica, el Museo de Historia, la Imprenta Municipal o la Biblioteca Victor Espinós, principales fuentes a partir de las cuales la biblioteca ha formado su colección digital. Imágenes que sirven para mostrar la memoria de la ciudad, con la vocación de integrarlas en un marco de colaboración y cooperación con otros proyectos de naturaleza similar, tanto a nivel nacional como internacional.

Todo ello desde el firme convencimiento de la necesidad de poner en marcha una labor de difusión con el mayor alcance posible, no limitado exclusivamente a un público erudito o investigador. Se trata, en esencia, de abrir una gran puerta a la memoria de la ciudad.

La difusión es una de las apuestas más firmes de la Biblioteca. En este sentido, pretende abrir el patrimonio documental madrileño a todos los ciudadanos desde una perspectiva que no excluya lo lúdico, además de convertirse en una herramienta indispensable para un público estudioso de la historia de la ciudad.  El objetivo final es lograr que los visitantes puedan contemplar en la página de la Biblioteca Digital las reproducciones digitales de los fondos de una forma lo más parecida posible a la contemplación directa del documento.

Name: Bibliotheek Noord-Veluwe
Description: Bibliotheek Noord Veluwe is de basisvoorziening om te lezen, te leren, te fantaseren en te ontmoeten.

Name: Tompkins County Public Library
Description: www.tcpl.org

Name: UDC Library
Description:
The UDC library is a part of the Learning Resources Division of the University of the District of Columbia. We provide:
-- Access to research and library materials
-- Access to Washington Research Libraries Consortium materials
-- A place to study
-- Computers, printers, scanners, and photocopiers
-- Help with research assignments and using the materials in the library

Name: Algonquin Area Public Library District
Description: The Algonquin Area Public Library District exists to serve the informational, educational, cultural, and recreational needs of its residents.  It has been our pleasure to serve the communities of Algonquin and Lake in the Hills for over 90 years, and we look forward to providing quality service throughout the 21st century and beyond!

Name: Health Sciences Libraries Group (LAI)
Description:
The Health Sciences Libraries Group is committed to empowering all our members to excellence in the field of information management, and by doing so, advancing health for all.

The Health Sciences Libraries Group is a section of the Library Association of Ireland.

Name: Wojewódzka Biblioteka Publiczna w Krakowie
Description:
Wojewódzka Biblioteka Publiczna w Krakowie jest główną, publiczną biblioteką województwa małopolskiego. Gromadzi, opracowuje i udostępnia zbiory na miejscu i na zewnątrz, pośredniczy w wypożyczaniu międzybibliotecznym oraz wspiera merytorycznie sieć samorządowych bibliotek publicznych w Małopolsce.
Wśród prawie pół miliona zbiorów dostępnych w 15 tematycznych wypożyczalniach i czytelniach czytelnicy znajdą nie tylko książki i czasopisma, ale również filmy i muzykę na płytach analogowych, CD czy DVD, książkę „mówioną” i brajlowską, dokumenty życia społecznego, nuty, mapy, gry planszowe i komputerowe, a także dostęp do baz elektronicznych, z których można korzystać zarówno na miejscu, jak i on-line. Wypożyczyć tu można także czytniki ebooków oraz uzyskać dostęp do publikacji elektronicznych.
Realizację własnych pasji w Bibliotece umożliwia profesjonalne oprogramowanie do tworzenia, edycji, obróbki muzyki i grafiki, tablety graficzne, pianino cyfrowe.
Naszym użytkownikom oddajemy do dyspozycji 600 miejsc do pracy oraz 88 stanowisk komputerowych.
Biblioteka to nie tylko książki, rocznie eksponujemy ponad 100 wystaw, codziennie w przestrzeniach bibliotecznych odbywa się ok. 10 różnorodnych warsztatów, spotkań i szkoleń o bardzo szerokiej tematyce.
Na terenie Biblioteki znajduję się także kawiarnia, dzięki czemu czytelnicy mają możliwość zadbania o strawę nie tylko duchową, bez odrywania się od nauki.
Jesteśmy biblioteką otwartą na świat i ludzi, zapewniającą dostęp do wiedzy, kultury i informacji, miejscem spotkań, utrwalania więzi społecznych oraz swobodnej wymiany myśli i poglądów.
Naszą misją jest dostarczanie wysokiej jakości usług bibliotecznych –odpowiadających zmieniającym się potrzebom informacyjnym, edukacyjnym i kulturowym użytkowników –z zachowaniem wrażliwości społecznej, popieraniem różnorodności kulturowej i zamiłowania do czytania.

Name: La letra i, Actividades Culturales
Description:
La letra i de idea, de idioma, de igual, de ilusión, de imagen, de importante, de imprenta, de increíble, de inédito, de infantil, de infinidad, de iniciar, de inmenso, de inteligencia, de interés, de ir, de ISBN, de Ismael, de ... es el nombre de este operador cultural.

La Letra i, Actividades Culturales nace Valladolid (España), fruto de la ilusión de ofertar servicios culturales, educativos y bibliotecarios de calidad.

Es una empresa de servicios clasificada por el Ministerio de Economía y Hacienda del Gobierno de España en el Grupo M. Subgrupo 05: SERVICIOS DE BIBLIOTECAS, ARCHIVOS Y MUSEOS.

Name: مبادرة كتاب يساوي حياة
Description:
تقع على الدولة مسئولية كبيرة في تنمية وتطوير دور الأيتام، والاهتمام بأطفال الملاجئ، لأنها فرصتهم الوحيدة لحياة كريمة، ولكن عادة تهتم مؤسسات الدولة بتوفير المتطلبات الأساسية بشكل مباشر مثل المأكل، والملبس، والتعليم الأساسي، والرقابة، والتقييم لعمل تلك المؤسسات. وإلى جانب الاعتناء بالتغذية والصحة النفسية والجسدية، لابد من اتباع منظومة متكاملة لتأمين احتياجات الأطفال وتوفير جميع صور الرعاية والتربية أخلاقياً ودينياً وعلمياً بمساعدة من مختلف أطياف المجتمع.
لذا تهدف هذه المبادرة إلي:
1- دعم ملاجئ الأطفال بمجموعات من الكتب لتكون نواه لإنشاء سلسلة من المكتبات الخاصة بدور الأيتام.
2- دعم المخططات الرسمية للدولة في توفير بيئة صالحة للأطفال لاكتشاف مواهبهم وقدراتهم وهواياتهم وتوجيهها بشكل سليم.
3- استخدام القراءة لتنمية قدرات الأطفال وإثراء خبراتهم وزيادة معلوماتهم ومعارفهم وتمكينهم من تحصيل المواد الدراسية بسهوله ويسر.
* يتم استقبال الكتب فقط عن طريق التبرع سواء من الأفراد أو المؤسسات، ولا يتم قبول أي تبرعات نقدية.

Name: Chandler Public Library
Description:
In August of 1954, the five-year dream of the Chandler Junior Woman’s Club became a reality when the doors of the Chandler Public Library were opened. The group conducted a door-to-door campaign to raise the necessary funds to construct the building ($5,560 total cost) and provide for a small collection of books. As evident in the abundance of support received, the entire community felt that it was important to have a library of its own. Once the doors were opened, the keys were turned over to the City of Chandler for continued operation. 

Today, the Chandler Public Library continues its commitment of being the reading, learning, and cultural center for our community. With four locations in all geographic areas of the community, library users have the opportunity to meet and interact with others, sit quietly and read in an approachable and inviting environment, with high-speed access to the digital world. As the information leader, we provide a variety of resources, in a variety of formats, so library users of all ages can explore topics of personal interest and continue to learn throughout their lives. 

It is through the abundance of resources, inspiring spaces, professional and committed staff, that the Chandler Public Library strives to be the BEST public library.

Name: Robert E. Kennedy Library
Description:
We're the academic library at California Polytechnic State University since 1904. Find us in building 35. The current building is named in honor of Cal Poly President Emeritus Robert E. Kennedy.

At Kennedy Library, you can:
- study and collaborate 24/7
- reserve study rooms
- borrow tech equipment
- use library computers
- print, copy, scan
- get research help.

We are a Learn by Doing library. We help every member of the Cal Poly community engage in open and informed inquiry, and contribute through creation, innovation, and collaboration, to the quality of life of our community.

We connect people and inspire learning. We value learning, innovation, and the diversity of individual and group experiences and perspectives that make our community sustainable, compassionate, and resilient.

These values commit us to being open, responsive, and inclusive in the relationships we build across the entire Cal Poly campus and community, including our region, state, and beyond.

Name: Poughkeepsie Public Library District
Description:
The Poughkeepsie Public Library District (PPLD) is a special legislative district created to provide public library service to the residents of the City and Town of Poughkeepsie, New York. As such, the voters in each municipality annually vote on an operating budget and, from time to time, supplemental and capital programs. The Library District is its own independent authority and is governed by its legislation, applicable public law, and its by-laws. 

The Poughkeepsie Public Library District has vibrant libraries where people want to be. It meets the needs of a diverse and growing constituency by providing services and partnering with other community organizations. The Board of Trustees and the staff work together to serve the public and to respond to the changing nature of library services. 

The Poughkeepsie Public Library District offers the community diverse services and programs resulting in an informed and educated public, and promotes lifelong learning, literacy, and reading.

Name: Réseau BIBLIO du Québec
Description:
Le Réseau BIBLIO du Québec est un regroupement national qui a pour mission de favoriser le déploiement des bibliothèques dans les municipalités de 5 000 habitants et moins du Québec par une concertation de ses membres et par des actions de représentation, de valorisation et de développement.

Le Réseau BIBLIO du Québec est Le leader national pour le développement des bibliothèques de qualité dans les municipalités de 5 000 habitants et moins et il est La voix des régions auprès de différentes instances nationales.

Name: Comité français international bibliothèques et documentation (Cfibd)
Description: L'association française spécialisée dans le secteur des relations internationales pour les professionnel.le.s des bibliothèques et de la documentation

Name: Comité français international bibliothèques et documentation (Cfibd)
Description: L'association française spécialisée dans le secteur des relations internationales pour les professionnel.le.s des bibliothèques et de la documentation

Name: Sachem Public Library
Description: Sachem Public Library is one of the largest school district libraries in New York State outside of New York City. The Library serves over 82,000 district residents in an area that extends over three townships: Brookhaven, Islip, and Smithtown.

Name: eBook Study Group
Description: The eBook Study Group is a non-profit organization dedicated to ensuring equitable access to information through fair licensing and contractual agreements between libraries and publishers.

Name: Världens bibliotek
Description:
Världens bibliotek är en digital bibliotekstjänst. I Världens bibliotek hittar du e-böcker och ljudböcker på 18 olika språk. Skaffa ett konto med din e-postadress. Logga in för att läsa och lyssna. När du vill, så mycket du vill.

Syftet med Världens bibliotek är att främja läsning och kunskap för att alla ska kunna verka i samhället på egna villkor. Alla människor har enligt språklagen rätt till sina språk och en språklig utveckling. Alla har också rätt till att deras språk och kulturella identiteter blir synliggjorda och värdesatta.

Tjänsten är en del av biblioteken i Sverige, finansierad av skattepengar och därför gratis att använda.

Name: Libraria US
Description:
At Libraria, we understand librarians do it all - and deserve a vendor who works as hard as they do. 

For more than 45 years, Libraria has partnered with school and public libraries nationwide to make book buying simple, affordable, and stress-free. We're more than a vendor - we're your library's support team.

From quick onboarding to reliable customer service, Libraria is built around one promise: support you can count on, service you can trust.

 What We Offer:
 Affordable in-house cataloging & processing 
 EDI integration compatible with all major ILS platforms
 Multi-user website access designed for busy library teams
 Fast, accurate order fulfillment and personalized collection support

Our team understands the challenges librarians face - shifting budgets, evolving standards, and the constant need to do more with less. That's why we focus on efficiency, transparency, and care at every step.

At Libraria, you'll always find personalized support, flexible solutions, and real people who know libraries inside and out - from metadata to MARC, EDI to everyday service.

Because when libraries thrive, communities thrive. 

 www.libraria.com

Name: OpenSky Information
Description:

Contamos con amplia experiencia y trayectoria en proyectos relacionados con e-Learning y Bibliotecología que nos permite estar altamente capacitados, comprometidos y apasionados por mejorar el panorama de la educación virtual y las unidades de información.

Name: INDEXA G - GESTÃO, DIGITALIZAÇÃO E GUARDA DE DOCUMENTOS
Description:
A Indexa atua desde 1991 na gestão documental dos setores Públicos e Privados, garantindo de forma eficiente, segura e econômica a organização, guarda, administração e destinação dos documentos. 

Gerenciando a informação das Empresas, atuamos em arquivos usuais e eletrônicos de desenhos, catálogos, fotos, slides, filmes, jurídicos , administrativos. 

Desenvolvemos projetos de consultoria, organização, implantação e informatização em Centros de Documentação e Bibliotecas, Arquivos Ativos e Inativos ,Documentação Técnica, Tabelas de Temporalidade de Documentos, Sistemas de Tramitação e Protocolo do Fluxo Documental; 

Em nossa sistemática de serviço, criamos e desenvolvemos modelos específicos para cada organização, preocupando-nos em manter sempre o sigilo sobre as informações trabalhadas. 

Nosso ramo de atividade visa um novo conceito de eficiência para as Empresas, partindo do princípio de que a perda de tempo na recuperação da informação gera sempre perda de qualidade de trabalho. 

Nosso Trabalho é assegurar que a informação esteja disponível quando e onde seja necessário, proporcionando seu acesso em tempo hábil! 

COMPROMISSO COM A INFORMAÇÃO!

Name: Grosse Pointe Public Library
Description: We connect people to information. We connect people to people. Our library is a place for innovation, creativity and collaboration. The Grosse Pointe Public Library is a center for community engagement, a platform for great minds to come together. We promote literacy, protect your right to read and your right to reader privacy. Your Grosse Pointe Public Library provides access to a range of resources needed to live, learn and work. Welcome to your community living room - a place to learn, create and connect.

Name: Kentucky Department for Libraries and Archives
Description:
The mission of KDLA is to support and promote access to library services and to ensure that documentation of government activities is created, preserved and made available for public use.

Communication through agency-related social media is considered a public record under KRS 171.410(1) and will be managed under the terms of KRS 171.410 through 171.740 and 725 KAR Chapter 1.

Name: Kitap İstanbul
Description:
İstanbul’un kalbinde, Eminönü’nde, İstanbul ve kitap sevdalılarını bekliyoruz…

İstanbul Ticaret Odası kuruluşundan bugüne çeşitli alanlarda; yüzlerce yayın, çok sayıda proje ve etkinliği hayata geçirmiştir. Ticaretin ve ekonominin her alanında uzun yıllardır faaliyet gösteren bir kurum olarak, alanında destekleyici ve yol gösterici yayınları yanında, özellikle şehrimizin tarihi, kültürü ve sanatını yansıtan pek çok kitabı ve prestij eseri yayın hayatına kazandırmıştır.

İstanbul Ticaret Odası, İstanbul konulu kitap, albüm ve belgeselleri İstanbul sevdalıları ile buluşturmak amacıyla, İstanbul’umuzun kalbi sayılan Eminönü’nde, KİTAP İSTANBUL markası ile açmış olduğu merkezini faaliyete geçirmiştir.

İstanbul’un her türlü kültürel, coğrafi, ticari özellikleri ve görsel zenginliklerini yurt içinde ve yurt dışında tanıtmak amacıyla kurulan KİTAP İSTANBUL, hem İstanbul Ticaret Odası yayınlarını okur ve araştırmacılarla buluşturmak hem de kütüphanesini, kaliteli kitap ve prestij yayınlarla zenginleştirmek isteyenler için birinci tercih olmayı amaç edinmektedir. 

İstanbul’dan bahseden bütün eserlerin toplanacağı, gravürlerin ve fotoğrafların sergileneceği yeni nesil kitapçımızda, araştırmacılar için Kütüphane İstanbul adı ile bir bölümümüz de bulunacaktır. Şehrimizin yazılı ve görsel arşivine ev sahipliği yapacak kütüphanemiz, İstanbul hakkında yerli ve yabancı araştırmacılar ve yazarlar tarafından birçok dilde yazılmış kitap, nadir eser, gravür, kartpostal, harita ve rehberlerden oluşan zengin ve nitelikli bir içeriğe sahip olmayı hedeflemektedir. 

İstanbul’umuza ait eserlerin yer alacağı bu özel mekan da; İstanbul ve Türkiye’nin iş dünyası ve ticaret hayatına referans olabilecek yayınları incelemek ve satın almak mümkün olabilecektir.  


Kitap İstanbul iletişim 
iletisim@kitapistanbul.org.tr
Tel: 0212 455 63 30     (Kitap Satış) 
       0212 455 63 26

Name: Washington Talking Book & Braille Library
Description:
The Washington Talking Book & Braille Library (WTBBL) is a program of the Washington State Library, a division of the Office of the Secretary of State. Located in Seattle, WTBBL provides library services state-wide, at the library and by mail, to any Washington resident unable to read standard print material due to blindness, visual impairment, deaf-blindness, physical disability (cannot hold a book or turn pages), or reading disability.

WTBBL has been a Regional Library of the National Library Service for the Blind and Print Disabled (NLS) of the Library of Congress since 1931. WTBBL was one of the first “Regional Libraries” and from 1934 to the late sixties and early seventies, provided library service to the residents of Montana and Alaska.  In 2009 and 2016, WTBBL was honored as the Network Library of the Year and in 2012 was recognized with a mayoral proclamation for our work empowering individuals with disabilities. Visit History of the Washington Talking Book & Braille Library
for a more detailed history.

The National Library Service for the Blind and regional libraries, including WTBBL, are authorized through the Marrakesh Treaty to reproduce or distribute copies of works in accessible formats exclusively for use by blind or other persons with print disabilities.

Name: Blount County Public Library
Description: At the Blount County Public Library, we serve as a vital participant in the community as a gathering place--for connections with information, digital technology, people and entertainment resources. Serving a community of 137,000+, we lend from an excellent print materials collection of more than 240,000 items (E-books, new-release movie DVDs, music CDs audiobooks on CD & MP3 & more). Multiple Internet databases (Reference USA, Gale Courses - free online noncredit courses with instructors,Tennessee Electronic Library and many more). Ancestry.com and HertitageQuest are genealogy databases offered in addition to an excellent genealogy collection which is a tourist destination for folks from all over the United States.  To connect people with community resources, the library hosts many types of events--informational programs, travelogues, author presentations, concerts, and festivals. To be the best resource we can be, staff members serve on community service organization boards and participate in community forums to share information.

Name: Lancaster Public Library
Description:
As one of the oldest public libraries in the country, Lancaster Public Library has earned the reputation of a dynamic center of knowledge and a cornerstone of a thriving Lancaster community. 

The library has a rich history in Lancaster County: the Lancaster Library Company was formed and in 1759, and over the next 260+ years, library service evolved in Lancaster County. Today, the Lancaster Public Library consists of the main library in Lancaster City with a branch in Mountville. These sites provide direct library service to approximately 40 percent of Lancaster County's population in fourteen municipalities. 

We are proud to serve as the heart of the Lancaster community, and we are committed to providing equitable access to vital educational resources, exceptional programming, and community building opportunities for all at both of our locations.

Name: Ottawa Tool Library
Description: The Ottawa Tool Library offers tools for your personal, home and renovation projects. Wanting to tackle a practical or creative project is one thing, but if you don’t even know where to begin it can seem daunting.  And with limited space for many urban dwellers, there isn’t likely unused space in your condo or apartment. Again, have no fear – OTL wants to offers space and sessions where you can work alongside other makers, artists, builders or hobbyists and see your imagination come to life.

Name: BC Electronic Library Network
Description: BC ELN is a post-secondary library consortium in British Columbia. BC ELN's purpose is to develop and support system-wide mechanisms that allow post-secondary libraries to meet the expanding information needs of learners, educators, and researchers at the lowest possible cost. BC ELN services include: collaborative licensing, AskAway Chat Reference, Arca Digital Repository, WriteAway Online Tutoring, and Illume Interlibrary loan Resource Sharing.

Name: Goodnow Library Foundation
Description:
The Goodnow Library Foundation was established in 2008 by the Trustees of the Library to support the Goodnow Library's mission of "Improving lives through the power of information, ideas, and innovation."
The Trustees recognized the urgent need to provide an additional source of revenue for the growing demands of Goodnow in the 21st century: capital improvements, technology upgrades, and physical refurbishments and renovations. Our projects have been supported by various funding sources including private gifts from individuals, foundations, and corporate partners. 

As more and more communities embrace library foundations as a forward-thinking way of securing the future of their libraries, the GLF is proud to have donated more than $500,000 to the Library since its inception as a 501(c)(3).
The GLF is committed to working in tandem with the Library Director Esmé Green, Library Trustees, and Sudbury town officials. In this capacity, the GLF also spends significant hours in its work to foster Goodnow's role as a vibrant and bustling hub for the Sudbury community and beyond.

Name: Bibliothèque EUREKA-V. à Likasi (RDC)
Description:
Située au nord-ouest de Lubumbashi dans le Katanga (RDC), Likasi est une ville de 600.000 habitants qui compte 7.000 étudiants.

La bibliothèque de son université principale ne comportait cependant qu'une trentaine de livres de droit en français. 

Sur la base de ce constat, nous nous sommes fixé comme objectif, en mars 2019, de faire en sorte que ça change en collectant en Europe tous les ouvrages juridiques possibles et en les y acheminant. 

Après avoir collecté plus d'un millier d'ouvrages de droit, nous avons étendu les matières à l'économie, la gestion, les sciences sociales, les sciences, la médecine, les constructions civiles, la psychologie et la philosophie. C'est en tout plus de 3. 000 ouvrages qui sont finalement arrivés à Likasi, en juin 2020, entre les mains d'une toute nouvelle équipe de bibliothécaires formés et encadrés à la tâche qui les attend.

Nous préparons désormais un deuxième envoi ciblant la médecine (chirurgie, pédiatrie, soins infirmiers et pharmacologie), l'agronomie, la géologie, polytechnique (mines, métallurgie), l'électromécanique et l'informatique. 

Si vous avez des livres qui prennent la poussière sur vos étagère, ils pourraient devenir très utiles à Likasi en rejoignant cet envoi.

Name: Biblioteca Patrimonial Recoleta Dominica
Description: Biblioteca Patrimonial Recoleta Domínica is a libraries company based out of 683, Recoleta, Chile.

Name: Eugene Public Library Foundation
Description:
The Eugene Public Library Foundation supports Eugene Public Library in its efforts to inspire lifelong learning and to enrich the entire community. We secure and responsibly manage contributions from individuals, businesses, and foundations to build community support for our Eugene Public Library.

Libraries enrich lives and strengthen communities. Through private and public support, the Eugene Public Library Foundation envisions a vibrant public library that maximizes access to information, increases literacy and innovation, serves as a gateway to arts and culture, and provides a community gathering place.

Eugene, Oregon is home to a much loved, award-winning library.  We are honored to help strengthen programs for our community at our Eugene Public Library.  We welcome your participation in learning more about programs and materials at the Eugene Public Library, and joining us in strengthening and expanding library services to our community.

Name: Athens Regional Library System
Description: The Athens Regional Library System is a network of public libraries that covers Athens-Clarke, Franklin, Madison, Oconee, and Oglethorpe Counties in northeast Georgia.

Name: Fayetteville Public Library Foundation
Description: The Fayetteville Public Library Foundation is the philanthropic partner of your favorite local library, turning gifts into community-empowering resources. Learn more at supportfpl.org.

Description: A CLIC é uma empresa de projetos socioculturais com objetivo de atenuar problemas sociais relacionados à educação, geração de renda e sustentabilidade em conjunto com as empresas privadas e públicas.

Description: The Harford County Public Library Foundation strives to provide the Harford County Public Library with financial support to expand its services and materials to offer the residents of Harford County access to new technologies, programs, materials and resources to develop literacy skills, engage in a love of reading, and spur an interest and skill development in innovation and creative exploration.f a public - private partnership in action.

Name: QT Library
Description: The QT Library is an upcoming brick-and-mortar LGBTQIA+ library serving Boston, Massachusetts. It is a place where the queer and trans community can gather around shared interests and free resources. Our library will have books and other media that are authored and/or curated by the queer and trans community, available to access in an LGBTQIA+ affirming space. Our free programs enable young people and adults to connect with each other joyfully and authentically. The QT Library is an inclusive LGBTQIA+ community designed for endless possibility.

Name: Davenport Public Library
Description: The mission of the Davenport Public Library is to connect a diverse community to resources that inform, enrich, educate and entertain.  Visit one of our three locations in Davenport, Iowa to check out FREE music CDs, the latest DVDs, video games for XBOX, PS2 and Wii, magazines, and of course, books!

Name: PubPharm - Fachinformationsdienst Pharmazie
Description:
The drug-centred pharmacy-specific search platform PubPharm is the central service of the Fachinformationsdienst (FID) Pharmazie (Specialised Information Service  Pharmacy), a cooperation project between the University Library Braunschweig and the Institute for Information Systems (IfIS) at Technische Universität Braunschweig. The German Research Foundation has been funding the project since 01.01.2015 (within the Specialised Information Services funding programme).

PubPharm offers more than 60 million references (articles, books, clinical trials, preprints, patents), structure-based search and various filter and sorting functions. Novel web services based on deep learning algorithms and narrative information access developed at IfIS are offered to the scientific community. Pharmaceutical scientists at Universities in Germany gain additional free access to FID-licenced journals across all pharmaceutical disciplines.

Name: African Library and Information Associations and Institutions
Description: AfLIA is an independent international not-for-profit organization which pursues the interests of library and information associations, library and information services, librarians and information workers and the communities they serve in Africa. It was established in 2013 and registered as an international non-governmental organisation (NGO) under the laws of Ghana in October 2014.

Name: Rochester Hills Public Library
Description:
Rochester Hills Public Library is located in the City of Rochester and equally serves the residents of Rochester, Rochester Hills, and Oakland Township. While the library has always been located in downtown Rochester, it has a dedicated millage from the voters in Rochester Hills, an auto-renewing contract with the City of Rochester, and Oakland Township has its own library board that contracts with RHPL.

Rochester Hills Public Library empowers people to explore and create with resources that enlighten, educate, entertain and inform.

Name: Viborg Bibliotekerne
Description:
Velkommen til Viborg Bibliotekerne
Vi består af i alt 10 biblioteker i Viborg Kommune – Hovedbiblioteket i Viborg, Bjerringbro Bibliotek, Houlkær Bibliotek, Stoholm Bibliotek, Karup Bibliotek, Skals Bibliotek og fire fællesbiblioteker – i Frederiks, Møldrup, Rødkærsbro og Ørum.

Viborg Bibliotekernes Vision
Vi vil opfylde og udfordre borgernes behov for: læring, oplevelser, litteratur, et mødested, deltagelse i netværk og i demokratiet.
Visionens mål opnås gennem 2-årige udviklingsmål og handleplaner.

Udviklingsmål 2023 - 2024
•	Styrke borgernes livskvalitet og trivsel i hele kommunen
•	Øge læselysten hos børn i hele kommunen
•	Flere arrangementer målrettet unge i hele kommunen. Afsøge muligheden for at skabe et "subbrand" for biblioteket, så det fremstår som et attraktivt tilbud for unge
•	Udvikling og afholdelse af dialogskabende arrangementer i hele kommunen, som har til formål at bygge bro og nedbryde fordomme. Både "klassiske" debatter samt dialog- og debatskabende aktiviteter
•	Vi er i oplevelses- og vidensbranchen. Brugerne af vores huse skal have gode oplevelser i velholdte rammer, som er "up-to-date"
•	Brugerne skal i mødet med Viborg Bibliotekerne altid føle sig velkomne

Find vores DNA samt lærings- og oplevelsesfundament på viborgbib.dk/vision-vaerdier-og-strategi

Name: Fundacja Krajowy Depozyt Biblioteczny
Description:
Głównym celem naszej fundacji jest prowadzenie działalności kulturalno-oświatowej, polegającej na rozwoju, promowaniu i upowszechnianiu czytelnictwa. W zgodnie z Ustawą o bibliotekach, zamierzamy realizować wypożyczenia międzybiblioteczne. Fundacja Krajowy Depozyt Biblioteczny zajmie się integracją systemów bibliotecznych z katalogiem Depozytu Bibliotecznego, a także umożliwi wypożyczanie zbiorów za pośrednictwem aplikacji elektronicznej, w ramach której zarejestrowani czytelnicy będą mogli wypożyczyć rzadką, poszukiwaną książkę z dowolnej biblioteki, w której ona się znajduje i jest dostępna do wypożyczenia.

Naszą siłą są tytuły Out Of Commerce (OOC), czyli książki niedostępne w obrocie handlowym. Nie są obecne na rynku pierwotnym z różnych przyczyn (np. wygasły licencje, wydawca nie jest zainteresowany wznowieniem itp.) lub nabycie egzemplarza w obrocie wtórnym wiąże się dla czytelnika z wysokim kosztem. Chcemy te przeszkody zlikwidować.

Fundacja jest organizatorem biblioteki Depozytu Bibliotecznego, a to oznacza, że posiada swoje zbiory, które udostępnia czytelnikom. Czytelnicy zaś zobowiązani są do posiadanie aktywnej karty bibliotecznej. Korzystanie z biblioteki jest nieodpłatne.

Depozyt Biblioteczny jest inicjatorem sieci bibliotek partnerskich (DBN),w ramach której realizuje traktowane po macoszemu wypożyczenia międzybiblioteczne.

Świadczymy usługi kompletnej digitalizacji egzemplarzy księgozbioru. Od pasywnego skanowania (bez rozszywania egzemplarza), poprzez korektę błędów, na konwersji do formatów czytnikowych (.epub, .mobi, .pdf) kończąc.

Name: The Grolier Club
Description: The Grolier Club's purpose is to foster the study, collecting, appreciation, and celebration of books, works on paper, and their related arts and crafts, particularly their art, history, production, circulation, and commerce.  The Club shall pursue this mission through the maintenance of a library devoted to all aspects of the book and graphic arts and especially bibliography; through occasional publications designed to illustrate, honor, promote and encourage the book and related arts; through exhibitions and educational programs for its members and the general public; and through the maintenance of a Club building for the safekeeping of its property, and otherwise suitable for the purposes and culture of the club. The Club will take as its inspiration the spirit of collegiality and fellowship embodied in the motto of its namesake, Jean Grolier: Joannis Grolierii et Amicorum (Of Jean Grolier and Friends).

Name: Books & Co.
Description:
Boutique bookstore located in Lima, Peru.
We love books and we want to spread the love.
We have books, papers, notebooks and much more!

Name: North West Film Archive
Description: Set up in 1977, the Archive preserves moving images made in or about Greater Manchester, Lancashire, Cheshire, Merseyside and Cumbria and offers a variety of access services to users in the public, academic and commercial sectors.

Name: Door County Library
Description: Eight community libraries providing services to all areas of Door County, Wisconsin.  Community libraries within Door County, Wisconsin have been active since 1866. These libraries combined to become branches of the Door County Library in 1953. There are seven branches: Baileys Harbor, Egg Harbor, Ephraim, Fish Creek, Forestville, Sister Bay/Liberty Grove, and Washington Island.

Name: Biblioteca Alfonso Desiata
Description:
La Biblioteca vede la luce grazie alla passione per la lettura di alcuni e alla lungimiranza di ANIA, l'Associazione Nazionale fra le Imprese Assicuratrici, che ha affidato ad Assit il compito di conservare una parte di cultura del mondo assicurativo. La Biblioteca è vivamente supportata dagli eredi del dottor Desiata, che - tra l’altro - hanno rappresentanza all’interno del suo Consiglio.

Le origini della biblioteca risalgono all'estate 2008 grazie ad un significativo contributo di volumi assicurativi, tecnici e legali da parte di Ania, ma in questi due anni è cresciuta ulteriormente grazie a diverse donazioni fra cui l'ultima, importantissima, da parte del professor Manghetti, già Presidente ISVAP.

Desiderando mantenere fede a entrambe le citazioni, la Biblioteca Alfonso Desiata intende acquisire e conservare cultura e divulgarla il più largamente possibile, avviando contatti con Università affinché studenti e ricercatori possano avvalersene per studi, ricerche o tesi di laurea. Anche la nascita di un centro studi consentirà alla Biblioteca di perseguire i suoi obiettivi attraverso lo sviluppo, in collaborazione con altre istituzioni, di approfondimenti e ricerche da condividere con tutto il mondo assicurativo.

L’ intenzione sarà quindi quella di assorbire "sapere" e di mettere in atto tutte le azioni affinché la cultura assicurativa si diffonda attraverso quelle politiche tanto care al dottor Desiata e grazie anche alla passione di coloro che, al di fuori della scuola, dell’università e del lavoro, continuano a leggere e a formarsi.

Name: Library of Rotterdam
Description:
About 2.4 million people visit our library each year, which makes it the most popular cultural institution of Rotterdam. With it's total surface of 24,000 m² the Central Library is also one of the largest libraries in the Netherlands.

With nearly 1 million books and dvd's, 300,000 cd's, nearly 100 newspaper titles and over 1500 magazine titles, Rotterdam Library has an impressive collection. One of the most striking parts of our collection is the so-called Erasmus Collection; the world’s largest collection on Erasmus and from Erasmus. But we have more to offer: we organize workshops, debates, exhibitions, lectures and frequently have performances in our Bibliotheektheater. Annual highlights are Boekenweek, Kinderboekenweek and Lezersfeest.

Name: Réseau BIBLIO de la Montérégie
Description:
Le Réseau BIBLIO Montérégie a pour mission de développer et soutenir un réseau régional de bibliothèques en Montérégie. Il vise à maintenir une réputation de premier plan au chapitre de la qualité de ses produits et services. Ses principaux clients sont des municipalités de la Montérégie.

Les objets du Réseau BIBLIO Montérégie sont les suivants :

a) établir, maintenir et développer des collections de documents publiés, des services de traitement documentaire ainsi que tout autre service professionnel ou technique relatif au fonctionnement d’une bibliothèque
publique;

b) conclure des contrats de services documentaires, professionnels ou
techniques relatifs au fonctionnement d’une bibliothèque publique;

c) favoriser la mise en commun des ressources, les échanges entre les
bibliothèques publiques et la coopération avec toute bibliothèque ou
tout organisme intéressé;

d) promouvoir toute autre activité reliée au fonctionnement d’une
bibliothèque publique;

e) encourager et soutenir des programmes de formation, d’information,
d’animation et de développement culturel compatibles avec les objets
mentionnés aux paragraphes a) à d).

Le Réseau BIBLIO est un organisme subventionné par le ministère de la Culture et des Communications.

Name: ALS Library Services
Description: ALS Library Services has been in the business of library supply for over 40 years and our experience has resulted in simple-to-use web interfaces with sophisticated electronic back-end systems for acquisition, ordering, cataloguing and work flows. This ensures fast and accurate processing of the latest books and media through our doors and directly to our customers shelves.

Name: MATEBOL S.R.L.
Description:
MATEBOL S.R.L. (Materiales Bolivia) es una empresa importadora y distribuidora de hojas de papel bond y material de escritorio. Nuestra operación está diseñada para garantizar eficiencia, transparencia y valor agregado en cada transacción.

Nos especializamos en la importación directa de hojas de papel bond marca “EXCELLENT COPY PAPER”, con certificación PEFC, lo que respalda nuestro compromiso con la sostenibilidad y la calidad. Estas hojas cuentan con un gramaje de 75 g/m² y se comercializan en los formatos Carta, Oficio y A4. Name: Library
Description:
Chennai International Book Fair, organized by the Directorate of Public Libraries and Tamil Nadu Textbook and Educational Services Corporation, is the B2B fair of the 45+ year-old Chennai Book Fair. CIBF is a popular destination for a trade book fair among publishers, rights agents, printers, and other publishing professionals within India and around the globe.

Following the highly successful Chennai International Book Fair 2023, Tamil Nadu is now prepared to hold its second edition of CIBF. Attracted by over 30 countries and hundreds of publishers, CIBF has cemented its place amongst international book fairs.

The first edition of CIBF was an incredible success, garnering praise from both Indian and international participants. An impressive 365 Memorandums of Understanding were signed between primarily Tamil publishers and their global peers. The international pavilion created for the fair provided a unique experience to visitors as they experienced a truly international book fair for the very first time.

The Tamil Nadu government has launched a translation grant program, providing guidelines and applications for non-Tamil publishers who wish to translate Tamil works into their own languages.

The Chennai International Book Fair (CIBF) 2024 will take place in January 2024 at the Chennai Trade Center, Nandambakkam in Chennai. It is an event organized by the Tamil Nadu Textbook Corporation and Educational Services, an enterprise of the Government of Tamil Nadu.  The theme for CIBF this year will be “Writing: from Pots to Bots”, emphasizing how writing has evolved from its humble beginnings with pot shreds to Artificial Intelligence.

Name: The Open Library Project
Description:
The Open Library Project is a non-fiction book library service offered to businesses on a subscription basis. We are trying to move away from the run- of-the-mill library concept and setting up rotational and locational libraries at co-working spaces, corporates and business incubators. The idea is to create value, build a knowledge community and encourage a growth mindset amongst our members.
 
How it works: We set up a set of 30-50 books at offices across various categories of non-fiction which are rotated every quarter (a refundable deposit and a small monthly fee is charged from the corporate). The thought behind this is to provide industry specific curation of books. This enables a corporate to develop exactly the kind of skill set that they want to amongst their employees. So for eg. at a Finance incubator we would set up books across business, finance, management, innovation. At a design library it would be design and design thinking books.
 
In addition to this we also promote peer to peer learning for which we get Curators (experts/stalwarts) on board from various industries to come and share their experiences and influences with our members. We feel that one is more likely to read a book that is recommended by a person we look up to. These events are curated across many categories like art, film, cheese education, design, finance, start-ups, travel etc. We do one event a month on a premium subscription model with these corporates for value addition.

We also engage in corporate gifting of books for occasions, meetings, seminars, trainings at discounted rates.
Location: MUMBAI, Near Kamala Mills, Gate no 4

Name: Hochschulbibliothekszentrum NRW (hbz)
Description:
The North Rhine-Westphalian Library Service Centre (Hochschulbibliothekszentrum NRW, hbz) is a central service and development institution for the academic libraries in North Rhine-Westphalia and Rhineland-Palatinate. In this role, the hbz supports and initiates the national restructuring of information services which has become necessary due to the rapid technological changes seen in recent years.

Central services of the hbz include network services, the Digitale Bibliothek (DigiBib), interlibrary loans, digital content, portal technology and library statistics. Further key areas of the hbz include Open Access, Linked Open Data, digitisation and long-term preservation.

The hbz falls within the remit of the Ministry of Culture and Science of the German State of North Rhine-Westphalia. Based on its years of experience and competence it cooperates with a wide range of external partners for the success-oriented implementation of projects together with its clients.

We are convinced that philosophy aims to create awareness through logical answers to these questions, thus enriching our lives for the better. Believing that the cultural experience is an ongoing process, constantly evolving, encompassing all aspects of life and creativity, we have decided to enrich the pioneering Emirati experience and be an important scientific counterpart that enlightens present and future generations.

The House of Philosophy Foundation aims to disseminate ethical and aesthetic values, enlightenment, and tolerance. It also seeks to create an Emirati intellectual elite that reflects on its reality with sound, methodical thinking.

Name: GALILEO - Georgia's Virtual Library
Description:
A unit of the University System of Georgia, GALILEO is the state's virtual library, focuses on lifelong learning by providing access to credible and authoritative resources to more than 2,800 school, public and academic libraries across the state.

Our programs include:

-- GALILEO Search: Our search engine provides access for all Georgians to authoritative, subscription-only information that isn’t available through free search engines or internet directories. Resources include thousands of periodicals and scholarly journals, encyclopedias, business directories, and government publications.

-- GALILEO Interconnected Libraries: We support 26 institutions of the University System of Georgia with a robust library services platform, statewide delivery service for interlibrary lending (with an average delivery time of four days), and other tools that help libraries better serve patrons.

-- Affordable Learning Georgia: ALG promotes student success by supporting the implementation of affordable and free/open alternatives to expensive commercial textbooks. It has saved more than 1 million USG students an estimated $175 million in textbook costs through its grants program.

-- Digital Library of Georgia: This program collaborates with Georgia libraries, archives, museums, and other educational and cultural groups to provide access to key resources on Georgia history and culture.

Saytda qeydiyyatdan keçdikdən sonra il ərzində 7/24 endirimli məhsullardan e-poçt vasitəsilə dərhal xəbərdar olmaq imkanını əldə edirsiniz.

Çətin tapılan, Azərbaycanda olmayan və az nüsxə ilə çap olunan kitabları bizim köməkliyimizlə rahat şəkildə əldə edə bilərsiniz. Bununla yanaşı bizimlə partnyorluq edən mətbəə və nəşriyyatların çap məhsullarını da çox sərfəli qiymətlərlə əldə etmək imkanı qazanırsınız. Kitabevim.az e-mağazası Sizə yalnız orjinal məhsullar təqdim edir.

Sizlər üçün sevimli müəllif, yazar və şairlərinizlə görüşmək imkanı da yaradırıq. Bunun üçün sosial şəbəkələrdən bizi izləməyiniz kifayətdir.

Name: Marysville Public Library
Description: The Marysville Public Library provides quality information resources and services to educate, entertain, enrich and strengthen our diverse community.

Name: NEFLIN
Description:
Through grant funding and membership dues, NEFLIN provides members access to training, resource sharing, research and development, partnerships for grant funding, leadership opportunities, and additional services through relationships with other organizations.

NEFLIN  serves 550 libraries in 24 counties throughout northeast Florida.

Our Vision
NEFLIN will provide resources to its member libraries, to help them serve and empower their diverse users and create a sense of community.

Our Mission
NEFLIN transforms member libraries by providing services that promote communities of excellence.

Name: Association des bibliothèques de droit de Montréal / Montreal Association of law libraries
Description: Regroupement des professionnels œuvrant dans les bibliothèques juridiques de Montréal et des personnes intéressées à l’information juridique.

Name: Collingwood Public Library
Description:
We guide our community in the pursuit of information, the wonder of lifelong learning, and the enrichment of social and cultural experiences.

Providing exemplary service since 1903, Collingwood Public Library offers valuable opportunities for adults, children and teens. With comfortable reading spaces, public computer stations, wireless internet access and meeting rooms equipped with presentation equipment, the Library is an inclusive gathering place for the community.

Name: Easton Area Public Library
Description: The mission of the Easton Area Public Library is to promote literacy, to advance lifelong learning, and to contribute to the development of an active and informed community of citizens.

Name: Mastics Moriches Shirley Community Library
Description:
The Community Library was established by the voters of the William Floyd School District in the summer of 1974. Our doors first opened to the public on June 14, 1975, located in two portable classrooms on the William Floyd School District property.

On June 1, 1977, the Library relocated to a storefront on William Floyd Parkway. On December 12, 1979, a bond issue was approved to build a permanent Library. That bond issue funded the current building, built on donated land and opened in March of 1982. In December of 1995, a 24,000 sq. ft. addition was dedicated, increasing the Community Library to 44,000 sq. ft. Approval for this expansion was given by the voters on October 19, 1992.

The Community Library has been a leader in providing innovative services since its creation including:

Leadership in the field of automation
Dynamic children’s and family programming
Innovative service for teens Services for senior citizens
Friends of the Arts cultural activities
Literacy & ESOL Services
Community outreach initiatives Digital services and technology support
Career and college readiness assistance Lifelong learning opportunities for all
Partnerships with local businesses and organizations

The Library has received recognition in such major media as Library Journal, Newsday, and the New York Times. News organizations such as NBC’s Channel 4 and Channel 12 News have filmed news coverage in the Community Library. The Library has been the recipient of numerous grants in support of our unique programs and services.

Name: Mahwah Public Library
Description:
The Mahwah Public Library is an essential resource for the residents of Mahwah, New Jersey, and surrounding communities.  The Library connects everyone in the community with ideas, information, technology and each other to further life-long learning and the cultural and business interests of its residents.

As the Library celebrates its centennial, it serves the community via both its physical building, robust access to information, space to meet and connect, and enhanced online services.  The Library’s web presence was designed to make it easy to find and access the depth of online services that are available to Mahwah residents wherever and whenever they want them.  Everything from current eBooks, downloadable audiobooks and music, to online test preparation and investment information are just a click away.

Name: San Mateo County Library
Description: County of San Mateo Library. This is not the official page, please visit http://smcl.org/. Please contact administrator
