Name: @sibisc.lab
Description: O @sibisc.Lab, é uma biblioteca experimental cujo propósito é ser com um ambiente de aprendizagem excepcional e inspirador para toda a comunidade.

Name: LegalBooks
Description: LeglBooks est la première librairie juridique en RDC.

Name: Rapid City Public Libraries
Description: The Rapid City Public Libraries serves as community connector for the Rapid City area. It is our mission to anticipate, build and connect for our diverse community. Members of the Libraries have access to electronic books and movies, print books, computers and wi-fi, and a variety of programs for people of all ages. We will soon be offering one-on-one appointments with a librarian to help those who need to learn computer skills or how may need help finding information. We have three locations to serve you: Downtown Library at 610 Quincy Street, North Library in General Beadle School at 10 N. Van Buren Street, and East Library at WDT at 800 Mickelsen Dr.

Name: textos.info
Description:
Biblioteca digital abierta y colaborativa en la que se pueden encontrar de forma legal miles de libros en formato electrónico para su lectura online y descarga gratuita.

Más de 5.000 libros disponibles de más de 500 autores. Novela, relato, teatro, ensayo, filosofía, história... todos los géneros tienen cabida en este proyecto que promueve la promoción de la lectura sin barreras de ningún tipo.

Cualquier persona puede además aportar más libros a la biblioteca, convirtiéndose en editor de la misma.

Una gran colección de textos en formato PDF, ePUB, mobi/Kindle y con herramientas de sincronización automática para hacer más fácil que nunca la descarga de libros hasta los ereaders.

Name: Albany County Public Library
Description: The mission of the Albany County Public Library is to enhance the quality of life in Albany County by offering access to a diverse collection of materials, being a key partner in education, and offering community-based programs through its professional and friendly staff. ACPL provides the residents of Albany County with free access to books, movies, online resources, information databases, computers, magazines, CDs, audiobooks, e-Books and more. Library cards are free for those who live, work or shop in Albany County. We recognize valid library cards from all Wyoming library systems.

Name: NOCALL
Description:
Since 1980, the Northern California Association of Law Libraries (NOCALL) has been the professional association serving the needs of legal information professionals throughout northern California.  NOCALL members have served as officers and board members of the national association (AALL) and are active in many areas of the profession.

NOCALL has grown to near 400 members representing more than 100 libraries in the Bay Area and surrounding counties.  Members come from all segments of the legal community including law firms, academic libraries, federal and state courts and agencies, county and public law libraries, corporate legal departments, law school and library school students, publishers, and vendors.

Name: مكتبة الملك عبدالعزيز العامة | king abdulaziz public library
Description: مكتبة الملك عبدالعزيز العامة مؤسسة خيرية أسسها الملك عبدالله بن عبدالعزيز آل سعود في 27 مارس 1985م (5 رجب 1405هـ)، وافتتحها في 27 فبراير 1987م (10 رجب 1408م)، لرعاية المسائل المتعلقة بالكتاب والمستفيدين منه.

Name: Wood Library-Museum of Anesthesiology
Description:
The goals of the Wood Library-Museum of Anesthesiology are to collect and preserve literature and equipment pertaining to anesthesiology and to make available to the anesthesiology community, others in the medical profession and the public the most comprehensive educational, scientific and archival resources in anesthesiology.

The Wood Library-Museum is governed by a Board of Trustees of nine anesthesiologists who collectively envision the Wood Library-Museum's growth with a completely integrated collection of books, multimedia materials, rare books, current literature and artifacts. Committees, appointed yearly, serve the Wood Library-Museum as expert consultants.
 
The Wood Library Museum provides contemporary and historical reference services by mail and e-mail, by telephone, fax or in person. Online literature searches and photocopies are available upon request. Resources from the Wood Library-Museum are provided as a service to ASA members and on a fee basis for non-members.

Name: Klaipėdos apskrities Ievos Simonaitytės viešoji biblioteka
Description: Daugeliui biblioteka pirmiausiai asocijuojasi su knyga – tai dažniausia apsilankymo priežastis bibliotekoje. Mes skiriame daug laiko ir pastangų šios paslaugos tobulinimui ir prieinamumui didinti. Siekiame, kad visas procesas iki  pasinėrimo į knygą jums patogioje aplinkoje būtų malonus, paprastas ir prieinamas 24/7. Todėl bibliotekoje nuolat gimsta naujos idėjos ir inovatyvios paslaugos: įrengiamos knygų grąžinimo dėžės, knygomatai ir skaitomatai bibliotekoje ir už jos ribų, keliaujame į miesto šventes ir įsikuriame netikėčiausiose vietose – parkuose, paplūdimiuose, o nuo šiol mus galite rasti ir Klaipėdos dramos teatre.  Nuolatos organizuojame parodas, renginius, kviečiame dalyvauti edukacijose ir kitose kūrybinėse veiklose. Pristatome kaip biblioteka, kuri jauki lyg namai ir skatinanti ieškoti, bandyti bei keistis – Pokyčių namai. Apsilankyk ir atrask SAVO namus bibliotekoje.

Name: Grove for Libraries
Description: Grove was founded out of a recognition that libraries need the ability to direct the future development for Aspen Discovery. Grove offers development, hosting, support, and more for Aspen Discovery, Aspen LiDA, and other projects related to Aspen. Grove employees also contribute time and expertise to all Aspen Community meetings as well as dedicated Office Hours to help grow and support all libraries and organizations using Aspen.

Name: Palestine Public Library Texas
Description: Palestine Public Library offers access to ideas, information, and experiences through a variety of materials to enrich the lives of residents of Palestine and Anderson County, Texas. The collection includes high-interest magazines, newspapers, books, audiobooks, DVDs,  materials en español, and a Special Collections room for genealogy and local history. The library also has a Digital Branch featuring digital eBooks and audiobooks.

Name: Jefferson County Public Law Library
Description: The mission of the Jefferson County Public Law Library (JCPLL) is to provide the community with a current collection of legal reference materials based upon the belief that access to knowledge and information is essential to the promotion of justice and respect for the law.

Name: The Friends of the Public Library of Cincinnati and Hamilton County
Description:
The Friends is dedicated to supporting the Public Library of Cincinnati and Hamilton County and to promoting literacy in our community.  We achieve these ends primary by selling used books (both private donations and Library discards) and yearly memberships.  The funds we raise provide essential dollars to the Library so it can continue to offer lifelong educational opportunities.

We have two retail locations staffed by an army of dedicated volunteers. Our Used Book Store at the Warehouse is the center of Friends activity and planning. Donations are processed here and and our main collection of books (upwards of 100,000 titles) is housed at this site.  

The Friends' Shop in located in the Main Library, downtown.  Filled with treasures for readers, writers and gift givers, this boutique specialized in greeting cards and literary-themed merchandise.  You will also find hundreds of used books in the back room available for purchase.  

The Friends sponsor several large book events throughout the year, and our locations are open for shoppers year-round. We provide original programming including a book club and a writer's discussion group.

Name: Simi Valley Public Library
Description:
One of the first libraries in Ventura County when it opened in the early 1900’s, the Simi Valley Library was located in a quiet, residential neighborhood and housed a very small collection. Mirroring the growth of the community it serves, the library quickly outgrew that location and plans were established to build a new library on the City’s civic center campus. With its completion in 1980, the beautiful 35,000 square foot facility became one of the City’s landmarks.

Simi Valley Public Library currently provides a range offerings to the public, including: homework help, public computer access, wifi, early literacy sessions, adult literacy, books, DVD's, CD's, eBooks, language learning materials, advanced research assistance, and access to thousands of sources through our online databases.

Name: Boces School
Description:
The Adult Practical Nursing Program of the Herkimer Fulton Hamilton
Ostego BOCES, located in Ilion, New York, provides students with the
comprehensive and hands-on education they need to become successful and
confident Licensed Practical Nurses (LPNs).

LPNs are urgently needed in the health care industry, and students with
this certification also have the option to continue their schooling and
become Registered Nurses.

Students interested in applying for the program at the Herkimer County
BOCES should first register for the pre-admission test. Contact the
school for registration details and application information.

After the entrance exam, further admissions requirements will involve an
interview, a copy of your high school diploma or GED, references and a
physical exam.

Tuition costs vary by program length and year, and can include a variety
of factors like uniforms, physical exams and CPR certification.
Therefore, financial aid is offered to qualifying students.

Students can seek aid in the form of Pell Grants, federal or parental
loans, Veterans Educations Benefits, Clark Foundation Scholarships,
Herkimer BOCES Dollars for Scholars, VEDSID, WIA and George Duffy
Foundation Scholarships. To apply for aid, students should fill out a
FAFSA.

Name: KARTAL SIVAMA BOMBE METLA SAN.TİC.A.Ş
Description:
Bombe Üretiminde küresel çapta uzman olan Kartal Grup, yarım asırı geçen tecrübesiyle derin çekme bombeler için özel bir tesis olarak Kartal Sıvama Sanayi'yi kurdu.

Yeni teknoloji üretim tesisinde seri üretim yapan bir otomasyon sistemine sahip olan KSS yurtiçinde ve yurtdışında müşterilerinin derin çekme bombe taleplerine hızlı bir şekilde cevap vermektedir.

Name: Preservation Technologies, L.P.
Description:
Preservation Technologies (PTLP) is a company dedicated to helping universities, academic institutions, cultural entities, and private companies preserve and maintain access to their collections. PTLP was founded on the guiding principle of bringing engineering and innovation to the field of cultural preservation.

Preservation Technologies successfully developed the patented Bookkeeper process, which extends the life of books and manuscripts by neutralizing the harmful acids found in paper. Bookkeeper is the only deacidification method to meet the standards of the Library of Congress as well as current and projected U.S. OSHA, FTC, EPA and E.U. REACH consumer and environmental requirements.  Bookkeeper equipment, products, and services are the international standard for paper deacidification.

Having developed a reputation as a worldwide leader in paper preservation, Preservation Technologies was in a unique position to expand its services to help clients preserve other cultural collections. The MediaPreserve was founded in 2006 as a response to this need. It offers studios designed for the  transfer of delicate one-off materials and high-capacity multiple ingest of robust formats. All ingest is fully-monitored to ensure the quality of each file produced. We have developed painstaking quality control procedures to guarantee file integrity and have successfully initiated the automation of metadata to accompany these digital files.

Preservation Technologies is an ISO 9001:2015 Certified company and winner of the President's E-Award for excellence in exporting.

Name: Réseau BIBLIO CQLM
Description:
Le Réseau BIBLIO CQLM a pour mission de soutenir les municipalités des milieux rural et semi-urbain dans le maintien et le développement de leur service de bibliothèque publique. Il offre un soutien au fonctionnement, à l’animation et à la promotion, en plus d’assurer la gestion et l’accès aux collections et ressources documentaires. 126 municipalités sont membres du Réseau BIBLIO CQLM.

Le Réseau BIBLIO CQLM est le gestionnaire du portail biblietcie.ca, vitrine des bibliothèques membres, lequel donne accès à une vaste gamme de services à distance, 7 jours sur 7, 24 h sur 24 h.

Name: LibraryWorld, Inc.
Description:
Each library subscription is free for up to 30 days. After which time, you can purchase a standard subscription for $425 per year.

With a full suite of library automation modules, you can manage one or more libraries using any standard Web browser.

Whether it's full patron access, serials tracking, inventory, or security, you'll be impressed with the great return on investment this service provides.

Full MARC importing and editing of catalog records, with easy access to over 14 million records from the Library of Congress helps you build and maintain your collection.

Name: Hackley Public Library
Description:
The Hackley Public Library is dedicated to 1) promoting knowledge, understanding, and wisdom, 2) combating ignorance, intolerance, and indifference, 3) promoting the free exchange of ideas, and 4) conserving our national and local cultural heritage.

The mission of the Hackley Public Library is to inform, inspire, and delight our diverse community by providing information, knowledge, literature, new technologies, and traditional and innovative programs.

Name: Heythrop Library
Description:
The Heythrop Library's collection covers all the principal areas of theology and philosophy with a particular emphasis on works in the Catholic tradition. It is used by both students and researchers, and includes complete runs of periodicals, some of which are unique in this country. We are solely funded by the Jesuits in Britain, and do not receive any other/public funds. Therefore, we are a members-only Library, and you might need to pay for accessing our collections, or using our reading room at the London Jesuit Centre.

Access to the Heythrop Library is open to researchers, academics and those with a serious interest in theology and philosophy.

Name: Grimsby Public Library
Description: Fostering innovation and creating connections, the Grimsby Public Library is a vital and accessible destination for culture, technology and relevant 21st century literacies.

Name: UrduFans
Description: A great site for all your urdu needs! It's the social network community organization, providing a welcoming, supportive and non-confrontational environment. It is a network which contains Urdu Literature, News, Poetry, Horoscope, Sports, Health, Walpapers, Islam, Women, Show-biz, Addab, Articles and Features and much more... by the fans & for the fans. Urdu Fans is first of its kind and Pakistan's best urdu community forum on Internet.

Name: Biblioteka Gdynia
Description:
Biblioteka Gdynia to miejska biblioteka publiczna działająca na terenie Gdyni. Nasza sieć obejmuje 17 różnej wielkości filii animujących życie społeczne i kulturalne mieszkańców miasta, a także 2 placówki specjalistyczne: wypożyczalnię popularnonaukową Biblioteka Wiedzy oraz Bibliotekę z Pasją – miejsce zaprojektowane dla młodzieży i przez młodzież z ofertą skrojoną właśnie pod nich. 

Odpowiadając na współczesne potrzeby mieszkańców Gdyni, nasza oferta dostosowana jest do potrzeb różnych grup naszych użytkowników: dzieci, rodziców, seniorów, studentów, niezależnie od ich statusu społecznego czy pochodzenia. Zapewniamy, poza nieodpłatnym odstępem do książkowych nowości, komiksów, mang, audiobooków, gier planszowych oraz winyli, również edukację i rozrywkę. W ciągu roku organizowanych jest kilkadziesiąt autorskich spotkań, warsztaty, wykłady, koncerty, kursy języka polskiego dla obcokrajowców, regularnie zbierają się również dyskusyjne kluby książki.

Wśród organizowanych przez Bibliotekę Gdynia wydarzeń znajdują się, między innymi:

- Nagroda Literacka Gdynia, jedno z najważniejszych tego typu wyróżnień, które współorganizujemy od kilku lat razem z Urzędem Miasta Gdyni. Przyznawana jest w czterech kategoriach: esej, proza, poezja i tłumaczenie.

- (nie)konferencję Kierunek Wizerunek, branżowe wydarzenie skierowane do bibliotekarek i bibliotekarzy, umożliwiający zdobywanie nowych kompetencji oraz sieciowanie się, organizowane od 2014 roku.

- Pasja Minicon – współorganizowany z czytelniczkami i czytelnikami od 2018 roku, kierowany do młodzieży i młodych dorosłych konwent Pasja Minicon poświęcony literaturze fantastycznej i nie tylko. W ciągu dwóch dni odbywa się około 90 wydarzeń, m.in. prelekcje, panele, spotkania z autorami, sesje RPG i gier planszowych.

Name: Servicios Bibliotecarios
Description: desarrollo de sistemas bibliográficos de información bibliotecas y archivos

Name: Bookmark
Description: Developing readers not buyers!

Name: Northern Lights Library System
Description:
Bringing the world to our Communities by collaboratively providing efficient, effective, and exceptional library services.

Northern Lights Library System is one of seven library systems in Alberta, and it helps deliver comprehensive and efficient library services to the north east area of the province. Northern Lights is composed of 46 member libraries, each of whom are autonomous in serving their own communities. Together, however, Northern Lights and its members are able to provide library services to the regional population on a greater scale than a single library could alone.

Name: Sentry Custom Security
Description:
Based in New York and Toronto, Sentry Custom Security manufactures and distributes security tags for library books and media items, detection gates, staff checkout hardware, and patron self-service systems.  We provide solutions for the Library of Congress, Princeton University, the University of Notre Dame, the Toronto Reference Library, and many other libraries large and small.

Founded in 1966 as Knogo Corporation, our company has deep roots in the Electronic Article Surveillance Industry.  Sentry Custom Security purchased Knogo North America in 1996 and ID Systems in 2004.  Both Knogo and ID Systems specialized in anti-theft technology and self-service solutions, in addition to servicing and consulting for libraries all over the world.  The companies now operate under a single corporate structure as Sentry Custom Security, which maintains the Knogo trademark. Our companies have over 40 years of combined experience developing specialized products for the library marketplace.

Sentry manufactures security and information management systems for libraries using in-house engineers who have years of product development experience. The company has developed extensive software engineering expertise resulting in market-leading self-service features.  Sidekick, the software bundled with QuickCheck, tracks usage statistics, operational efficiency, network status, and hardware status. Sentry Custom Security also manufactures custom security labels that are compatible with 3M library security systems, and each year sells millions of labels worldwide.

Name: Faulkner County Library
Description:
Founded in 1954, the Faulkner-Van Buren Regional Library System serves the residents of Faulkner and Van Buren counties with eight branches as well as the main library based out of 1900 Tyler St, Conway, Arkansas, United States.

Our mission is to open access to ideas and communities through shared collections, shared spaces, and shared activities.

Description:
alzwraa  for selling old books and magazines
الزوراء  لبيع الكتب والمجلات القديمة

Name: Regionbibliotek Norrbotten
Description:
Vårt uppdrag är att främja folkbibliotekens utveckling. Därför samarbetar vi med kommunerna i Norrbotten inom organisationen Biblioteken i Norrbotten. Det gör vi för att norrbottningarna ska ha tillgång till ett brett och aktuellt utbud av bibliotekstjänster, litteratur och andra medietyper. Sedan 2013 är Biblioteken i Norrbotten ett bibliotek med gemensamt biblioteksdatasystem och webb.

Biblioteken i Norrbotten är en självklar och naturlig del av alla människors liv och vardag. Vi bidrar på så sätt till att göra Norrbotten till en mer upplevelserik plats att leva på.

Name: Prestalib | Self service smartphone system for libraries
Description: Prestalib is a new way of managing your library self-service processes based on smartphone RFID technology that provides a modern, versatile and cost-effective solution to improve your self-checkout library system. Besides, it will help you modernise your library, creating an interactive experience for your users.

Name: Berwyn Public Library
Description:
VISION STATEMENT: As a driving force behind a vibrant and diverse community, the Berwyn Public Library: Will strive to offer a stimulating sanctuary where people of all ages and backgrounds can come together to discover a love of lifelong learning; Will provide essential and vital services to our citizens in an ever changing world.

MISSION STATEMENT: The Berwyn Public Library supports our community by: Providing a welcoming and accessible environment in which all individuals receive professional service and assistance in fulfilling their educational, research, literacy and entertainment needs; Educating and empowering the public through the preservation and distribution of timely and accurate information as guided by the Principles of Intellectual Freedom.

Name: Teaneck Public Library
Description:
Founded in 1895, the Township of Teaneck is located in Bergen County, across the Hudson River from New York City, and near the intersection of Interstates 95 and 80. Boasting a richly multicultural population of over 40,000, Teaneck is the home to several large employers including Fairleigh Dickinson University, Holy Name Medical Center, and Cognizant Technology Solutions. Teaneck was recently ranked among the top twenty most diverse towns in New Jersey.

Teaneck Public Library is a county leader in public library service, with a reputation for providing high quality materials, programming, and information services to residents of Teaneck and surrounding communities. With the highest total public library circulation in the county for 2017, Teaneck Public Library loaned a total of 464,017 items.

Name: Concord
Description:
For over 30 years, Concord has been providing customer-centric library management software for K-12 schools in Australia, the UK, and the USA. Our focus is on enhancing the educational journey for students while streamlining the workload of educators and library teams.
 
We offer Infiniti, a modern cloud-native library management system, and LibPaths, an intuitive digital content curation platform. Both are developed and designed to empower you with modern, user-friendly tools that simplify your tasks.
 
Founded from a teacher's vision in 1987, Concord has continuously evolved to meet the changing needs of education. Today, our team remains dedicated to delivering industry-leading solutions that align with your curriculum objectives and elevate the value of the library in educational settings.
 
Join us in advancing the future of education with Concord.

Name: Fond du Lac Public Library
Description:
The Fond du Lac Public Library serves the community by supporting literacy, lifelong learning and diversity through customer friendly services that inform, entertain and inspire.

The Fond du Lac Public Library is located in downtown Fond du Lac at the intersection of Sheboygan and Portland streets.

Name: Citrus County Library System
Description: Promotes the pursuit of knowledge and the delivery of quality education to the community, embracing the power of information, imagination, and ideas.

Name: Leser søker bok
Description: LESER SØKER BOK is a company based out of c/o Litteraturhuset Wergelandsveien 29, OSLO, Oslo, Norway.

Name: Lakmahal Community Library
Description:
The Lakmahal Community Library is a space to encourage interest in the literary arts and encourage people to engage with the joy of reading. With a collection of over 3000 books spanning several genres, we want to encourage people to expand their reading horizons through access to a wide variety of books.

Located in an old family home, Lakmahal, whose inhabitants shared a love of literature, we hope to create a peaceful environment where anyone can study, work, and create art. We hope to encourage reading, writing, and storytelling with our collection of books, our clubs, and the variety of events we host every month.

Name: Annapolis Valley Regional Library
Description:
Annapolis Valley Regional Library (AVRL) is a public library system based in Annapolis Valley, Nova Scotia, Canada. It serves a population of just over 101,000 in Annapolis County, Kings County and the District of West Hants with eleven branch libraries and Bookmobile service. Established in 1949, Annapolis Valley Regional Library was the first regional library system in Nova Scotia.

To learn more about Annapolis Valley Regional Library, visit our website at www.valleylibrary.ca or call 902-538-2665. To check out the most recent updates, like us on Facebook /AVRLibrary or follow us on Twitter @valleylibs.

Name: Syosset Public Library
Description:
Mission Statement
It is the mission of the Syosset Public Library to provide the residents of the Syosset School District with the broadest possible range of information resources as well as a variety of opportunities for cultural enrichment that enhances the quality-of-life of the community.

GOALS AND OBJECTIVES 

We will strive to maintain an extensive reference collection, worldwide reliable electronic resources and an expert service-oriented staff.

We will strive to provide the newest and best reading materials as well as a strong collection of classic literature.

We will strive to make available noteworthy music, movie and other non-print items to meet the diverse needs and tastes of the community.

We will strive to have a variety of programs for children that are entertaining, educational and encourage a life-long love for reading and knowledge.  We will provide support for the excellent educational programs offered in our schools.

We will strive to have adult programming that is informational, instructive and entertaining. We will schedule exciting trips to concerts, theatre productions and other points of interest.

We will strive to have the library reflect the high standards of the Syosset-Woodbury Community, a quality collection and cultural and entertainment opportunities for all, in modern and comfortable surroundings.

Name: HawaiiLiteracy
Description:
Hawaii Literacy is dedicated to increasing literacy for adults and children in Hawai’i, a critical step in breaking cycles of poverty and under-education. Our mission is “to help people gain knowledge and skills by providing literacy and lifelong learning services.” Since 1971, Hawaii Literacy has provided tutoring to thousands of adults needing a second chance to learn to read and write, find work, and help their children, and helps disadvantaged children become readers and succeed in school. With the help of 325 volunteers, Hawai’i Literacy serves nearly 3,000 people in need each year.

Literacy is the base for future achievement and Hawaii Literacy's free Literacy programs help increase literacy in Hawaii. We welcome connections from other LinkedIn members interested in supporting increased literacy, education, and economic opportunity in Hawai'i.

Name: Da's BookStore
Description:
Are You a Fan of English Literature?
Do you think that #Books should be more than just a PDF file? Do you also think that eBooks take out the charm and the magic of the book?
Have you ever wanted to have a hard copy of a book, but you couldn’t find it near you? And when you found it, it was double the price?

Da's Online Bookstore was founded to solve all these problems, and help expand the #EnglishBookLibraries of the Moroccan reader.

Browse our posts and let us know if you see something you like to add to your collection.
You have a specific book in mind? Just let us know the book title and author, and we'll be more than happy to make it available to you.

Da's Bookstore
Let you Brain Go for a Run

Name: Monash Public Library Service
Description:
The Monash Public Library Service provides access to educational and recreational resources in print, online, and through a range of regular programs and activities, to its thousands of users. 
The Monash municipality is served by five library branches, located at Glen Waverley, Mount Waverley, Wheelers Hill, Oakleigh and Clayton respectively.
The City of Monash is one of Melbourne's most populous municipalities, with around 172,000 residents. It is located 20km south east of the CBD in Melbourne's fastest growing population corridor. Monash is a cosmopolitan city with 39.7% of its residents coming from more than 30 countries. The City has a highly skilled and well-educated workforce, with 13% having a degree or higher education. Its residents also enjoy a level of home ownership that is considerably higher than the Melbourne average.

Name: Monroe Township Public Library
Description:
Monroe Township is a sprawling, suburban/semi-rural community in the southernmost part of Middlesex County, NJ.

The Monroe Township Public Library is a vibrant, well-used facility providing a high level of service to all community residents. The Library and staff enjoy the support of Township residents, and administrative and financial support from municipal officials. A highly dedicated, skilled staff enables the Library to provide a level of personalized service that is unavailable at many other libraries of comparable size.

Our Mission:

The Monroe Township Public Library strives to establish an environment in which learning and personal growth are encouraged, nurtured and supported by:

- Providing a wide variety of resources that reflect the community's interests and needs while promoting literacy, lifelong learning and intellectual freedom.

- Creating on-going adventures in reading and learning for youth.

- Fostering interaction among diverse groups by providing a central focal point for Township activities.

- Delivering high quality service

For more information on the services we provide, please visit our web site!

Name: Cobidoc BV
Description: Cobidoc BV levert al sinds 1972 wetenschappelijke en technische informatie aan bedrijven en organisaties in Nederland. In de databases is informatie opgeslagen over onderwerpen als biotechnologie, chemie, energie, engineering, gezondheid, veiligheid, materiaalkunde, geneeskunde, nanotechnologie, farmacologie, octrooien, toxicologie, drug discovery, Reach enzovoorts.

Name: VoorleesExpress Lek & IJssel
Description: Geen kind zonder voorlezen! De VoorleesExpress zorgt ervoor dat kinderen van 2 tot 8 jaar met een taalachterstand extra aandacht krijgen. We stimuleren de taalontwikkeling van kinderen én werken nauw samen met ouders.

Name: Christian County Library
Description: The Christian County Library is committed to serving all members of our community by providing clean and safe facilities, partnering with schools and businesses, offering educational activities and programs, building a collection of print and digital materials, as well as convenient access to library locations and services throughout the county.

Name: Keene Public Library
Description:
The Keene Public Library is a energetic library in a vibrant town of 23,106. We are located in Cheshire County, with a county population of 77,329 people. Keene is home to three local colleges: Keene State College, Antioch University and River Valley Community College. 

The Keene Public Library's current location officially opened in 1898. After numerous additions, culminating in the 2019 connection to a renovated neighboring mansion which had been a Mason Hall, we are the largest public library building in New Hampshire at 70,000 sq. ft.  From the very beginning, we have been a vital source of information and innovation. The Library provides five meeting rooms, an auditorium, makerspace, two large event spaces and classroom for preschool programs. The meeting and event spaces are also available for public meetings or private events.

The Friends of the Keene Public Library, a non-profit established in 1980, and the Library Trustees provide additional support to the Library and staff in areas not funded by the City budget.

Name: Hadi Yehya Bookstore | مكتبة هادي يحيى
Description:
Meet Hadi Yehya, a Lebanese individual with special needs, on a mission to transform his passion for books into a community treasure. 

A Remarkable Journey:
Hadi's story has touched hearts throughout the Chouf area. From participating in exhibitions to sharing his passion with buyers, he has become a symbol of determination and resilience.
What began as an online venture has grown into a collection of over 5000 books in English, French, and Arabic, some generously donated by friends, family, and people across Lebanon.

Vision:
Creating a vibrant and inclusive community that celebrates diversity, fosters empathy, and promotes a love for reading. 

Mission
Our mission is to establish a dynamic community library that not only provides access to a diverse collection of second-hand books but also promotes sustainability and creates economic opportunities. Through our carefully curated selection of quality second-hand books, we aim to offer affordable reading options for individuals of all ages and backgrounds. 

Hadi's Bookstore has won a grant, through the Emdad Program implemented by the International Labour Organization under the PROSPECTS Programme, supported by the government of the Netherlands, makesense Lebanon, Cooperazione per lo Sviluppo (COSV), and Research and Professional Services for the MENA Region (RPS).

Your Support Matters, How You Can Help:

Donate Books: You can contribute by donating books. These books won't be sold; instead, they'll be displayed in the bookstore and made available for borrowing. Your donation will directly enrich the reading experience for the community.

Name: Wallingford Public Library
Description: By offering a wide array of resources and experiences and by connecting people in our community with ideas and with each other, the Wallingford Public Library ensures every resident has the opportunity to be inspired, enriched, and informed.

Name: Middletown Township Public Library
Description:
The Middletown Township Public Library is a civic institution that provides materials, ideas, information, technology and cultural opportunities to enrich, empower and educate.

The Library Trustees, Staff, and Volunteers uphold the following Core Values, to:

    * Act with integrity, honesty and fairness.
    * Treat our customers, co-workers and volunteers with dignity and respect. We believe people are important, and value their diversity.
    * Respond to our customers in a timely and accurate manner.
    * Encourage staff innovation and creativity. Recognize team work and superior performance. Support continuing education.
    * Protect each customer’s right to privacy with respect to information sought and materials consulted or borrowed.
    * Resist censorship.
    * Educate and inform our community of the roles and responsibilities of the library, its governance and finance.
    * Act in a professional manner, always mindful of the impression we make on our customers and co-workers.
    * Conduct our business affairs economically, accurately and with integrity.
    * Be aware of library technology trends and adopt change as necessary

Name: Porter County Public Library System
Description:
We believe that libraries can change people’s lives and are a cornerstone of our democracy. The mission of the Porter County Public Library System is to provide all residents of the library district with a comprehensive collection of materials in a variety of media that records human knowledge, ideas, and culture and to organize these materials for ready access. The library encourages the love of reading and the joy of learning, and offers the assistance people need to find, evaluate, and use electronic and print information resources that help them live successful and rewarding lives.

PCPLS has served porter county since 1905. Today, it consists of 5 branches and nearly 100 staff members, and has the third largest genealogy collection in the state of Indiana.

Name: Marion Public Library
Description:
Marion Public Library serves the city of Marion, Indiana, which has a population of about 31,320.  They have over 150,000 titles in their collection, which can be browsed via the HIP Online Catalog.  They also have over 20 public Internet stations.

MPL's vision is: To serve our community as a vital and reliable information resource as we prepare for the opportunities and challenges of the future; to encourage people of all ages in the pursuit of learning and personal excellence; to provide a community meeting place; and to preserve a record and memory of our community's past.

Name: Library Management Today
Description:
Library Management Today is a journal, that is an extension of LMI. It focuses exclusively on the issues of library management and administration. This online publication is distributed to library managers throughout the country on a bi-weekly basis. 

We explore timely issues in the following subject areas: 

Library Human Resources Management 
Library Marketing and Promotion                                   
Library Law 
Renovations and New Buildings 
Strategic Planning 
Management Trends in Libraries Today    
   
Each issue also features book reviews, information about new products, a job site, featured profiles on key library leaders, general news affecting library managers, and commentaries on the current issues of the moment.

Name: Washington County Free Library
Description:
Serving Washington County, Maryland, and the Cumberland Valley since 1898, the Washington County Free Library System is dedicated to serving the personal, educational, and professional information needs of our communities. WCFL promotes community enrichment and economic vitality by providing information and library materials in a variety of formats.

Founders of America's first bookmobile and the second oldest county-wide library system in the United States, we are proud of our years of service and innovation.

Governed by a dedicated Board of Trustees, WCFL is pledged to helping government, business, education, and community leaders reach Washington County's vision of excellence.

Name: esprit scholengroep
Description:
the Berlage Lyceum is a dynamic highschool in the centre of Amsterdam.
one of the specialities of this school is that it has speed courses for -new in the netherlands comers- and the school offers TTO, wich is bilangual schooling.

Description:
Se constituye en el año 2014 y tiene como objetivo contribuir a compensar los desequilibrios sociales apoyando proyectos que llevan a cabo las bibliotecas públicas, dirigidos a los sectores más vulnerables de la sociedad.
En diciembre 2021 cesa sus actividades.

Name: Prospect Heights Public Library District
Description: The Prospect Heights Public Library District serves the community of Prospect Heights and parts of Arlington Heights and Wheeling, Illinois. Established in 1957.

Name: Friends of the Santa Cruz Public Libraries
Description: Friends of the Santa Cruz Public Libraries is a nonprofit organization dedicated to supporting the Santa Cruz Public Libraries.

Name: Kitabistan
Description: Kitabistan is your one-stop solution for finding new as well as used books and selling them too. Our aim is to make it easy for you to buy books so you don’t have to spend hours in the market searching for low price books. Through Kitabistan, we are also bringing to life, the Circular Economy concept i.e. you earn money on a book you don’t want anymore and someone else buys a book they need. Not only that, we endeavor to help save the environment. By buying and selling old books, you are preventing the cutting down of trees to make paper and are thus preventing deforestation. You can also sell that hundred year old book your grandpa left for you so someone who wants it, can take care of it for you.

Name: Lewiston Public Library
Description:
- Our Mission - 

Preserving our history,
Connecting our community,
and Enriching the life of the mind.

The Lewiston Public Library is an invaluable community asset. This important public repository of knowledge and culture serves as a focal point for education and information in Lewiston. It provides a wide range of needed information services to users of all ages, abilities, and backgrounds and, in so doing, it remains both a significant institutional symbol and a core working component of our democratic society.

Name: Loveland Public Library
Description: Loveland Public Library is a libraries company based out of 300 N Adams Ave, Loveland, CO, United States.

Name: Mesa County Libraries
Description: Mesa County Libraries enrich lives and build community through opportunities to learn, discover, create, and connect.

Name: Bibliothèque ZACHARIAS TANEE FOMUM
Description:
La Bibliothèque Zacharias Tanee Fomum est une institution de premier plan dédiée à la préservation et à la diffusion du savoir. 
Avec une collection exceptionnelle de plus de 170 000 ouvrages, couvrant 75 thèmes divers en près de 11 langues différentes, elle offre un accès inégalé à une richesse de connaissances pour chrétiens, chercheurs, étudiants et passionnés de lecture.

Le slogan “Readers are leaders, leaders are readers" incarne l'engagement de la bibliothèque à promouvoir la lecture comme un moteur essentiel de leadership et de développement personnel. En mettant l'accent sur la formation des disciples, de la connaissance et la préparation des leaders de demain, la Bibliothèque Zacharias Tanee Fomum vise à être un catalyseur de la curiosité intellectuelle et un centre d'excellence éducative.

Outre sa vaste collection, la Bibliothèque Zacharias Tanee Fomum propose des ressources numériques, des espaces de travail collaboratif et des programmes éducatifs adaptés à divers publics.

Name: Calvert Library
Description: Calvert Library opened in 1959 and building on its history of customer service, the staff of Calvert Library continues to make every effort to reach out and welcome every citizen. Calvert Library continues to keep pace with technology for the benefit of our customers and provide fun and educational events for all ages!

Name: Yamada Enterprises
Description:
Yamada Enterprises has been dedicated to furnishing complete library interiors for over 40 years. As a distributor for various manufacturers, we offer a selection of quality products that include bookstacks, mobile compact shelving systems, library furniture, seating and miscellaneous accessories. The broad scope of our work enables our clients to enjoy a turnkey furniture and equipment installation from a single source supplier.

While Yamada’s main focus was originally on libraries, we have branched out into other markets over the last several years and discovered our products have been widely received and fit seamlessly into other environments. Student unions, lounges, banks, hospitals, coffee/wine bars and cafes are just a few of the other markets we have transitioned into. Our compact/mobile and rotary file systems are also widely used in doctor’s offices, hospitals, law firms and other similar environments.

Name: BIB-Business Silkeborg
Description:
BIB-Business Silkeborg er erhvervslivets hurtige adgang til Silkeborg Bibliotekernes tilbud til virksomheder.
Når du følger os på Linkedin modtager du løbende nyheder om bibliotekets erhvervsrettede services.
Se også https://silkeborgbib.dk/netmedier/databaser/erhverv, hvor vi har samlet en adgang til erhvervsmagasiner, databaser, mv.

Name: Books N Bros
Description:
Supporting education, leadership, and character development.
To combat the statistic that says boys - especially African American boys - ages 7 to 13 are at a lower literacy level than others. In the process of combating against this statistic, we are a youth-led organization striving to reach the masses and encourage character development; while bringing awareness to positive, African-American literature.

Name: School Library Association of South Australia (SLASA)
Description:
The School Library Association of South Australia (SLASA) represents and supports the interests of school library personnel across all education sectors in South Australia through advocacy, professional development and communication.

Patron
Dr Maureen Nimon

Advocacy
- to advocate the critical role of school libraries and teacher librarians in reading, teaching and learning in South Australia
- to improve the professional standing, working conditions and qualifications for all staff involved with school libraries

Professional Development
To promote and strengthen the professional standing, working conditions and qualifications of teacher librarians via:

- the organisation of conferences, seminars and other PD activities
- providing a forum for professional discussion and growth
- liaison with tertiary institutions and the encouragement of research in the field of teacher librarianship

Communication
- to make public comment on matters relating to school libraries/resource centres and resources
- to publish material that promotes the development of school library and information services and teacher librarianship
- to promote cooperation between, and undertake liaison with, other institutions and bodies with similar aims and interests

Name: Shortgrass Library System
Description:
The Shortgrass Library System is one of Alberta's Regional Library Systems. Shortgrass Library System is a service-oriented, non-profit organization and is registered as a charitable organization with the Canada Revenue Agency.

Shortgrass Library System provides Integrated Library Services (ILS) and other technical services to regional public libraries as well as school-based libraries.

Name: Fayetteville Public Library Foundation
Description: The Fayetteville Public Library Foundation serves as the philanthropic partner of your favorite local library, turning gifts into community-empowering resources. Learn more at www.faylib.org/foundation.

Name: East Bonner County Library District
Description: The East Bonner County Library District provides open access to opportunities for discovery, connection, and lifelong learning.  A public library system, it encompasses the eastern portion of Bonner County, Idaho, with a service population of 31,669 and 26,387 registered borrowers, as of 2013. The main branch library is located in Sandpoint, the county seat, with a smaller branch located in the town of Clark Fork, 26 miles to the east. A Bookmobile serves outlying areas Monday through Thursday, as well as the Sandpoint Farmer’s Market every Saturday during the summer. The website hosts a Digital Library with electronic materials.

Name: Bibliotheek Hardenberg
Description:
De Bibliotheek is dé plek in Hardenberg voor informatie, kennis, cultuur en leesplezier voor en van iedereen. We prikkelen de nieuwsgierigheid, geven inspiratie en nodigen uit tot ontmoeting. De Bibliotheek Hardenberg heeft 6 vestigingen en 5 servicepunten.
Samen zorgen we dat de Bibliotheek een omgeving is waar jong en oud het plezier van lezen en leren ontdekken. Niets hoeft, alles mag. Je kunt bij ons studeren en werken, online een cursus volgen, of juist even ontspannen met een magazine of goed boek.

Name: UTAH LIBRARY ASSOCIATION
Description: UTAH LIBRARY ASSOCIATION is a company based out of PO BOX 708155, SANDY, Utah, United States.

Name: Canadian Virtual Health Library (CVHL)
Description:
CVHL introduces equitable access to high-quality health information for Canadian health professionals, to improve health outcomes and patient safety for all Canadians. This initiative of the Canadian Health Libraries Association (CHLA) seeks to coordinate access to core health information delivery to Canada’s health professionals and researchers efficiently and more cost-effectively. Made possible through a grant from the Canadian Institutes of Health Research (CIHR), and the effort of many volunteers, we have built this site to help you find the health information as it becomes readily available.

The Canadian Virtual Health Library will ensure that all practitioners have access to evidence-based publications to support appropriate decision-making. The CVHL will do this by grouping together purchasers who typically are not able to purchase content such as Health Councils and Professional Societies by providing a website that will act as a window of access. This window will allow health practitioners to access this information and to employ the services of skilled navigators who sit within large university and hospital libraries across Canada to facilitate research that encourages best practices at the point of care.

Pour l'information en français, suiver le lien pour le site de la Bibliothèque virtuelle canadienne de la santé (BVCS):

Name: Peyk Bookstore
Description: Peyk is an online bookstore based in Sulaimani, KRI.

Name: Consultor Autónomo
Description: Consultoria dedicada a la organización de Bibliotecas, archivos, y todo centro de documentación

Name: Barberton Public Library
Description:
The Barberton Public Library will promote independent thought and community interaction by providing services and resources necessary for individuals to pursue educational, creative, personal, and professional interests.

The Library offers weekly programs for children, families, teens and adults. Through a partnership with Summa Hospital, the Library maintains a full service branch located on the first floor of the Barberton hospital with the focus of consumer health information.

Serving the community since 1903, the library is governed by a seven member board of trustees which set the policy and direction of library services.

Since 2014, the Barberton Public Library is also the site of the College Now! Greater Cleveland office serving Summit County.

Name: International journal libraries and information science
Description: International Journal of Library and Information Science" is a refereed international scientific journal published by the Egyptian Association for Libraries, Information and Archives, and issued in accordance with the standards of output prepared by the Supreme Council of Egyptian Universities, which conform to the standards of the output of international scientific journals. The magazine is dedicated to publishing theoretical and applied studies and research, presentations, scientific reviews, reports and news in various branches of librarianship, information, documents and archives in Egypt and the world in various languages.

Name: Liberation Library
Description: Liberation Library provides books to youth in prison to encourage imagination, self-determination and connection to the outside worlds of their choosing. We believe access to books is a right, not a privilege. We believe books and relationships empower young people to change the criminal justice system.

Name: Library Design Associates, Inc.
Description:
Library Design Associates, Inc.(LDA), founded in 1976, is a unique interior design and library equipment firm specializing in the planning, design and equipping of Public, Academic and Special libraries. Our staff consists of accredited Library Building Consultants, Interior Designers and Project Management administrators. The firm is capable of providing functional planning services, building layout, interior design, equipment procurement and minor construction services.

-Procurement of shelving, furniture and related library equipment.
-Library program review and development relative to functional building requirements.
-Analysis of architectural plans relative to compliance with the library program requirements.
-Project budgeting for all shelving, furniture, technical furniture, accessories, signage and interior finishes.
-Installation of all shelving, furniture and related library equipment by exclusive factory-trained personnel.

Name: Atlantic Provinces Library Association (APLA)
Description:
APLA is one of the most enduring library organizations in North America with a diverse membership representing all levels of interest and participation. The association’s mission is to promote the interests of libraries in the Atlantic provinces while fostering the development of librarians, library technicians and information professionals through cooperative efforts and the promotion of library interests.


MANDATE OF THE ASSOCIATION

The objectives of the Association are outlined in the memorandum of Association as follows:

To promote library and information service throughout the Provinces of New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, Prince Edward Island and Newfoundland;

To serve the interests of all who work in the region’s libraries and for all those who are interested in library and information services in the Atlantic Provinces;

To cooperate with library associations and other organizations on matters of mutual concern.


MISSION STATEMENT AND STRATEGIC GOALS

Regional Voice Role: To structure and position APLA so that the Association can effectively serve its mandate as a regional voice.

Communication: To improve internal and external communications.

Value of Libraries: To promote the value and worth of the library and its workers.

Interest Groups: To improve the effectiveness of the interest groups.

Continuing Education: To develop an effective continuing education programme.

Name: Speelotheek Hoograven
Description:
Speelotheek Hoograven is een bieb vol speelgoed, verkleedkleren en spelletjes. Hier leen je speelgoed en spelletjes. Dat is leuk, sociaal, duurzaam & leerzaam.

Het gaat de Speelotheek Hoograven om samen delen, lekker spelen. Om met een betaalbare speelgoeduitleen voor iedereen passend speelgoed beschikbaar te maken. Ook voor kwetsbare gezinnen en gezinnen in armoede. Daarbij is speelgoed universeel en daardoor komen verschillende mensen en groepen uit de buurt hier (wel) met elkaar in contact. 

Het is een plek waar bewoners elkaar als lener, vrijwilliger of speeltuinbezoeker ontmoeten en het biedt vrijwilligers ruimte zich te ontwikkelen en een bijdrage te leveren aan een duurzamere en meer verbindende wijk. Een plek van iedereen en voor iedereen waar inclusie belangrijk is. 

Ook laat de Speelotheek mensen duurzamer omgaan met ruimte en materialen, gooien we minder weg door te lenen en stimuleren we de deeleconomie.

Hier kan iedereen (weer) spelen, even weg van dat scherm. Op de website zie je wat er aan speelgoed is in de online catalogus. Ontdek tof en uitdagend speelgoed. Je kunt zoeken op leeftijd en op categorie. Lener worden gaat makkelijk via de website www.speelotheekhoograven.nl

Name: PACIFIC NORTHWEST LIBRARY ASSOCATION
Description:
PACIFIC NORTHWEST LIBRARY ASSOCATION 

PNLA is the oldest regional library association in the United States and the only binational association in North America. Members come from Alaska, Alberta, British Columbia, Idaho, Montana, Oregon, Washington, and beyond. Since 1909, PNLA has provided a professional and social forum for librarians, library workers, and library supporters throughout the vast Pacific Northwest region.

PNLA promotes increased communication, joint advocacy, open debate, networking and support, and information sharing through its many special projects and initiatives including: Jobs Board, Conference, Young Readers Choice Award, Leadership Institute, and PNLA Quarterly.

Name: Forest Park Public Library
Description: Forest Park Public Library will meet the lifelong learning needs of our diverse community by growing our patronage and collections, enhancing services, programs and staff, and maintaining fiscal stability.

Name: Fondazione Barbanera
Description:
La Fondazione Barbanera 1762 è un ente no profit dedito alla valorizzazione del Barbanera, storico almanacco italiano ispirato agli insegnamenti del leggendario filosofo degli Appennini e pubblicato dal 1762 a oggi.
Gestisce l'archivio storico dell'editore Campi e una biblioteca specializzata in almanacchistica ed editoria a larga diffusione.
Conserva la raccolta di lunari e almanacchi Barbanera inclusa dall’Unesco nel Memory of the world Register, il programma che censisce e tutela i più significativi patrimoni documentari dell'umanità. Custode delle memorie tipografiche folignati, conserva una vasta collezione di almanacchi e lunari dal XVI secolo a oggi, migliaia di calendari, fogli volanti, materiali musicali e altre testimonianze di editoria popolare.

Name: The John P. Holt Brentwood Library
Description: The Brentwood Library is a public library serving the city of Brentwood Tennessee. The library is situated in a beautiful park setting and bordered by a walking trail and arboretum. More than 185,000 items are part of the collection, including books, audiobooks, DVDs, music CDs, electronic resources, newspapers and magazines.

Name: Pitts Theology Library
Description: Pitts Theology Library, one of Emory University's six instructional libraries, holds a distinguished collection of theological materials, and is one of the premier theological libraries in North America. Supporting the students and faculty of Candler School of Theology at Emory University and researchers from around the world, Pitts is home to superb collections in theology and cognate disciplines, housed in a new state-of-the-art facility and served by a highly trained professional staff.

Name: Farmington Public Library, New Mexico
Description:
Our Vision is a literate and enlightened population whose lives are enriched by the resources, programs and services provided by Farmington Public Library.

Our Mission - Farmington Public Library enlightens, enriches, and changes lives by providing resources, programs and services that are efficient, innovative and convenient, in an environment that is clean, safe, and pleasant.

Name: Academic Library of Tallinn University
Description:
Academic Library of Tallinn University is a comprehensive research library in almost all fields of knowledge.

The library collects and holds printed and other documents published in Estonia, creating as complete collections of these materials as possible.
The library is entitled to a legal deposit copy of each and every publication issued in Estonia.
Although the library is quite young, the history of its collections goes back a long way. The Library of St. Olai` Church (founded in 1552) makes up the oldest part of the collections.

The library holds over 2,5 million items and the number of the readers is over 43 400.

Name: Friends of the Library Montgomery County
Description: Strengthen, promote, and champion Montgomery County Public Libraries (MCPL)

Name: de Bibliotheek Z-O-U-T
Description: De Bibliotheek Z-O-U-T (Zuidoost-Utrecht) is een samenwerkingsverband van bibliotheken van de gemeenten Utrechtse Heuvelrug, Wijk bij Duurstede, Rhenen en Renswoude. Dat zijn 11 vestigingen verdeeld over 4 gemeenten. Ook de Taalhuizen Utrechtse Heuvelrug, Rhenen en Renswoude en Podium Z-O-U-T horen bij de Bibliotheek Z-O-U-T. De bibliotheken van Z-O-U-T zijn gastvrije ontmoetingsplekken waar je voortdurend verrast, geïnformeerd en geïnspireerd wordt.

Name: OHIOANA LIBRARY ASSOCIATION
Description:
What does the suffix ana in Ohioana mean? The definition is: a collection of assorted material, such as facts, anecdotes, and pictures, suggestive of the character of a notable place of person; for example Americana or Ohioana. The suffix ana comes from Latin and means "matters relating to."

At the Ohioana Library Association, we work to promote, preserve, and increase awareness of Ohio literature, reaching over half a million people worldwide. Ohio has long been one of America’s great literary centers, and the state continues to produce an impressive body of written works and authors.

Whether it’s through our Book Festival, the Ohio Book Awards, our library collection, or our Ohioana Quarterly publication, everything we do is with the goal of connecting readers and Ohio writers.

Whether it’s through our Book Festival, the Ohio Book Awards, our library collection, or our Ohioana Quarterly publication, everything we do is with the goal of connecting readers and Ohio writers.

Ohioana elevates Ohio’s written works and the creative minds behind them, celebrating our collective literary history. We also highlight the unique, diverse perspectives that shape the story of Ohio, aiming to inspire the next generation of writers and readers. 

The Association is a 501(c)(3) tax exempt, not-for-profit organization governed by a Board of Trustees composed of up to 28 members from throughout Ohio. It is supported through memberships, subscriptions, contributions, and a subsidy from the State of Ohio. Members and subscribers live in 36 states, the District of Columbia, and three European countries. 

You can visit the Ohioana Library by appointment at 274 E. First Avenue, Suite 300 in Columbus, Ohio. Email us at ohioana@ohioana.org to make an appointment, and see our Contact page for more details about planning your visit.

Name: Pollux - Fachinformationsdienst Politikwissenschaft
Description:
Der Fachinformationsdienst (FID) Politikwissenschaft - Pollux hat zum Ziel, Politikwissenschaftler:innen einen überregionalen, fachspezifischen und schnellen Zugriff auf Spezialliteratur und forschungsrelevante Informationen zu ermöglichen.
Die Bedarfe und Interessen der Forschenden stehen bei der kontinuierlichen Weiterentwicklung des Angebotes im Mittelpunkt.

Mit rund 12 Millionen Nachweisen politikwissenschaftlicher Publikationen ist Pollux das zentrale Literatur- und Rechercheportal für die Politikwissenschaft in Deutschland. Die einzelnen Titel sind entweder sofort elektronisch verfügbar oder im Portal mit einem Hinweis auf die besitzende Bibliothek versehen. Darüber hinaus haben Politikwissenschaftler:innen kostenfreien Zugriff auf das Zeitungsarchiv Factiva, den Politikmonitoring und -analysedienst Polit-X sowie auf etliche E-Books.

Der FID Politikwissenschaft unterstützt und fördert zudem das Open Access Publizieren und das Forschungsdatenmanagement in der Politikwissenschaft.

Pollux wird seit 2016 im Programm Fachinformationsdienste für die Wissenschaft von der Deutschen Forschungsgemeinschaft (DFG) gefördert und gemeinsam von der Staats- und Universitätsbibliothek Bremen, GESIS – Leibniz-Institut für Sozialwissenschaften sowie seit 2022 vom Forschungsdatenzentrum Qualiservice betreut.

Description:
Bibliotele is the leading Spanish-language streaming platform built exclusively for libraries—public and academic—designed to connect Latino communities with trusted, culturally relevant programming. We offer a curated catalog of on-demand audiovisual content and live expert-led events (Bibliotele Original), focused on key areas that matter in everyday life: immigration, health, education, entrepreneurship, personal growth, and civic rights.

For academic libraries, Bibliotele supports teaching and learning by complementing curricula with Spanish-language media that fosters critical thinking, cultural awareness, and classroom engagement.

Ad-free, library-licensed, and community-driven, Bibliotele helps libraries expand their role as trusted hubs for education, connection, and empowerment.

______________________

Bibliotele es la plataforma líder de streaming en español creada exclusivamente para bibliotecas —públicas y académicas— con el propósito de conectar a las comunidades latinas con contenido confiable y culturalmente relevante. Ofrecemos un catálogo curado de contenido audiovisual a demanda y eventos en vivo con expertos (Bibliotele Original), centrados en temas clave como inmigración, salud, educación, emprendimiento, desarrollo personal y derechos cívicos.

Para bibliotecas académicas, Bibliotele apoya los procesos de enseñanza-aprendizaje al complementar los planes de estudio con contenidos en español que fomentan el pensamiento crítico, la conciencia cultural y la participación estudiantil.

Sin publicidad, bajo licencia institucional y con enfoque comunitario, Bibliotele fortalece el papel de las bibliotecas como espacios de educación, conexión y empoderamiento.
